name: Erica Smith
subject: BREAKING: GOP gerrymander stands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/33609?refcode=em20220111-761&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=761%2E3698%2ElsbAkF ][IMG]

This just in: A majority
Republican court just ruled to uphold the GOP gerrymander of North
Carolina's congressional district lines, including NC-02.

This is a blatant attempt by Republicans to steal this U.S. House seat and
silence the voices of Black and brown voters. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/33609?refcode=em20220111-761&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=761%2E3698%2ElsbAkF ]Will you rush a
$5 donation to help us overcome the GOP's gerrymander, keep
NC-02 blue, and protect our razor-thin Democratic majority in the U.S.
House?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/33609?refcode=em20220111-761&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=761%2E3698%2ElsbAkF ]Rush a donation

North Carolina is a swing state that President Biden lost by less than 2
percent of the vote — yet under the current lines drawn by Republicans in
the state legislature, there would be 10 Republican districts, 3
Democratic districts, and our swing district. It's a racket. It's
undemocratic. It's illegal.

NC-02 hasn't had a
Republican congressperson since 1882 — and now, our community is at risk
of losing representation and our Democratic majority in the U.S. House
hangs in the balance.

It's clear: The GOP thinks 2022 is their year. I won't let it happen.

While serving in the State Senate, Republicans racially gerrymandered my
district and tried to steal that seat, too. I beat them then — and with
your support, I'm going to beat them again.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/33609?refcode=em20220111-761&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=761%2E3698%2ElsbAkF ]We must not let Republicans get away with their attempts of stealing
this seat. Please rush $5 — or anything you can — to help
us build a campaign powerful enough to fight back and win.

Thank you for everything,

Erica

Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220111-761-footer&t=1023&refcode2=761_3698_lsbAkF&akid=761%2E3698%2ElsbAkF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=761%2E3698%2ElsbAkF

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Friends,

**Can you believe that it’s already 2022?!**

In just a few short months, voters will head to the polls to choose their next representatives. I’m hopeful, and I’m confident, that we will see another Red Wave across the country. Everyday Americans are sick and tired of the Biden administration and Career Politicians' disastrous policies.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Alabama because I know that Alabamians deserve better than Career Politicians who have never held a real job in their lives. They deserve a patriot who will always put America first and fight to defend their country. I believe I’m that candidate. _I’m a 22-year Army veteran, a businessman, and a father of six._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Expand Voting Rights NOW
body:
We need to protect one of our most fundamental rights. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,

This afternoon, from the former district of late Congressman John Lewis, President Biden and Vice President Harris reminded us the importance of protecting the paramount American right: the right to cast a recognized vote in a free, fair, and secure election.

For over a year now, the Republicans have stoked unfounded fears surrounding our nation's electoral process, turning this traditionally robust American institution into a partisan battleground. In tandem with this fear-mongering, they have passed voter suppression laws that have disproportionately affected communities of color.

It is well past time for the Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, and the President has made clear that the Senate rules should change if it means ensuring the protection of one America's most sacred institutions. Dial (202) 224-3121 to let your Senator know that it is time for them to prove that they are on the right side of history.

Until this legislation is passed, it is important for us to continue to work with our partners, nationally and locally, on protecting every ballot box across the country. Thank you all for continuing to fight for this basic right in your communities.

Best,
Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
| We have put together a toolkit with ways that you can amplify the White House's message. The toolkit includes graphics, messages, and articles that you can share with your networks. Show the world that you have chosen to be on the right side of history by utilizing the toolkit below:
---
| _**VOTING RIGHTS TOOLKIT**_ **Content to share:** [@WhiteHouse](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=137b1b4575&e=d6c5c7d7ec): Happening now: President Biden delivers remarks on the urgent need to pass legislation to protect the constitutional right to vote and the integrity of our elections. [CNN](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=772440747b&e=d6c5c7d7ec): Opinion by Jaime Harrison | My grandfather taught me this crucial life lesson [@POTUS](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=06a296cb3a&e=d6c5c7d7ec): History has never been kind to those who have sided with voter suppression over voting rights. And it will not be kind to those who fail to defend the right to vote. Congress must debate and vote on the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. [@POTUS](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1d20d6afa4&e=d6c5c7d7ec): When it comes to protecting majority rule in America, a majority should rule in the United States Senate. To protect our democracy, I support changing the Senate rules to prevent a minority of Senators from blocking action on voting rights. [@VP](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0b4e3968e7&e=d6c5c7d7ec): Free and fair elections are central to our democracy. The Senate must pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the Freedom to Vote Act to protect our right to vote. [@VP](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=281eae0533&e=d6c5c7d7ec): Across our nation, anti-voter laws could make it more difficult for as many as 55 million Americans to vote. That's 1 out of 6 people in our country. [The Democrats](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6494e6394b&e=d6c5c7d7ec): New DNC Billboard in Atlanta Echoes President Biden and Vice President Harris’ Call for Voting Rights Legislation
**White House Post-Remarks Talking Points:**
* Today, in Atlanta, GA, the President and Vice President forcefully defended **the fundamental right to vote – the right from which all other rights flow.**
* **They called on Congress to stand on the right side of history and pass voting rights laws that prevent voter suppression, ensure full access to voting by mail, expand access to drop-boxes, and more.**
* The President reminded the country that last year alone, 19 states enacted 34 new laws attacking voting rights.
* The Freedom to Vote Act takes on election subversion to protect nonpartisan election officials from intimidation and interference. And, it would get dark money out of politics and create fairer district maps by ending partisan gerrymandering.
* The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act restores the strength of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and allow the Justice Department can stop discriminatory laws before they go into effect.
* **The threat to our democracy is so grave that we must find a way to pass these voting rights bills.** Yet, Senate Republicans have blocked the way – and oppose even debating it. The President made an appeal to Republican leaders who believe in the rule of law to restore the bipartisan tradition on voting rights.

* **The President also made it clear: To protect our democracy, he supports changing the Senate rules to prevent a minority of Senators from blocking action on voting rights.** If we can change the rules to protect the full faith and credit of the United States, we should be able to change them to protect the heart and soul of our democracy.

* The world is watching. Adversaries and allies alike are waiting to see if American democracy can meet this moment – one of the defining moments in American history.

* _**At consequential moments, history presents a choice. Lawmakers have a choice to make on which side of history they stand on.**_ Do they want to be on the side of Dr. King? Or George Wallace? Do they want to be on the side of John Lewis? Or Bull Connor? Do they want to be on the side of Abraham Lincoln? **Protecting the sacred right to vote is a sacred responsibility – and each members of the Senate is going to be judged by history.**

**Shareable Graphics:**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **DNC Statement on Biden/Harris Speech:** DNC Chair Jaime Harrison released the following statement in response to President Biden and Vice President Harris’ voting rights remarks in Atlanta, Georgia: “Today in Atlanta, the President and Vice President reaffirmed their unshakeable commitment to voting rights. Their doggedness on this issue spoke to me personally, as I know it did for so many others across the country. “My family’s story is inextricably tied to the story of voting rights in this nation. Voting rights legislation ensured that, after decades under the thumb of Jim Crow, my grandfather could vote unencumbered in South Carolina. As voter suppression laws spread like wildfire across the nation, voting rights legislation today would ensure that my son, my grandfather’s namesake, can continue to vote unencumbered. “My family’s story is not unique. President Biden and Vice President Harris know this. They have a deep respect for what millions in this nation have endured and they know in their bones that none of us ever want to go back. “They know this is bigger than politics. They know this is more important than arcane Senate procedures used time and again to grind progress to a halt. “Today, the president and vice president made it inexplicably clear that the time to act is now. The time to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is now. Congressman Lewis was a man of action, not empty words. Those who fail to act in this crucial moment for our democracy should think twice before invoking his name in the future. “President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the nation are united on the importance of voting rights. Let’s act now to translate our shared commitment into law.”
---
|
---
| For many of us, this battle isn't new. We have been fighting to protect of our most fundamental rights for a long time. Tell us what Voting Rights mean to you [here.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f0b9bf0697&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---

Until this legislation is passed, it is important for us to continue to work with our partners, nationally and locally, on protecting every ballot box across the country. Thank you all for continuing to fight for this basic right in your communities. Best, Brencia Berry Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement Democratic National Committee | | We have put together a toolkit with ways that you can amplify the White House's message. The toolkit includes graphics, messages, and articles that you can share with your networks. Show the world that you have chosen to be on the right side of history by utilizing the toolkit below: | VOTING RIGHTS TOOLKIT Content to share: : Happening now: President Biden delivers remarks on the urgent need to pass legislation to protect the constitutional right to vote and the integrity of our elections. : Opinion by Jaime Harrison | My grandfather taught me this crucial life lesson : History has never been kind to those who have sided with voter suppression over voting rights. And it will not be kind to those who fail to defend the right to vote. Congress must debate and vote on the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. : When it comes to protecting majority rule in America, a majority should rule in the United States Senate. To protect our democracy, I support changing the Senate rules to prevent a minority of Senators from blocking action on voting rights. : Free and fair elections are central to our democracy. The Senate must pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the Freedom to Vote Act to protect our right to vote. : Across our nation, anti-voter laws could make it more difficult for as many as 55 million Americans to vote. That's 1 out of 6 people in our country. : New DNC Billboard in Atlanta Echoes President Biden and Vice President Harris’ Call for Voting Rights Legislation White House Post-Remarks Talking Points: Today, in Atlanta, GA, the President and Vice President forcefully defended the fundamental right to vote – the right from which all other rights flow. They called on Congress to stand on the right side of history and pass voting rights laws that prevent voter suppression, ensure full access to voting by mail, expand access to drop-boxes, and more. The President reminded the country that last year alone, 19 states enacted 34 new laws attacking voting rights. The Freedom to Vote Act takes on election subversion to protect nonpartisan election officials from intimidation and interference. And, it would get dark money out of politics and create fairer district maps by ending partisan gerrymandering. The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act restores the strength of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and allow the Justice Department can stop discriminatory laws before they go into effect. The threat to our democracy is so grave that we must find a way to pass these voting rights bills. Yet, Senate Republicans have blocked the way – and oppose even debating it. The President made an appeal to Republican leaders who believe in the rule of law to restore the bipartisan tradition on voting rights. The President also made it clear: To protect our democracy, he supports changing the Senate rules to prevent a minority of Senators from blocking action on voting rights. If we can change the rules to protect the full faith and credit of the United States, we should be able to change them to protect the heart and soul of our democracy. The world is watching. Adversaries and allies alike are waiting to see if American democracy can meet this moment – one of the defining moments in American history. At consequential moments, history presents a choice. Lawmakers have a choice to make on which side of history they stand on. Do they want to be on the side of Dr. King? Or George Wallace? Do they want to be on the side of John Lewis? Or Bull Connor? Do they want to be on the side of Abraham Lincoln? Protecting the sacred right to vote is a sacred responsibility – and each members of the Senate is going to be judged by history. Shareable Graphics: | | | | DNC Statement on Biden/Harris Speech: DNC Chair Jaime Harrison released the following statement in response to President Biden and Vice President Harris’ voting rights remarks in Atlanta, Georgia: “Today in Atlanta, the President and Vice President reaffirmed their unshakeable commitment to voting rights. Their doggedness on this issue spoke to me personally, as I know it did for so many others across the country. “My family’s story is inextricably tied to the story of voting rights in this nation. Voting rights legislation ensured that, after decades under the thumb of Jim Crow, my grandfather could vote unencumbered in South Carolina. As voter suppression laws spread like wildfire across the nation, voting rights legislation today would ensure that my son, my grandfather’s namesake, can continue to vote unencumbered. “My family’s story is not unique. President Biden and Vice President Harris know this. They have a deep respect for what millions in this nation have endured and they know in their bones that none of us ever want to go back. “They know this is bigger than politics. They know this is more important than arcane Senate procedures used time and again to grind progress to a halt. “Today, the president and vice president made it inexplicably clear that the time to act is now. The time to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act is now. Congressman Lewis was a man of action, not empty words. Those who fail to act in this crucial moment for our democracy should think twice before invoking his name in the future. “President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the nation are united on the importance of voting rights. Let’s act now to translate our shared commitment into law.” | | For many of us, this battle isn't new. We have been fighting to protect of our most fundamental rights for a long time. Tell us what Voting Rights mean to you | | | Copyright © 2022 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved. This is a test distribution list. Our mailing address is:** DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

subject: Breaking: NPR paints me as Enemy #1!

body:
Help me fight back |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4f6ae74ee1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump-endorsed Election Integrity Conservative running for Secretary of State in Arizona. I am the only one who can fix our elections, and am actively working on ballot foolproofing and watermarking to make sure that elections are protected nationwide.

_And the media has picked up the scent! They know how much damage I could do to the Liberal Democrat fraud operation._

**And this is why they are on the attack.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=83d58c51e0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| When it comes to Election Integrity, the Liberal propaganda mouthpiece NPR thinks I am Enemy #1.

_They want me to lose at ANY cost._

_NPR_ “reports:”

_Mark Finchem was at the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6._

_He says he didn't go inside, but he snapped some photos of people who did._

_"What happens when the People feel they have been ignored, and Congress refuses to acknowledge rampant fraud. #stopthesteal," he tweeted._

_The Arizona state representative was there to share what he called "evidence" of an "irredeemably compromised" 2020 election with Republican lawmakers from his home state of Arizona. To be clear, Republican election officials in the state deemed the results "free, fair, and accurate" and even a discredited GOP-led "audit" run in the state's largest county agreed Biden won._

_More recently, Finchem also appeared at a QAnon conference, and in speaking with NPR declined to describe what happened at the Capitol as a riot or an insurrection, instead making allusions to a sort of conspiracy involving law enforcement._

_Now, he is running to oversee voting in Arizona in 2022._

**Painting me as a conspiracy theorist is a blatant smear campaign to do everything in their power to prevent me winning Secretary of State.**

But let’s be honest, folks, _I’m used to this._

I’ve been attacked by the mainstream media all year as the leader of a huge grassroots campaign that led to the auditing of Maricopa County, which revealed and proved massive fraud.

**I’ve been endorsed by President Trump as a Champion Fighter for Election Integrity and have spoken at his rallies.**

**_I’m the only candidate in the country that has worked personally to develop currency-grade ballot protection and watermarking technology and have pushed to have this adopted nationwide._**

Folks, they’re not going after me because I’m a “conspiracy theorist.”

**_They’re going after me for my resume. They see what I’ve done. They know what I will do._**

I will fight back. I will strike hard. I will win.

**But to do this, we have to win the fight _ourselves._ We have to get the word out _ourselves._ We have to defend against the lying media _ourselves_.**

[And I cannot do this without your support! I need your support to win this race!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c1331de21c&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Whatever you can spare, please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me fight against the Fake News Media and get the word out about our foolproof ballot protection technology!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1ed4eba497&e=44b8c466b0)_

_[Chip in tonight so that we can immediately accelerate our campaign and petition drives to get patriots around America to pressure their lawmakers to adopt our currency-grade ballot watermarking!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=11a4bb56c0&e=44b8c466b0)_

_2022 can be the safest elections yet!_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b4a2c2e753&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=411b71f754&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ccc41f3a7d&e=44b8c466b0).

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=275d050906) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=275d050906).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Free our J6 political prisoners!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Follow the Constitution! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=be710634ca&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

As someone who took an oath to the Constitution, I'm furious.

There are a number of American citizens, imprisoned in appalling conditions, for a year- WITHOUT EVER BEING CHARGED WITH A CRIME.

They are political prisoners and this is unconstitutional!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ea01272d05&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area. This is a targeted district by the NRCC and we can take this district!**

Breitbart reports:

_Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus Andy Biggs (R-AZ) and 20 Republican representatives on Tuesday demanded a congressional hearing over the reported mistreatment of January 6 political prisoners being held by the D.C. Department of Corrections, Breitbart News has exclusively learned.

In a letter addressed to House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jerry Nadler (D-NY) and House Oversight and Reform Committee Chairwoman Carolyn Maloney (D-NY), Biggs insisted their committees must conduct hearings on the political prisoners’ alleged mistreatment amid reports of civil rights violations:

The defendants are being held in solitary confinement for extended periods of time and there are numerous credible reports that they are being denied access to legal counsel and face retaliation for meeting with legal counsel.

They are being denied medical care, including one defendant who was denied treatment for non-Hodgkin’s. This is a disgusting abuse of power and a clear violation of their civil rights.

The letter also says the treatment of the political prisoners has “been so egregious” that Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), the ACLU, and U.S. District Judge Royce C. Lamberth have spoken against it. _
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9c068d8bd5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| That's right.... the treatment of the J6 political prisoners has been SO bad, even Elizabeth Warren and the ACLU have spoken out against it.

Let's see what the Constitution has to say about this:

The 6th Amendment to the Constitution says that:

_In all criminal prosecutions, the accused shall enjoy the right to a speedy and public trial, by an impartial jury of the State and district wherein the crime shall have been committed, which district shall have been previously ascertained by law, and to be informed of the nature and cause of the accusation; to be confronted with the witnesses against him; to have compulsory process for obtaining witnesses in his favor, and to have the Assistance of Counsel for his defence._

_Further, the Speedy Trial Act of 1974 establishes time limits for completing the various stages of a federal criminal prosecution. The Act establishes time limits for completing the various stages of federal criminal prosecution. The information or indictment must be filed within 30 days from the date of arrest or service of the summons. Trial must commence within 70 days from the date the information or indictment was filed, or from the date the defendant appears before an officer of the court in which the charge is pending, whichever is later._

Many of the J6 prisoners have been held over a year without a trial and without even being charged. Clear violation!

_Moreover, NOT A SINGLE J6 PRISONER HAS BEEN CHARGED WITH TREASON OR INSURRECTION. NOT ONE!_

**Nearly all have been charged with trespassing. Now, that's a serious charge, but does it justify holding in inhumane conditions indefinitely? I'd say that's unconstitutional!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=58fcc11b56&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Look, here's what this all comes down to: the ruling class in DC thinks there are one set of rules for them, and another for you.

_They will abuse and politicize the J6 prisoners because they think they are better than the rest of us. BLM rioters could burn whole cities and kill innocent people, but trespassers have their constitutional rights suspended?_**

What a crock!

The only way to stop this travesty is to disband the J6 Commission and start an investigation into the abuses of the political prisoners.

I will do it because I have courage!

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up and fought for our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=247cdcbf73&e=afa21b7626) Will you help me fight the Communists and fight for the Constitution?

Help me stand for Americans and against ANY political prisoners! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9a4375c887&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=55c988eb34&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=75e0e8fb01&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=af5325c4df&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7592671bce&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=34d39c0db4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=34d39c0db4).

name: Odessa Kelly
subject: [Breaking News] Nashville Gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
This is a move to intentionally destroy a Democratic progressive stronghold in our state. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefPonxF3K8SWHL-PxMIDZy5sMyPLGmdibEZvW5eLyYzUDTyLP4YvEy4tFxoU40hAlZi7GEVC0wWNgDjW0kDyJVdVQtcYVoirYhjOYjgu3vECA3kPR89vZGGWo0HpUkw4Vgwz9OejxcQmTeFhWhr0QMZL43CORodfB7BbpBF1KO32ezGFQDdnm5HLwLi4M7EChAVR5HQHzYZag7PmMqQccOQY_lJzSjUj5GGDE_fLUi_E1vrqtwYevirFSYQ9lgk7rby2ZTZER5Q_trV2RH0Bx0GY/3in/XB6l5OxbRkGAQUkig4CNGA/h0/zNlFrVbf6NPUMIXNMNMSBfL3XKNk6vQqqJ6Hxle0ROk) Peter, Last night, Tennessee State House Speaker Cameron Sexton announced that **he intends to break up Nashville into multiple Congressional districts.** This is a move to intentionally destroy a Democratic progressive stronghold in the state of Tennessee and dilute the power of our votes and representation, and if he’s successful, you can say Cameron Sexton in the same breath as Strom Thurmond, George Wallace, and Mitch McConnell. They are all white men who have acted to disenfranchise progressive movements and protect power for a conservative white majority. It’s important to remember that Tennesseans haven’t even seen these maps and they have not been approved. They’ll be introduced this week in the state legislature. **We as a city, a state, and a nation-wide movement must unite together, make sure our voices are heard, and protect democracy in every way possible.******
[**_Peter, we don’t have a moment to waste in swiftly condemning the proposed maps and urging our legislators to keep our district whole — but to get our message out, we need more resources. Will you make a contribution right now — of any amount — to help us fight back against clean_body: This is a move to intentionally destroy a Democratic progressive stronghold in our state. | | | Peter, Last night, Tennessee State House Speaker Cameron Sexton announced that he intends to break up Nashville into multiple Congressional districts. This is a move to intentionally destroy a Democratic progressive stronghold in the state of Tennessee and dilute the power of our votes and representation, and if he’s successful, you can say Cameron Sexton in the same breath as Strom Thurmond, George Wallace, and Mitch McConnell. They are all white men who have acted to disenfranchise progressive movements and protect power for a conservative white majority. It’s important to remember that Tennesseans haven’t even seen these maps and they have not been approved. They’ll be introduced this week in the state legislature. We as a city, a state, and a nation-wide movement must unite together, make sure our voices are heard, and protect democracy in every way possible.** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Nashville has had a white Congressman for 200 years, and it should not be lost on us that the legislature is breaking up the district at a time the city is on the verge of electing the first openly gay Black woman in the city of Nashville.** The GOP should be careful what they wish for if they plan to draw communities like mine into more rural or suburban communities. They'll do this to try to keep our progressive movement out of power — but the things I've been fighting for here in Nashville are impacting us all, in Tennessee, across the country, and in Englewood, too. We can organize and we can win anywhere — and Peter, that starts with making sure the legislature hears loud and clear that we refuse to accept this anti-democratic, racist gerrymandering. Thank you for fighting for me, for the progressive movement, and for justice for our district. I’m so grateful to have you on this team. In solidarity, Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Why Won't You Fight with Me?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The Minnesota Speaker of the House just [alerted all House staff](https://www.action4liberty.com/house_speaker_hortman_implements_biden_mandate_for_house_staff_legislators_exempt?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=2) that they are going to implement Joe Biden's illegal and unconstitutional vaccine mandates at the Capitol. And Minneapolis and St Paul's lunatic mayors are both mulling over a vaccine passport program in their rundown cities.
## All this is happening - are you willing to fight back with me?!
Politicians would love for us to do nothing about it. They don't mind us complaining or even holding a meeting or two - as long as we don't get active. The number one thing they hate about Action 4 Liberty is the "Action" part of our name. They know we understand how to be effective in politics, and that scares the hell out of them. **So do you want to help STOP this madness???** Hands down, the most effective thing you can do to FIGHT BACk is attend your precinct caucus on February 1st. WATCH THIS VIDEO: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=3) All politicians pay attention to what happens at the precinct caucuses. It's the start of the political calendar for the year and its where the major political parties determine what they stand for and who represents them. If we don't show up to the precinct caucuses on February 1st, we leave the direction of the major political parties in the hands of the crony politicians and their lobbyist friends. But if we show up, our voice will be amplified and we can catapult the Stop Vaccine Mandate legislation to the top issue in Minnesota politics. **I need you to[WATCH THIS VIDEO](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=4) to learn what is needed of you. Please share with friends, family and neighbors who agree with us.** If we show up in force, we will quickly change the direction of politics in this state. Please FIGHT with me! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=5 "Caucus Info") [Caucus Info](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=5)
---
If **you would like to help more** , we need help funding our field operations. Our staff is making over 2,500 calls a day to protect your liberty.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to reach tens of thousands of more Minnesotans this week!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=6)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=why_won_t_you_fight_with_me&n=8).

clean_body: | | | | We've made tremendous progress, but are still short of our goal Dear Friend, Our most critical campaign fundraising deadline is TOMORROW. We've made tremendous progress, but are still $12,618 short of our goal. I'm running for governor to expand opportunities to every Marylander, fight to lower your taxes and give every child access to a world-class education, regardless of what neighborhood they happen to grow up in. | | | | | | | Our campaign is supported by thousands of Marylanders, just like you, across the state who want to keep moving our state in the right direction. But if we're going to win, we need to continue to spread our message across the state. Your support means the world to me. Together, we can and will win and make history! Thank You, | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. | I guess we're all on the same page now? Of course, I'm only joking. Fauci didn't really call for his own firing. But what he did say at this morning's Senate hearing is even wilder and crazier. Anthony Fauci accused me at the hearing of trying to kill him -- all because I had the audacity to criticize him for his lies! He said that posting #FireFauci on my website is the equivalent of trying to get him killed. That's insanity. I'm not trying to get Anthony Fauci killed. I'm trying to get him fired from his job, and forgotten by history. And that is what he is truly afraid of. Anthony Fauci craves power more than anyone I have seen in American political life in decades. He has an arrogance that is unmatched by even the most narcissistic and power-hungry politicians -- and there are PLENTY of those. He believes that his power should be unchecked, and his dictates unquestioned. And he believes that anyone who opposes him should be destroyed. Men like that are exactly who our Founding Fathers were trying to protect against when they wrote the Constitution. Anthony Fauci knows that if I win my upcoming election, his days in power are numbered. He knows that no one else has stood up to him like I have. And he is doing everything he can to take me out permanently. In fact, his allies in the Democratic Party have poured millions of dollars in special-interest money into my opponent's Senate campaign in the hopes of defeating me. I am not afraid of them. But in order to stand up against them, I need you to stand with me. If you and I stick together, we are stronger than they are. But your help is absolutely essential in fighting back against the forces of tyranny. [Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so that I can keep up the fight against Fauci?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ksj2zx_menhHbadz_OCifQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjwLQ9P0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdY9L95hBDfTBVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) Anthony Fauci's insane rant at this morning's hearing reeks of desperation. He knows the country is no longer listening to him. He knows that I have been proven right time and time again. But you should never underestimate the destructive power of a desperate man. Anthony Fauci is still capable of causing unimaginable chaos and suffering. And he will do whatever is necessary to hold onto power. If he takes me out, there will be nothing I can do to stop him. But if you and I stand together, he will surely fail. [Will you please contribute $100, $50, $25, or $10 today so that I can stop Fauci's worst schemes?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ksj2zx_menhHbadz_OCifQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjwLQ9P0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdY9L95hBDfTBVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) In Liberty, Rand Paul

name: Doyle Canning
subject: "That pipeline was seen as inevitable"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOYLE CANNING EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE **
body:
The odds were long, but you chose to take a stand with us and fight back - and we are forever grateful. We cannot tell you what a relief it is to know that this battle has been decisively won, and we no longer lose sleep that our ranch and beloved Hanes I | |
---
_Visiting with Larry Mangan at Lone Rock Ranch, where the Pacific Connector fracked gas pipeline was to be __built_ _ to Jordan Cove, in 2019._
---
Dear Doyle, When the Canadian Jordan Cove LNG company was trying to force, over our objections, a 36 inch fracked gas pipepline through our property, you personally visited us on our beloved ranch near Coos Bay. You showed up and read the eminent domain legal papers from Pembina, and thoughtfully listened to our concerns - and those of other land owners, of all political persuasions. You vowed to fight this multibillion dollar fossil fuel corporation that threatened our homes and the future of all Oregonians. You campaigned hard against the Jordan Cove project, exposing their political donations in Oregon, so much so that Congressman DeFazio was forced to finally come out publicly against this disastrous project. And then Senator Wyden followed. And then Governor Brown. And now the project is finally dead. **That pipeline was seen as inevitable.** The odds were long, but you chose to stand with us and fight back - and we are forever grateful. We cannot tell you what a relief it is to know that this battle has been decisively won, and we no longer lose sleep that our ranch and beloved Hanes Inlet will be destroyed. I know this is a big decision for you and your family, but we hope that you will run again for Oregon's Fourth Congressional District. We need a strong, responsible representative that is willing to fight against harmful projects like Jordan Cove, not career politicians that took cash from the company and openly supported it. We are with you, Doyle, and offer this modest contribution. It's not what companies like Jordan Cove have when they try to buy their way into Oregon's elections, but we hope it will make a difference. Thank you so much. Larry and Sylvia Mangan North Bend, Oregon

clean_body: The odds were long, but you chose to take a stand with us and fight back - and we are forever grateful. We cannot tell you what a relief it is to know that this battle has been decisively won, and we no longer lose sleep that our ranch and beloved Hanes I | | Visiting with Larry Mangan at Lone Rock Ranch, where the Pacific Connector fracked gas pipeline was to be built to Jordan Cove, in 2019. Dear Doyle, When the Canadian Jordan Cove LNG company was trying to force, over our objections, a 36 inch fracked gas pipepline through our property, you personally visited us on our beloved ranch near Coos Bay. You showed up and read the eminent domain legal papers from Pembina, and thoughtfully listened to our concerns - and those of other land owners, of all political persuasions. You vowed to fight this multibillion dollar fossil fuel corporation that threatened our homes and the future of all Oregonians. You campaigned hard against the Jordan Cove project, exposing their political donations in Oregon, so much so that Congressman DeFazio was forced to finally come out publicly against this disastrous project. And then Senator Wyden followed. And then Governor Brown. And now the project is finally dead. That pipeline was seen as inevitable. The odds were long, but you chose to stand with us and fight back - and we are forever grateful. We cannot tell you what a relief it is to know that this battle has been decisively won, and we no longer lose sleep that our ranch and beloved Hanes Inlet will be destroyed. I know this is a big decision for you and your family, but we hope that you will run again for Oregon's Fourth Congressional District. We need a strong, responsible representative that is willing to fight against harmful projects like Jordan Cove, not career politicians that took cash from the company and openly supported it. We are with you, Doyle, and offer this modest contribution. It's not what companies like Jordan Cove have when they try to buy their way into Oregon's elections, but we hope it will make a difference. Thank you so much. Larry and Sylvia Mangan North Bend, Oregon Thank you to Larry, Syliva, and the more than one hundred supporters who have already stepped up with a contribution Thanks to tens of thousands of Oregonians raising our voices together, the Pembina pipeline project is finally dead, after a 15 year battle with the fossil fuel industry. It was a truly David and Goliath fight that took guts, grit, and grassroots organizing. But together we beat back a 4.5 billion dollar corporation, and secured a future for the rural Oregon we love. The question is now...What's next? I have a vision for an Oregon powered by wind, wave, and solar energy, built with quality, union jobs that create an economy that will sustain our families, and our planet, for generations. It will take a grassroots movement to get it done, and Our average contribution for the exploratory committee is less than $100. Larry and Sylvia are right - it's not what fossil fuel corporations like Jordan Cove typically pay...But together we've already proved we can beat their big money, and win. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Please reach out to me by email, phone, or text and let me know that you are ready to support us if we decide to run. I want to hear from you: 541-357-1206 Wishing you good health and happiness in 2022, | | P.S. Contributions to Doyle Canning Exploratory Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. To contribute via check, please address to "Doyle Canning Exploratory Committee" P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 P.P.S. This COVID-19 Omicron Virus is moving fast in our community. name: Border Updates (via Tiffany Shedd)
subject: This is bad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Biden’s biggest failure of 2021 Friend, Biden is failing our country everyday, and one of his biggest consistent failures has been his refusal to secure our southern border. **Drug cartels, human traffickers, and criminals have taken advantage of Biden’s weakness to wreak havoc on our border communities.** The numbers speak for themselves:
* Border Patrol reported **more than 1.6 million encounters with illegal immigrants at our southern border in 2021** which is the highest annual total on record and more than FOUR TIMES the number we had under Trump’s watch in 2020.
* **Arizona had a more than 2300% increase of border encounters** compared with 2020.
* More than 1 million encounters involved **illegal immigrants from countries other than Mexico including a suspected terrorist from Saudi Arabia.**

Friend, **this is unacceptable and an INVASION**. We must not tolerate this: not in Arizona and not anywhere else. That’s why I’m taking a stand. ** ** I live on a major drug and human trafficking route and this has always been personal to me, dating back to the failed Obama-Biden days. While Joe Biden and his DC friends neglect their responsibility to secure our border, I don’t have the patience to sit idly by and watch the state I love get attacked by cartels and traffickers. ** ** This crisis affects border communities each and every day. As your Attorney General, **I will fight tooth and nail to ensure that our government takes this responsibility seriously.** ** ** **But I can’t do this alone. I need your help.** ** ** Our grassroots movement relies on patriots like you. I can’t personally be everywhere at once, but I know I have support all over Arizona from great patriots like you. That’s why I’m reaching out. **
We need your help spreading our conservative message to voters across Arizona.[Will you sign up today to go door-to-door or call like minded conservative voters?](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fc9b6d6294d34b40a3b509b9c93cd06d&_e=OJaK5mQamsfRFb-hiT709E99YtXqbZ-Dztw1AhOU86zCtoZXthkgJkdPLUDfv_JUTciCUkeri2d5CB3zZmJ33U13fr6_hoMd_5msQFmeA_ygyLFT1mtH-K4pFj_E_A3y7SJ2MzAuwHlKQLbpNHTi4GjNOHWqJgicyv6CJCcV-gaLR5nYukYZ1A8Mih1a5MTeDWfWlPVwEc3NknWDxqIcuvkOwJbH1NCiYvpFDseLiOdmN9L_CRTETk9ZkRxNdNrsoI9zbm-mEPKP0n0GR4YvwaDpY5KlAutT6h-u7lu_-3AZuKS1hp50GhciqXCH9wBUvuoCkN-P0oanIySmdefWx82ZEIAgc3Sg3e-xF0Jbi91V0CjNIjwLyoKpmk27hQPSmNI5Zn6lUsYs5_DgSE1C_-E-Ezf6N3MABK-z_huUPF8%3D)** [**JOIN TEAM SHEDD TODAY**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fc9b6d6294d34b40a3b509b9c93cd06d&_e=OJaK5mQamsfRFb-hiT709E99YtXqbZ-Dztw1AhOU86zCtoZXthkgJkdPLUDfv_JUTciCUkeri2d5CB3zZmJ33U13fr6_hoMd_5msQFmeA_ygyLFT1mtH-K4pFj_E_A3y7SJ2MzAuwHlKQLbpNHTi4GjNOHWqJgicyv6CJCcV-gaLR5nYukYZ1A8Mih1a5MTeDWfWlPVwEc3NknWDxqIcumJxtQXzX2kIttZmwsTXVFZAT5BATLh2oalbA4Qcd62vWzchquk0Xj6nzVtFuIfDv7BNt2HqygbDV8_wdGvpAEbYE6qynP52eeOZhQYGKaL0ce2MkWShtVs1ReEUB_auzD6cluRzkNrOk2Ept_BhLFtcxwpgub0gf3rUzwcNqKxjM4nqWQf-bcWbVXXkqEYtuYxSl6VlatNmrqeSci8OkXA%3D) I hope I can count on you to help me spread my message across Arizona. Thank you, Tiffany [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fc9b6d6294d34b40a3b509b9c93cd06d&_e=2MrIukMdOQGq09gjWQIJilBX5vXdmom7CzRhX5WqST5Z4Jc490kSY0cMvR-mrzB_YfD-Pl-poRNcxwoa2ZT-YrZS6CKMQeGthOgvauo_Bd0WFsNcW_LlxeyBaBRBPonPD1BHbL_TXYXiRsALAMNg4vc2tuDeT_2lpShWNbrwcwAIFEzz8fYRqCw2x1ADu3XbH9uhdwvGm7eSsz5YVGAv4uLT21Xo8MfSD6VLrbWY8q3PdWWfklNrj2nTyS879FkaGjE2laL_mWBcSSzbqsL1kxr8LRSM9t8LZoGpnMtuTM1P4oqHjhPvqPguaVU3Ylg3rNjPNbQPAJVRxyVGakW_9Gast1B62W9e7jlufb6BgGf2Hp2HhwrwzMfFY9H4RwYzYIi935rGdoF7Zxk7TmX0t6qnggj03namN__f2fIx0915RJb-o4Dv6vP_KI7Xytkewtse_-PHii7PTvxS-zPzsg%3D%3D) Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.

| | | [QUICKLY: Before our poll closes, will you tell us which Membership Card design is your favorite? >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3De~)
---

We are SO excited to introduce our BRAND NEW Membership Cards for our best grassroots supporters.

And we want to know which is your favorite!

Maybe you're part of Pelosi's Posse...

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs2~)

Or maybe you're on the Biden Bandwagon...

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)

Or maybe you love them both so much you can't decide!

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2spWdG-f_)

But no matter what, we want to know what you think.

**[So before our poll closes at midnight, will you tell us which new design is your favorite?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

---
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46232495&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MTE3OTQ5NAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46232495&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MTE3OTQ5NAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Friend,
I want to thank you for the INCREDIBLE response we have seen to my father's new book _[Our Journey Together!](http://tr.email.donjr.com/c/eJxdUMFOhDAQ_Zpyg7TTblkOHFSyHswmJqvReCGFlt1qCywUze7XOxA0xqRt0jfvvZl5OleKg8gimwMFoIzhFRlsEqgbquRWVEYykNuGCGq8si7RXfs-JHXno1POBVDJlKDCgEhT2qQZzaSS0jAuM84il59C6EfCbwjs8IhN1XUf4yyfAb6bgi-90XbyhBdLAwJyBsduGmqD4NPb4XwQ5x03cVu7Uvne2eaysmr8KntskbfOT-N-MKPVpg1lGCbfj-XcslSf6K0qZ36UXRuQg0J0jV-r_XUb9v7lHstl66zGwj_wZDUuUrDi-VHDJhpy3X9Z5-woUwznuIQzx7JOmJP0lgAsKoAlAfizCyvi41Wwh7kGd_iGS29-iatHsiYCJC2-AREihGQ)_ In just six weeks, we have sold over 200,000 copies of this beautiful picture book!
Now is your chance to get a copy of President Trump's book, but HURRY because we are sure that we will once again sell out!
Unfortunately, in Joe Biden's America, gas prices have gone up, shelves are half empty and printers are out of paper! We are working with some of the largest printers in America, and yet everyone is out of paper, thanks to Joe Biden's incompetence.
| [ ](http://tr.email.donjr.com/c/eJxdUE1PhDAQ_TXlBmmnpeweOKxL1kRjYrJ60AsptOxWW2Ch-PXrHQgaY9I26Zv33sw8nSvFQWwjmwMFoIzhFVtIE6gbquRGVEYykJuGCGq8si7RXfsyJHXno3MuG2TJLa8AaiZMRrWmvNpkjOsUjXXk8nMI_Uj4jsABj0irrnsdZ_kM8MMUfOmNtpMnvFgaEJAzOHbTUBsEH56Pl6O4HLiJ29qVyvfONp8rq8avsqcWeev8NO4HM1pt2lCGYfL9WM4tS_WG3qpy5kfZtQE5KETX-Gb_9LHTd8U1YLlsndVY-AeercZFClY83mtIoyHX_bt1zo4yw3BOSzhzLOuEOcmuCMCiAlgSgD-7sCI-fQl2O9dgj2_47M0vcfVI1kSAZMU3gJ-E5w)

I wish your family all the best during this upcoming year and remember, LETS GO BRANDON!
Donald Trump Jr

_Deadline: MIDNIGHT_
Team -- Joe Biden is moving fast to reverse YEARS of Trump-era sabotage of the U.S. Postal Service -- including by nominating TWO new members of the USPS Board of Governors!

This board has the power to finally hold Postmaster General Louis DeJoy accountable and REVERSE his disastrous mail slowdowns, post office closures, and more -- but Trump's appointees still have a two-seat majority on the board!

**If President Biden's new nominees are confirmed, they could help SAVE the USPS, so we need 50,000 Democrats to answer our Live Poll by MIDNIGHT to weigh in on the future of the USPS:**
**LIVE POLL:
Do you approve of President Biden's plan to save the Postal Service?** | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6023?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220111-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220111-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&akid=2542%2E9716520%2Ekbja8l)

body:

In his first, exclusive interview since leaving Congress and joining President Trump's new company, Devin Nunes just shared a MAJOR update about his new project with Trump. Every Conservative needs to hear this:
_" It is going to be a company open to all Americans... It is going to be the freest platform," Devin Nunes said. _
Devin Nunes was one of the FIRST to be shadow-banned from Twitter. President Trump was banned from Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, AND Snapchat. Now, they teamed up to make sure it doesn't happen to YOU.
**They're taking on Big Tech by launching their official app in just a few weeks from right now.**
They promised:

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8326%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=l9MZvRfkoa2fecBz27FLbQ&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11330%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I72DrLbcDqe%2fGGc3WkUSWQ&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11331%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pih2MzBCZ182NgFcLjvuzA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11330%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I72DrLbcDqe%2fGGc3WkUSWQ&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11332%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d0%2fE97L1k2QyuiomRZn3Dg&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11333%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ajl%2fS4p3Xf0tp5Ey7O3WRA&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9joFD4Z%2fk3cIPfpqHLkBYQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8326%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=l9MZvRfkoa2fecBz27FLbQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8326%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=l9MZvRfkoa2fecBz27FLbQ&sysid=1)

body:
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real

| Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media. | **Forced Vaccinations Threaten Your Freedom and Christianity**
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real target - banning Christianity _and the Bible._
"This is about control, not public health," he says.
The far left wants to control you, your kids, and your religion.
This famous _Jewish thinker reveals his latest warning._
**Read below.** ** _U_**** _rgent Message From David Horowitz_** Dear Reader, Remember: _The first thing they did_ during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues. They shut down churches as these same blue state COVID demagogues allowed mass and maskless protests after George Floyd. The closed down almost every business in America, _but kept open bars and abortion clinics._ Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: _forced vaccinations._ Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy - the virus is like any other flu.
_Mortality is almost zero._ But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . ._why?_ _Because this is all about control._ And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, _and no one wearing masks._ This was _just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi_ and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after _they had been vaccinated!_ If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! Make no mistake about it, the left's anti-Christian and anti-Semitic agenda is being ramped up dramatically . . . . . . _and it's frightening._ Think about it. The governor of California, Gavin Newsom, actually banned private home Bible studies, while OK'ing mass BLM protests and worse . . . This is a sickening violation of religious freedom. It's a threat to Christianity. And I am Jewish! Newsmax calls me one of the "most important conservative and Jewish thinkers in America." I have authored numerous _New York Times_ bestsellers. But my book **_Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_** is the most important. My book reveals the left's dangerous agenda against Christianity. When I began research for the book, I thought this war against Christians would be sometime in the future. Instead I found that Obama and others _had already started this war._ Now they are accelerating their **power grab to systematically dismantle religion and banish God** from the lips, minds, and hearts of the faithful . . . . . . remove His holy name from our civil society, even destroying religious symbols and artifacts along the way. _Think about this:_ The media was so proud of tens of thousands of BLM protesters last year who rampaged through our cities . . . And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under **critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good"** even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- _that's bad and evil!_ **Oh, but it gets worse . . .** Unable to attend worship services, people are becoming disconnected and distanced from their faith. But the Constitution provides you with a basic and unlimited freedom of religion. **This new war on Christianity, using COVID, demonstrates the Constitution doesn't matter, that you can't worship as a right, and you must follow orders made up by leftist officials.** Everything you need to know about what is happening is exposed inside _**_[Dark Agenda](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znr0ihsrlslpoue2cfv4m4qv0spe55a5o1plv5fg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)_**_[.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgt02bq5ejn0cgt7pv65dfl380ue9ska223uqn70_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs) I am deeply troubled by what I see . . . You may remember this:
* Bill Maher shouting "death to religion" on national TV . . .
* Monuments in Washington whitewashed of God and prayer . . .
* Religious crosses confiscated . . .
* Lenten ashes on children's foreheads being scrubbed off at school. . .
* Prayer in school being ruled unconstitutional overnight . . .

Whether you do or don't remember any of the above, please keep reading. This is serious stuff. Our faith and our ability to worship freely is in serious jeopardy. If you're a person of faith, this directly impacts you, your family, friends, and loved ones -- and it's terrifying. Every day the writing on the wall becomes clearer. Listen . . . Hatred is growing in our nation toward Jews and Christians -- being spread like wildfire. Why? What is behind this evil movement? Everything you need to know is laid out in my runaway bestselling book, _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcrfk4cu495ncu7fntktt0sa2grppfqcoo7qed68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)_. _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh0743o35r20rqvtr7ga97qe90pm24bk9v3p7hjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)_ has rocked the media and political world. **Tucker Carlson** said he couldn't put the book down. Tucker said you must "read this disturbing but vital book." **Mike Huckabee** has urged every Christian to get and read this book. Gov. Huckabee said this book was the best one he had ever read defending Christians -- and it was written by a Jew!

And **Glenn Beck** reports __[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8erg9c6ppv70t59lq78f8ggk9c5bkubn4mbfq90_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)__ reveals a "dangerous" situation we all face. I uncovered the roots of this hateful, deadly movement and put it all in my new book, _[**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrpdqhh2lcq4utb6gvfdqc3pti9eduremlt6th6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)_[.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkq7h2834mvofqmmbu8smfq7k09ebh4g7uc7lah0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs) Look, there's no other way to say this . . . **If you're a Christian or Jew or a faithful follower of God, you must read this book.** Folks, this is religious intolerance fueled by the left for 60 years -- a deep-seated animosity inciting vicious hate crimes and gaining momentum fast. Just look at this: _A headline that recently appeared on CBS News:_ **"U.S. 'moving into a dangerous phase' as anti-Semitic incidents surge."** Everyone must WAKE UP, which is why Newsmax is **_[giving you _Dark Agenda_ for FREE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb4dgs8dauk86krpc3ar7r913skplob1rknp9u50_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)_**[!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv0vmk149pu5i5oqe4n9tacoo36r7nn6uptfaqc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs) This is all part of the plan set in motion decades ago to rid God from public life. In fact . . . After a nearly 15-year drop, the Anti-Defamation League found acts of anti-Semitism started spiking in 2016.
What's worse, the most recent numbers show the highest number of anti-Semitic incidents in its recorded history. There were over 2,100 acts of violence -- assaults, vandalism, and harassment -- against Jews. Please, for all these reasons and atrocities being committed, I urge you now more than ever . . . [**Read this book**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq2q9pph5ajp6pv510q8m0o5hvbp368udpj9sii0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs). Remember, [**it's a FREE Offer, compliments of Newsmax.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5m6obm7m3a2qajhr5kslrlqerpvc0bbdot61e3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs) Newsmax is completely wiping out the retail price of $26.99 for you -- it's THAT critical to get this book in your hands. **We must protect Christianity and Judaism before it's too late -- and save our most basic freedom of religion.** In _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg0ircmft2dr0dlca1n8hskm2eih181jhujaf7hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)_ , you'll discover the plan that was set in place decades ago . . . and the series of events that have unfolded, allowing the plan to take hold. I name names -- Obama, Hillary, and the big media pushing this secular agenda. There are new ones now: **Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Andrew Cuomo** , and more. **They want a Godless society**. They're totally cool if thousands want to riot in protest against President Trump, breaking all COVID-19 rules.
But if you want to go to church or synagogue -- with social distancing -- they want you arrested! You'll discover who was responsible . . . how the Supreme Court failed Christian America . . . why school administrators are brainwashing our kids . . . and the names of those carrying out the plan in Washington today. When you're done reading _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zulsf8gqu4us2pqnq59p0tnko00n8vih5u5lrg88_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)_ , you'll understand the deep divide in America. This is critical as we roll through the post-election year. **President Trump has been at the very epicenter** of this battle between the forces of good and evil right here in America. And President Trump, out of office, _will actually be a bigger threat -- and a bigger target -- for the far left._ We must fight back, or our children and generations to come will live in fear of expressing their faith. Yours for Freedom, **_D_**** _avid Horowitz_** P.S. Hurry! Shortly before he died, Rush Limbaugh talked about _**Dark Agenda.**_ He said the future of America depended on this battle between the forces of good and evil. You need to [**Claim your FREE BOOK**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7fp56ms336cocsvfkqmhp448khpeo0nj2u1rno0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs) before Newsmax runs out of copies. Remember, Newsmax is giving you _**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**_ [**absolutely FREE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zncaetem52nnsg4t8mfs7o557f5958d27s5i18f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)**.** **You can't get this $26.99 book for FREE anywhere else except from Newsmax -- or a friend willing to give you their copy! **[**Click here.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8p7ulrl050gu6sam82p3065fd0n672ags0hko28_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5c5h2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk1gj2ano1lahidc6k4a2jmvin3uf94rtkuad40g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zndlq6rg7fmtoruei1l21tn18qgm3cjipvpntrmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zplm5962ahn67ghpiifng31e6h01jv9gpmto7qvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj5clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Please join me in opposing vaccine mandates.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
First responders have our back, it's important for us to support them too.
| | | |
---
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qj8qHbdvsGVxP4DYEYVX8hGV4oQjLF5vVH6v7uwnAP5z_oSeVXyhSKkFMQEyHOkYtcEfc-f0unb5ae9iJCXQhgysw4YZGkmnirHd-QUE1vQc5y3XCvMl5fls-i1_j2hlB0JcbacudfqjpltmNYATaA==&c=2Rk1dL1M0zVBs5_hZSb3PB3yxHtju3eqgJZm4ClAIIEfQX7dD1dRTQ==&ch=EKg7TFK98lmLCB4OvUjBp-kHel_v9VFtqqQPsg01lNiLzXkvLb0PAw==)
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
This past Sunday, our nation recognized National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day. It's always important for us to honor the selfless work first responders do every day to keep us safe, and to thank them for their dedication.
Unfortunately, first responders aren't getting the help and support they need. In particular, alongside calls to defund the police, police officers, firefighters, and EMT's across our state are under threat of losing their jobs due to vaccine mandates. This is currently an issue specifically in Boston, where a vaccine mandate is due to take effect later this week.
I am proud to stand with Boston First Responders United and others as they fight against vaccine mandates. I am not opposed to vaccines, but I strongly oppose vaccine mandates as a condition of employment.
Public servants across our state are losing their jobs because they're unwilling to submit to medical treatment they don't want, and that's just wrong. It disrespects peoples' liberty, it's an abuse of power by the government, and it should not be happening.
I'm proud to always #BackTheBlue. I hope you'll join me in supporting our law enforcement officers and all other first responders. They have our back every day; let's pledge to have their back when they need us, too.
Thanks, as always, for your support.
Sincerely,
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor
---
---
---
---
|
---
---
I'm working hard every day to be your next Governor. We need someone to stand up for individual rights and liberties, and I pledge to do that. But, in order to get there, I need your help.
Will you please help our campaign? Please consider making a donation today:
---
---
| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qj8qHbdvsGVxP4DYEYVX8hGV4oQjLF5vVH6v7uwnAP5z_oSeVXyhSAul3f_NJulZlXUIpKe2r3bKjfZ4Im2jLo8LYBi5zVn5b6FaBCxGlviorGBm_uNH0dMIcuREqgDBmJJ9-jBduPoaoOFW01iId2ILyOJ7L5Qr1z26kJ5AtuMB8zbXHrmL3Q==&c=2Rk1dL1M0zVBs5_hZSb3PB3yxHtju3eqgJZm4ClAIIEfQX7dD1dRTQ==&ch=EKg7TFK98lmLCB4OvUjBp-kHel_v9VFtqqQPsg01lNiLzXkvLb0PAw==)
---
---
Thanks, as always, for your support!
---
|
---

Send a check made payable to "Diehl for Massachusetts," to 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606. body:

| | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Finance.**Your Retirement Savings Could Be in Jeopardy!** **The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish line. Keep reading to see how you can protect yourself.** Dear Friend, If you or any of your loved ones are planning to retire in the next couple of years, please pay close attention. The government has changed the rules on you, midgame. One wrong move now could trigger a 50% tax on your retirement accounts. Which is why _Barron's_ called this rule change "the most sweeping retirement legislations in more than a decade." And _Forbes_ simply called it a "ticking time bomb." Millions of Americans are unprepared for what's about to come. That's why Newsmax has teamed up with some of the nation's top IRA experts to put together a FREE special report, **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu65ag4rrk5o5ia1lvt5226rv5hnfj6fotpoupko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjge1o71cph2bs)The 50% tax is just the beginning of all the sneaky traps that Congress has laid out for you in this new legislation. [**Click here to claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk14e8p72ta9rerddrkmrkv92dknophk92a5majg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjge1o71cph2bs) _._ Inside this brand-new special report, you'll discover: ✔ **"Uh oh... we owe the IRS now..."** Your beneficiaries might be saying this, if you don't read the fine print on your retirement account. But you can protect them from headache and hassle by including this one word... on this one form. Page 27. ✔ **The 20% tax trap.** 1 in 2 Americans make a simple money transfer move every year. But now, this same move could give you a surprise tax bill. But you can avoid this altogether with the simple "triple t" strategy. It's easy to do and it won't sound alarms at the IRS. Page 22. ✔ **WARNING: What never to do with your IRA.** This honest mistake among family members can make every dime taxable and become the kiss of death for your retirement account. See how you can avoid it. Page 27. ✔ **The sneaky IRS move that could cost you dearly.** Did you know that proposed IRS rules - years away from becoming official - could impact your taxes THIS YEAR? It's true. But you can navigate this gray area easily and avoid big surprises. Page 15. ✔ **The simple dispute that can cost you $5,000 to $10,000 or more... plus a year of your valuable time!** Read this warning before you decide to dispute anything with the IRS. Or even ask them for clarification on issues. Page 30. Everything is spelled out in detail in **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfo7lvduuruenqhpem2sbb96ns8k2gvf2cob9iv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjge1o71cph2bs)With your retirement savings at stake, this is the most important briefing you'll read in your lifetime. The stakes are higher than ever. A 50% tax could cut your savings in half. But it's 100% avoidable. This new special report from Newsmax Finance has the solution. [**Claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7dm0edtk4efgmeunu82787t3ivo2hkpf3irf0f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjge1o71cph2bs). Sincerely, Newsmax Finance
