name: Sean Themea
subject: 5 reasons not to give up on America
body:
Sometimes fighting for liberty, the future of our Republic, and the America-First movement feels like a losing battle.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbgjh6af9lshd92o35dnnin7raiqmunrctjkdlio_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2umqn8ollmpgrcc9hclp7fdj56cp71cr2c1ijeddkc1q74pdmmdo7fc70c2rr2dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcipm9ptnclj39p5jc3jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1chie1pb2chi649fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidefkqijjtakrf0n3dvinf04tq3p3mf3a3b2vp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj4chh2bs)
Friend,

Sometimes fighting for liberty, the future of our Republic, and the America-First movement feels like a losing battle.

Critical Race Theory, inflation, Biden's trillion-dollar spending bills, government overreach, Big Tech censorship... There are a lot of reasons to give up. However, I simply REFUSE to back down and let Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. (YAL) yield to tyranny.

**I am sending you an email to tell you the TOP 5 reasons why you should NOT give up on America or our fight for liberty.**

Here is everything Young Americans for Liberty, the largest and most effective pro-liberty student organization in the country, is doing to Make Liberty WIN!
1. **Operation Win at the Door (OWD):** Young Americans for Liberty is on a mission to build a bench of and elect 250 liberty candidates to state legislatures across the country by the end of 2022! So far, we have a team of 173 hardcore liberty legislators located in nearly all 50 states, including Texas, Florida, New Hampshire, Virginia, Kentucky, and Missouri.

Our student activists knock on thousands of doors, mobilize voters, and help educate them about the most hardcore pro-liberty candidates.

These liberty legislators are stopping tax hikes, cutting spending, enacting criminal justice reform, restoring election integrity, and fighting for YOU and liberty in your home state. [**You can support YAL 's mission to elect 250 liberty candidates by donating ANY amount by clicking here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0f59bgm1cfk9shah2v3b1vp34h2b6k3jvgj16a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj4chh2bs)

2. **Constitutional Carry:** YAL played a key role in helping to pass Constitutional Carry in the state of Texas in 2021!

In Texas, a Constitutional Carry bill was proposed every legislative session but was always "sent to committee to die." In 2021, YAL mobilized our student activists and legislators to pressure the House and Senate to pass the bill. Now, Texas is a Constitutional Carry state. [**Help YAL achieve more of these victories by donating ANY amount today >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbhbbkt5e45nco4rho41o1eru9nb54i0a830dn2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj4chh2bs)

3. **Winning the Battle for Free Speech:** It's no secret the government, Big Tech, and cancel culture want to CENSOR free speech and stop pro-liberty voices from being heard. Our army of student activists is fighting back! To date, YAL-led efforts have resulted in **77** unconstitutional "free speech" codes being repealed on college and university campuses.

Because of Young Americans for Liberty, millions of otherwise silenced students have a voice on college campuses again. [**You can help YAL fight for free speech by donating ANY amount here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6lq1ul0rr3k8hl4t9v9n9vipfu2q16uagd1v4u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj4chh2bs)

4. **Recruiting THOUSANDS of young people to liberty:** YAL is growing the ranks of young people who believe in the ideas of liberty, the principles of our Founding Fathers, and are willing to stand up and fight!

YAL student activists are recruiting thousands of young people on college campuses across the country. The movement is strong and the students are engaged. Many students join YAL after speaking with a student activist and hearing our message of liberty and limited government. In fact, YAL signed up over **119,000 NEW students in 2021 alone!**

[**You can help YAL recruit more students on college campuses by donating ANY amount here >>>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi1c34kn220npr9da13lpk6ive4uafq59lo07tto_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj4chh2bs)

5. **School Choice:** The School Choice movement across the country is growing rapidly! YAL student activists and liberty legislators passed one of the strongest School Choice bills in the country in the state of Missouri.

Instead of forcing Critical Race Theory down children's throats, parents have an opportunity to find alternatives and help their children get the best education possible.

As you can see, there is A LOT to be optimistic about. _Young Americans for Liberty is winning big battles for liberty with our proven formula_ :
* Recruit thousands of college students by educating them about the principles of liberty
* Train these students to communicate, persuade, and win elections
* Mobilize student activists to knock on doors in support of liberty candidates
* Our liberty legislators pass legislation to advance freedom

[**This year, YAL 's Operation Win at the Door goal is to endorse at least 150 hardcore liberty candidates in 2022. I am trying to raise $50,000 from online supporters and am counting on your help. Please join Young Americans for Liberty by donating ANY Amount below:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjmgubgidkoahdeo68cambgohup3vor0fab1710_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjgeaoj4chh2bs)

Constitutional Carry: YAL played a key role in helping to pass Constitutional Carry in the state of Texas in 2021! In Texas, a Constitutional Carry bill was proposed every legislative session but was always "sent to committee to die." In 2021, YAL mobilized our student activists and legislators to pressure the House and Senate to pass the bill. Now, Texas is a Constitutional Carry state. 3. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuq3d53r2jfginc8a963r5cfi6ad5doiu4tl5cao_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf5dr3eeqm3djje8or0sj5cdgmcor4msr75djl6jjmaplkc1q34dhmehj71dhkc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcclkmko6fcjjcoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm8p74s1hmcp324no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0snl76r5mpa41m635duu3sk01vdklmndf5igmeg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6chh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3027htv6lrorj68ogj9967n712mta28h1acb8s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6chh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9relrue4gdqc769i4gu82434vnr6cctgfhmnbt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6chh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeg44gdvrl22gpi9c15njk96dgld2qtkp0c3ile8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6chh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpdf23g4bmi1ejd894obttlj8sfs6hsiieprrki8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6chh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhiftn69l78g0ib5rgtaafjbf0mo15aralgou2ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6chh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: This is hard to say.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfg79igcv8cf4np3f14rd6iefb4haj5rgj7515s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6cdh2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7hcg378dghuf2dtscu9rs67k56pg6kt1jgk8qvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie0or6cdh2bs)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: URGENT: Deadline at 11:59 AM
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I’m reaching out this morning to let you know that we’re in the final hours of our fundraising push ahead of our blackout period. To those who have donated in the past several days, I’d like to thank you from the bottom of my heart. If you haven’t yet made a contribution, but have signed one of our petitions, taken one of our surveys, or engaged with our social media content, I am asking for your support in these last critical hours.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=20.22]There’s not much time left -- at 12:00 PM today, we can no longer accept donations once the General Assembly gavels into Session, so we’re looking for one final push to help us meet our goal of $7,500 this morning.
RUSH $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=10] RUSH $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=20.22] RUSH $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=50] RUSH $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=100] RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222]Because of supporters like you, our people-powered movement is in a formidable position as we enter the fundraising blackout period. A recent poll has shown that I’m leading the Democratic field in both name recognition and as the number one choice for Governor, and I’ve already been endorsed by over 100 current and former elected officials from all across the state.
We are closer to the finish line than any other candidate in this race. But in order to stay ahead, I am relying on your support to make this final fundraising push count. From hiring more field organizers, to printing more literature and yard signs, to running more digital ads and creating more Team Franchot T-shirts, the donations we receive in these final hours will greatly determine our ability to scale-up our statewide operation in the critical months ahead.
The future of Maryland is at stake, and we can’t leave anything up to chance. If you are able, I am urging you to chip in whatever you can. Any amount, whether large or small, will make a critical difference in the fight to secure a brighter and stronger future for our communities.
Click here to rush a donation to help us meet our final fundraising goal of $7,500 by today’s 11:59 AM deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finaldeadline_011222?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648

clean_body: [ Peter, I’m reaching out this morning to let you know that we’re in the final hours of our fundraising push ahead of our blackout period. To those who have donated in the past several days, I’d like to thank you from the bottom of my heart. If you haven’t yet made a contribution, but have signed one of our petitions, taken one of our surveys, or engaged with our social media content, I am asking for your support in these last critical hours. [’s not much time left -- at 12:00 PM today, we can no longer accept donations once the General Assembly gavels into Session, so we’re looking for one final push to help us meet our goal of $7,500 this morning. RUSH $10 [] RUSH $20.22 [] RUSH $50 [] RUSH $100 [] RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT [ of supporters like you, our people-powered movement is in a formidable position as we enter the fundraising blackout period. A recent poll has shown that I’m leading the Democratic field in both name recognition and as the number one choice for Governor, and I’ve already been endorsed by over 100 current and former elected officials from all across the state. We are closer to the finish line than any other candidate in this race. But in order to stay ahead, I am relying on your support to make this final fundraising push count. From hiring more field organizers, to printing more literature and yard signs, to running more digital ads and creating more Team Franchot T-shirts, the donations we receive in these final hours will greatly determine our ability to scale-up our statewide operation in the critical months ahead. The future of Maryland is at stake, and we can’t leave anything up to chance. If you are able, I am urging you to chip in whatever you can. Any amount, whether large or small, will make a critical difference in the fight to secure a brighter and stronger future for our communities. Click here to rush a donation to help us meet our final fundraising goal of $7,500 by today’s 11:59 AM deadline. Peter, this morning I woke up to some troubling news from John’s finance team: as of 9 AM, we are still $6,789 short of our fundraising goal... and the filing deadline is tonight at 11:59 PM.

[_**Can you pitch in right now to help us catch up and reach our goal in time?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40596192/325068798/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220112-1a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4039919f-a973-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDM5OTE5Zi1hOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kC307weJygHelohgPevfsxcRH1nXVxvS56pHphfZUx0=)

I’m new to campaigns, which is why I spoke with his finance team to see why we need to secure all of these funds by the deadline, and I wanted to share with you what they told me:
1. This is the first and most important filing deadline that will be completely public for every campaign in this race, so everyone – from reporters to our opponents – will know how much financial support we have
2. Every dollar is needed to run this campaign — whether it’s for placing ads, hiring staff, getting campaign supplies, transportation, or anything else election related – every bit makes a difference in building this movement from the ground up

There you have it, Peter — the deadline is public and campaigns cost a whole lot to run!

Since we still need to bring in more funds before the clock runs out tonight, [_**can you take a moment to pitch in right now to help?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40596193/325068800/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220112-1a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4039919f-a973-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDM5OTE5Zi1hOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kC307weJygHelohgPevfsxcRH1nXVxvS56pHphfZUx0=)

clean_body: I want to make sure this campaign has the resources to reach this goal and show up strong for this deadline. | = Peter, this morning I woke up to some troubling news from John’s finance team: as of 9 AM, we are still $6,789 short of our fundraising goal... and the filing deadline is tonight at 11:59 PM. = I’m new to campaigns, which is why I spoke with his finance team to see why we need to secure all of these funds by the deadline, and I wanted to share with you what they told me: 1. This is the first and most important filing deadline that will be completely public for every campaign in this race, so everyone – from reporters to our opponents – will know how much financial support we have 2. Every dollar is needed to run this campaign — whether it’s for placing ads, hiring staff, getting campaign supplies, transportation, or anything else election related – every bit makes a difference in building this movement from the ground up There you have it, Peter — the deadline is public and campaigns cost a whole lot to run! Since we still need to bring in more funds before the clock runs out tonight, = | = I am incredibly proud of my husband and the campaign he is running, and I want to make sure this campaign has the resources to reach this goal and show up strong for this deadline. = Thank you for your support, Melissa King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . 63 years ago today in 1959, Senator Chuck Grassley began his career as a politician when he was sworn into the Iowa House of Representatives:
> Dwight D. Eisenhower was president.
> The federal minimum wage was $1.00.
> A gallon of milk cost $0.25.
> A post stamp was $0.04.
> And Iowans who cast their first vote for Grassley are now at least 85-years-old.
**Times certainly have changed since 1959. And so has Chuck Grassley.** During his 63-year-long political career, Chuck Grassley has taken millions from the NRA, Big Pharma, and special interests. He orchestrated the unprecedented blocking of a Supreme Court nomination for 293 days. And he’s falsely perpetuated the Big Lie rather than stand up for the truth and be a voice of reason.
Iowa deserves better. **That’s why Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley to end his political career once and for all and turn Iowa blue.**
The early polls show a tight race, but Mitch McConnell is already raising millions into Super PACs to attack Mike and flip the Senate red. The only way to fight back and defeat Chuck Grassley is with help from grassroots donors like you now.
**We’re facing our first mid-month deadline of the year in a few days, and we’re still dangerously short of our $100,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**

name: Victoria Virasingh

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
One of the highlights of running for Congress is getting the opportunity to meet so many people and learning from them along the way. Supporters like you have been such an inspiration, and I want to use my platform to share your stories. In a series called “Faces of the 8th” I hope you will be inspired by the rich culture of this district and see why I am proud to call Virginia’s 8th “home.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/f8th?refcode=isabel]
The first face of the 8th is my mom, Isabel. I picked her as the first face of the 8th because she represents immigrant mothers and working class women in our district. Many of you have heard me tell her story because her narrative plays a huge role in my life and the reason why I am running for Congress. But I am not doing it justice.
I hope you will take a few minutes to watch her tell her story in her own words. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/f8th?refcode=isabel] I am excited to have the privilege of using this small platform for people to share their stories, and I hope you become just as inspired as I have.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/f8th?refcode=isabel [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/f8th?refcode=isabel]
These are the stories that need to be shared because they truly represent our district, and I want to represent you in Congress. Will you make a contribution today and help me represent the people of the 8th? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/f8th?refcode=isabel]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/f8th?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=isabel_10] $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/f8th?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=isabel_25]

Your support means everything. Thank you!
Victoria

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Forsyth County Clerk of Court endorses Jake
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | For immediate release January 12th, 2022 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Forsyth County Clerk of Court endorses Jake
Forsyth County Clerk of Court Greg Allen has endorsed Jake Evans for the Sixth Congressional District.
"I'm supporting Jake because he's committed to upholding the principles of our Constitution," Allen said. "He believes courts should follow the law as written and interpret our Constitution according to its original intent, and I'm supporting Jake because I know he's unwavering on those principles."
"I am very blessed to have Greg's support in this race," Jake said. "Forsyth County will have a huge voice in this election, and this endorsement shows the growing support we have in Forsyth County."
---

body:
Peter, the American people have a right to know what worked and what didn't work during the 2020 general election, but the socialist Democrats...
| [ ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/VVHXfm96Ht1KW5y1n5Q88nth5W3cF4jk4Dcy-lN4313HX3lLBmV1-WJV7CgM07W1xl15v3tFvmdW4Kf5yv50k0pRVGmt0G7g3gZYW8hMVqy7NJF3yW94PT4b7TKCYxW5LnfKv4x-3dlW6ZRXCc2M_NQkW8dJfx51MMzfYW6bykcV6rbW-_W4l_d005qyl8zVPNKDG8-_3sgW37NjW76TCLfXN6DPMJ81dNkWW5nn7g-4Cd8KbW6Yj-N372PhmQW5lbl088qxbxzW3cPrSy7hX-npVQpzCN7t8sGnW8hFnY-491TMxW47cdMG10XTgWW5XQY2432_ZJyW3jgy7369HjQH3cQp1)

Peter, The people of Michigan are tired of RINO Fred Upton's bogus excuses... Election integrity is one of the most important issues we face as we enter the 2022 midterm elections. Many Americans have lost faith in the process, and the political establishment doesn't seem interested in restoring it anytime soon... I introduced HB 5091 to create a bipartisan audit board to review the 2020 election and identify corrective actions to improve our state's election processes. Today, I am officially doubling down and demanding that corrupt Fred Upton publicly announces his support for my forensic election audit bill in the Michigan legislature. My opponent refuses to take action... Instead, he voted to impeach the greatest President of my lifetime. As a Donald J. Trump-endorsed, conservative fighter, I will take my fight to Washington, DC to secure and protect conservative voices in future elections. We do this by auditing the 2020 election and exposing what went wrong. [If you support a complete and total forensic audit of the 2020 election, make an URGENT donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount today by clicking here >>>](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/VVHXfm96Ht1KW5y1n5Q88nth5W3cF4jk4Dcy-lN4313HX3lLBmV1-WJV7CgDmxW4sQS9h1nSdR9N3NG2py8Nd1PW2bNBY72jRGhjW8ZdLDS3hRrdjW2jCZm37dXzlGW3q8tx13Td4KzW2rgqm43jZQYZW3qH3yj7ZV0ghW84XbTZ8yc44tW2QhXL76XzL03W7m6pql2xBM20VLmyCC9ksHy3W3CGSz465KQvJW6yn_6336VHyyW8_zRtf4s5HVkW35kLvJ1zpYk4N1p5MWjXdMG3W3Vt3R32SHMSWVBF_7632g0hZW7DNK-H718_CMV38hjD4lnrHQW1MNJH946-TlB3l811) Michigan needs leaders in Congress who will represent their best interests. RINO Fred Upton has proved time and time again that he is only interested in promoting the narrative of the corrupt political establishment... I will fight for the right of every American to be heard and accounted for in our electoral process. It's time to take action.
---
---
Steve Carra
Michigan Candidate for Congress

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Censored
body:
If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0lmaupm27j5nu73f04kb8h25upudrh71acl15h0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq74clmmlqjas3gsqqe9ppmecobcpr3e1jracjgseq6ddlie1ob5dtj6eqb1dpgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j35d5l6djrcob66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5i69p73c1i62oh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt8rfg0j6q1pm3tqr5fensfkst57dhm01t0tqpg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie6o34c5h2bs) | |
---
Friend,

If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them.

But if you’re familiar with our work, you may have noticed that our posts aren't showing up in your Facebook newsfeed anymore.

**That's because Facebook is suppressing our content.**

Take a look at this chart showing engagement with our posts over the past year:
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjfthgh501tioqfumi34qcg622smhn5a0hi3td6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie6o34c5h2bs)
Despite our growing audience—we have many more followers now than we did a year ago—we're seeing a drastic, steady decline in reach and engagement. It used to be that 80% of our site's traffic came from Facebook. Now, it's down to just 30%. Babylon Bee articles posted to Facebook used to go viral, generating hundreds of thousands of shares. But that just doesn't happen anymore. Facebook doesn't allow it.

In some cases, our posts aren't merely limited in reach — they're completely suppressed. Here's an example of a recent post that Facebook prevented from being seen by anyone:
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqjp0i2sbbpi6p1gvrfhiq0vv73plfm32fr6t43g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie6o34c5h2bs)
We'd have reached more people if we'd printed the article and posted it on a single telephone pole in a small town.

Facebook has assigned a representative to our account. He's supposed to communicate with us and help us resolve problems. But when we ask him directly if Facebook is limiting our page's reach, or suppressing shares of our articles, he refuses to answer me. He literally doesn't respond. He'll respond to other questions, but not that one.

The silence speaks volumes.

So what can be done about this? For now, there's not much that can be done. Facebook is a private company. While they shouldn't be allowed to engage in politically motivated viewpoint discrimination and still enjoy the benefits of Section 230 immunity, there's nothing under the law that currently prevents them from doing just that. This needs to change.

But in the meantime, all we can do is ask for direct support from free-thinking friends like you.

[**As someone who values free speech, I’m asking you to consider becoming a subscriber to the Babylon Bee today. By becoming a subscriber, you reduce our dependence on Big Tech and ensure we'll continue to have a presence and a platform, whether Facebook likes it or not.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdkvnia5jg9t4anb896mja4tp2p1al4n4sj6q630_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie6o34c5h2bs)
[**Subscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf5rcnetqfa8t5gsqo1sraqa2bbq954h7fbduir8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cjie6o34c5h2bs)
Plus, if you become a premium subscriber, you’ll get a beautiful coffee table book chock-full of our greatest articles, preserved for posterity. Let’s see Facebook try to censor that!

Thank you for standing with us against the tyranny of Big Tech. We don't need Facebook if we've got you in our corner.

Seth Dillon
CEO
|
---

Jupiter, FL 33468

name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: This gives me purpose, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
It's about the people we can save
| | |
---
Friend, I am all too familiar with the cowardice of Marco Rubio. Just one week after my daughter Jaime was murdered at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to make it more difficult for people to access assault rifles – weapons of war – like the one that killed my Jaime. He has continued since the Parkland shooting to politicize any efforts to reduce gun violence. I will do anything I can to ensure Marco Rubio is no longer in the Senate, because we need an advocate like Val Demings, whose strength and integrity is exactly what Florida needs, to replace him. **[Will you join me in supporting Val Demings by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40598987/325076682/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTA2ZDE5Yy1iMDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ax2Wsos4c9tE2iT0URvrQxRDP26zYBF0qhs1fzT7uw=) **
Each and every day during her service in Congress – especially after the mass shootings in Parkland and at Pulse nightclub in her Orlando-based district – Val Demings has been one of the strongest fighters for gun safety reform.
I'm reaching out asking you for dollars to meet this goal, but it's about the people we can save. It's about creating a gun safety majority in the Senate that will enact the urgent change our country needs – change to prevent families like mine from going through any more senseless tragedy. But incompetent Marco Rubio is backed by the nearly $30 million campaign war chest of the Senate Republicans. In fact, NRA-loving Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to defend Rubio.
Val Demings can only win with the grassroots support of people like you and me, which is why I'm personally reaching out. I told the congresswoman I'd help raise $20,000 today for her Senate race – a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control. **[So please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more to help Val Demings win in Florida and make real progress on gun safety? Every dollar you give will build up grassroots resources that Congresswoman Demings needs to compete against massive amounts of GOP money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40598988/325076683/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2112-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTA2ZDE5Yy1iMDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ax2Wsos4c9tE2iT0URvrQxRDP26zYBF0qhs1fzT7uw=)**
I can never get my Jaime back, but helping changemakers like Val Demings – a leader who has passed lifesaving gun safety legislation – gives me the purpose I've needed since her murder. Thank you for doing your part to help.
Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's dad

Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. subject: Why I stand out
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40599601/325079246/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTQwNDIwNC1iMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ySEtc3VhjBhHouR2tmVlnOBU7l_oVIwZ2yk_RH-NQjs=)

| | Peter, I’m running for Governor of Maryland alongside _nine_ men vying for the job. You may be wondering how I stand out. **[But, before I get into that, will you rush a donation to my campaign? I need 200 more folks to become Founding Donors by midnight tonight in order to post a strong first public fundraising report.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40599602/325079247/-1938532744?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220112_FR_Launch3_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTQwNDIwNC1iMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ySEtc3VhjBhHouR2tmVlnOBU7l_oVIwZ2yk_RH-NQjs=)** | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40599603/325079248/-1938532744?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220112_FR_Launch3_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTQwNDIwNC1iMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ySEtc3VhjBhHouR2tmVlnOBU7l_oVIwZ2yk_RH-NQjs=)

Besides being the only Democratic woman running for Governor, I stand out in this crowded primary field because I am the only candidate with a clear record of success in business and economic development.
As an entrepreneur, I turned around struggling companies. I worked in economic development to bring jobs to the state and keep companies growing, and I served as a county executive for one of the largest counties in Maryland.
None of my opponents can point to a proven economic record like mine – and I know that my record, in addition to my story of creating my own success and my own path when the odds were stacked against me, will resonate with Maryland voters.

clean_body: | = | | Peter, I’m running for Governor of Maryland alongside nine men vying for the job. You may be wondering how I stand out. = | | | = Besides being the only Democratic woman running for Governor, I stand out in this crowded primary field because I am the only candidate with a clear record of success in business and economic development. As an entrepreneur, I turned around struggling companies. I worked in economic development to bring jobs to the state and keep companies growing, and I served as a county executive for one of the largest counties in Maryland. None of my opponents can point to a proven economic record like mine – and I know that my record, in addition to my story of creating my own success and my own path when the odds were stacked against me, will resonate with Maryland voters. name: Doug Jones
subject: My friend, Tom
body:
21,311 votes made the difference in my race against Roy Moore in Alabama, so trust me when I say: I know a tough fight when I see one. And Tom Perez is in a tough fight for Maryland Governor.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40600587/325082148/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220112-Filing-Deadline-6-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWYzY2YxYS1iNDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xaBVLQ8woD_uAoPV5o0f2Gebvia07NtoL_N9JqAmlc=)
Team,

21,311 votes made the difference in my race against Roy Moore in Alabama, so trust me when I say: I know a tough fight when I see one. **And Tom Perez is in a tough fight for Maryland Governor.**

Here's the deal: Tom is locked in a crowded primary in a **“toss up”** race that's forecasted to be one of the most expensive in Maryland's history. Once he makes it to the general, he'll go up against a Republican challenger with a massive war chest in a state that’s elected a Republican to the governor's office **in three out of the last five elections.**

Winning races like this one isn't a passive choice – _it's an active fight_ – one that requires millions of dollars in resources and sustained, grassroots support from people just like you, who believe in Tom’s vision and know what he will do for Maryland families beginning on his first day in office.

**_[So, I'm humbly asking you to join me in supporting my friend, Tom Perez, for Governor of Maryland with a grassroots contribution of $10 or more today. name: From the Desk of Greg Abbott
subject: I’m personally asking for your help, Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
Governor Greg Abbott JUST ANNOUNCED that he’s OFFICIALLY running for re-election in Texas!
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?39rmm--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | **FROM THE DESK OF GOVERNOR GREG ABBOTT**

---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

I’m personally reaching out today to ask for your help at a pivotal moment in time.

I JUST ANNOUNCED that I’m officially running for re-election in Texas, _**[and I’m now looking for 2,022 committed conservatives to help us WIN in 2022.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1sssc-4qqlpo8/ "and I’m now looking for 2,022 committed conservatives to help us WIN in 2022.")**_

Later today I’m going to review the list of patriots who donated during the moments following our re-election bid, _**[and I’m really hoping I see your name on the list, Fellow Conservative.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1sssd-4qqlpo9/ "and I’m really hoping I see your name on the list, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%.")**_
**[CHIP IN $500 TODAY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1ssse-4qqlpo0/ "CHIP IN $500 TODAY")
[CHIP IN $250 TODAY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1sssf-4qqlpo1/ "CHIP IN $250 TODAY")

[CHIP IN $25 TODAY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1sssi-4qqlpo4/ "CHIP IN $25 TODAY")
[CHIP IN $10 TODAY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1sssj-4qqlpo5/ "CHIP IN $10 TODAY")**
I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t truly important, Fellow Conservative, but we need your help if we’re going to secure a win and defeat Beto.

We must start off strong, **[which is why I’m looking for 2,022 patriots to commit their support TODAY.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1sssk-4qqlpo6/ "which is why I’m looking for 2,022 patriots to commit their support TODAY.")**

Please don’t let me down, Fellow Conservative.

I look forward to seeing your name on the list later.

Governor Greg Abbott
---
|

---

| | | _BREAKING ANNOUNCEMENT REGARDING THE TEXAS GOVERNOR’S RACE!_

Governor Greg Abbott just announced that he’s OFFICIALLY RUNNING for re-election in Texas so that we can CONTINUE to implement our conservative agenda across the Lone Star State.

Your support is CRITICAL today, Fellow Conservative. Governor Abbott is working to BUILD THE WALL, protect your 2nd Amendment rights, and defend our law enforcement, **[but he needs your help if he’s going to secure a WIN this year, which is why we’re asking EVERY conservative patriot reading this to chip in RIGHT NOW.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39rmm-1sssm-4qqlpo8/ "but he needs your help if he’s going to secure a WIN this year, which is why we’re asking EVERY conservative patriot reading this to chip in RIGHT NOW.")**

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: The Democrats’ Recent Attack on Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, you cannot make this up. Democrats in New York City have recently proposed a bill that would grant 800,000 non-citizens the right to vote.
Peter,**Today, I went on Fox News to discuss how we need to protect our elections. **

This is urgent, Peter. Republicans’ gerrymandered maps have been upheld.
Given North Carolina’s dark history with gerrymandering, we can’t say this comes as much of a surprise. Republicans, who claimed to be transparent in their map-making process, actually used “concept maps” unseen to the public to finalize their drawings.
North Carolina’s population has expanded and diversified over the past decade, and the new maps should reflect this. Instead, Republicans are so afraid of losing elections, they’ve rigged the system to their advantage.
If they succeed, Madison Cawthorn will have a clearer path to executing his plan of a right-wing, extremist takeover all across the state – starting with WNC.
We’re hopeful that this will be appealed to the North Carolina Supreme Court because the only folks who should be picking our representatives are voters.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Time To Deliver: Mobilize for Voting Rights! Join Speaker Pelosi on Wed., 1/12 at 5 PM PT / 8 PM ET.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends:
Thanks to your historic mobilization and support, Democrats had a lot to be thankful for and proud of as we closed out 2021. As we start our work in 2022, Democrats will continue to deliver for the American people. The support of our VIPs – you, our Volunteers in Politics – remains indispensable!

Among our priorities – nothing is more important than protecting the sanctity of the vote. Our fight to protect the vote is nothing less than a fight for our democracy itself.

As we mobilize to save our democracy by protecting voting rights, please join Speaker Pelosi and her special guests today, Wednesday, January 12, 2022, at 8 pm ET / 5 pm PT for a visual event to discuss what we can all do to help protect the vote and ensure that the American people – and the world – did not see our last fair and free election in 2020.

To join the webinar on Zoom, you can register here.

https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_eLhlPeErSSGTdck_yHeAOQ

As President Biden made clear yesterday in Georgia, failure to protect voting rights is not an option. Our democracy depends on the American people winning this fight. Regardless of party, every voter wins when all voters can be confident that their vote will be counted as cast. That’s the essence of our democracy.

Let’s get it done!
-Team Pelosi

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25]
SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]

Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1107b80b-b273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/08b078f2-c073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGIwNzhmMi1jMDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flOlzJoECV9XUJ92I94hQ3jQkUm2M2RWUqxerso1YLw=&id=117907000 .

Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW
Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005
United States
Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fight Biden’s lies from speech on Tuesday!
body:
| |
---
Joe Biden spoke in Atlanta, GA, to lie about Republican election integrity efforts, and to lie about the Democrats’ bills that will allow them to take over every election in the country.

The media will amplify Biden’s lies today and for the rest of the week, to help him bully Senators Manchin and Sinema into helping him change the filibuster, and subsequently, change election laws to give Democrats permanent, illegitimate power for decades to come.

Therefore, it’s up to you and me to combat Joe Biden’s lies and counter the message the media will push on behalf of Democrats.

[**Use our newest campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0ODA1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/U9RiwRp1XfhOz-bjlm88uA) on the AlignAct platform to quickly share our message on social media or via email. If you are not on social media, you can still use the platform to email this campaign to others, and get the word out that way.

It’s a just a few clicks to share messages on social media and email the call to action to your network – it will take you a couple of minutes, that’s it!

Click on the link above or the button below to get started.
[FIGHT BIDEN’S LIES](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0ODA1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Bq4176tLDyRuk5DtoNiXpg)
Also, if you haven’t yet taken advantage of our other campaigns to protect our elections and save the filibuster, please make sure you do this week! This is the week the Democrats are trying to get it done, so this is the week to complete multiple action items!
* [**Dear Senators: Keep Your Promise to Protect the Filibuster!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
* [**Save the Senate**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._oTDb21JqHBMMxgdphw)**
**_(Note: there was a technical glitch with the phone call portion when we sent this one out before, so if you completed this one before, please click through again to make the phone calls.)_
* [**Save the Filibuster, Save Our Elections!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._zSrl2BB1BdQ)

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|

name: Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: It’s a new day in Galesburg!
body:
(You did that!)

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40608475/325118108/1300596418?refcode=220112_FR_REGalesburgSuccess
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwYzgwODE3LWMyNzMtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7tQQzP51C2JrdN2rwiJBheD5lOVr1N5kIRZoT8mSamI=)
---
Peter,

If you remember, back in February of 2021, we endorsed and supported Mayor Peter Schwarztman to flip a critical office in Galesburg, IL.

With your donations and support, Barrier To Entry PAC guided him to raise $15,000 and defeat an eight-year incumbent who supported Trump. Our expertise and funds helped Peter learn the importance of campaign financing, effective organizing, and digital advertising.

We spent countless hours on the phone and Zoom with Peter and his scrappy campaign team, pulling them up the mountain with us. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40608476/325118109/1300596418?refcode=220112_FR_REGalesburgSuccess
_IMG1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwYzgwODE3LWMyNzMtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7tQQzP51C2JrdN2rwiJBheD5lOVr1N5kIRZoT8mSamI=) **The best part about helping a candidate win is seeing the changes in priorities and new policies come to life.**

Last week, Peter announced a $70M project in Galesburg that is _**renewable**_ and will bring in more than $300,000 of tax revenue to Knox County and the city. This 50 MWac utility-scale solar development project will cover 380 acres of land and will bring together communities and land-owners to integrate clean energy projects into the local landscape. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40608477/325118110/1300596418?refcode=220112_FR_REGalesburgSuccess
_IMG2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwYzgwODE3LWMyNzMtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7tQQzP51C2JrdN2rwiJBheD5lOVr1N5kIRZoT8mSamI=) We’re so excited to see Peter’s vision come to fruition and to celebrate the accomplishments that come with victories. Because when we support everyday candidates, the whole community wins.

One of the many great things about Barrier To Entry PAC is that we don’t just hand someone a check. We invest in their campaign through mentorship as well. Since Peter was taking on a strong Republican incumbent, we helped him build a strong field program which ultimately helped his win. **[In just under a year, we are starting to see the effects of our hard work and the impact we can make when we come together and support candidates who can win. We plan to do even more in 2022. If you can, chip in and help us get a head start on investing in campaigns that will create positive change across the U.S. Donate today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40608478/325118111/-2038882143?refcode=220112_FR_REGalesburgSuccess_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwYzgwODE3LWMyNzMtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7tQQzP51C2JrdN2rwiJBheD5lOVr1N5kIRZoT8mSamI=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE TODAY >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40608479/325118112/1300596418?refcode=220112_FR_REGalesburgSuccess

You see, if we flip Iowa blue, Democrats will be virtually _guaranteed_ to maintain Senate control – and right now, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **He's facing record-high disapproval ratings.**
**[The Senate is split 50-50, so winning in Iowa could be the one race that keeps the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's hands. That's why I'm reaching out to you ahead of my mid-month fundraising deadline. We have the momentum, but we need grassroots resources to win: Can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40608531/325118276/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk570-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM4MDgxNy1jMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WG3AKiflAZUKCQmCHk1fNa7KvyUE-j3FjPyZQcikyTY=)**
Sen. Grassley hasn't seen warning signs like this before, and the GOP knows it too. That's why the Senate Republican campaign arm has already attacked me, and it's why Trump held a massive MAGA rally in Des Moines to endorse Sen. Grassley. I'm more than ready to take on Grassley, McConnell, Trump and the rest of the GOP establishment – _bullies don't scare me. _

**But Republicans across the nation will be spending MILLIONS to take back the Senate and stop Democratic challengers like me. So, I'm going to need grassroots supporters like you to get this campaign across the finish line – $10, $20, $50 at a time.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans ready for new leadership and Sen. Grassley facing record-high disapproval ratings, we have an unprecedented opportunity in Iowa. We cannot let it pass us by. [So please, can you rush a donation of $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sen. I’m leading the hunt for the truth, and I’m not going to back down no matter what Fauci says about me. Every donation sends Fauci a message and helps us keep up the fight for the truth. Senator Roger Marshall | | | Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, .

Dear Friend,

I am still reeling from the violent Jan. 6 attack on our democracy.

And I’m horrified that none of the lawmakers who enabled it, and maybe even helped plan it, have been actually punished for their roles in this uprising.

**We MUST hold them accountable for trying to overthrow the government!**

This wasn’t just a protest. When this angry mob stormed the U.S. Capitol, they tried to crush our democracy and threatened to murder lawmakers because they didn’t like the results of a fair election. Because their guy didn’t win.

But there were elected officials who actually participated or encouraged it, Pennsylvania’s own Sen. Doug Mastriano and Rep. Scott Perry, for instance.

[**PLEASE take action TODAY and demand accountability for those involved by emailing your lawmakers. Just CLICK HERE.** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40609592/325123034/999340523?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1MzdlZGUwLWM0NzMtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nHe96t-9fwWm0iogWjDyqTfvvZtvp6kdYpv_zoSptbM=&emci=87aada91-0f73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e537ede0-c473-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2038134)

**Jenna Henry**
Keystone Progress

Friend,
Tonight is our last chance to fundraise before the first public financial reporting of the primary, and right now I need your help. I may be considered one of the two frontrunners right now, but the money may paint a different picture.
Because of Maryland’s Public Finance option, our focus remains on the NUMBER of donations we receive more than the amount. We are committed to running this campaign off the support of the people - but winning means we need your support.
Can you contribute today, and help Nancy and me prove that it’s possible to run a successful campaign without relying on corporate and political organization dollars? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: 🚨 Republicans rigged the system — We're preparing to sue
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Peter,

Republicans just did what we all feared — they drew gerrymandered maps that give them more unearned power while trampling the rights of all voters. They broke up Nashville, stripping Tennessee of a voice in Congress and breaking up communities. They eliminated three districts from Shelby County, moving the number of seats minority voters can influence from 12 to 9, and they chopped the city of La Vergne in two, robbing one of the few majority minority communities in Tennessee of its representation.

It’s obvious that Tennessee Republicans have racially gerrymandered our state. With their proposed maps, 1 in 4 Tennessee voters will be discriminated against.

This is unconstitutional.

We are preparing to sue Tennessee Republicans for rigging the maps in their favor, but we need a big boost in our legal fund to get there.

We’re looking to raise an ambitious $30,000 by the end of January to help fund our lawsuit — can you chip in now to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

I hope we can count on you to help us meet our $30,000 goal so we can mount a lawsuit against Tennessee Republicans for rigging the system in their favor.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Thanks for being with us in this fight,
Hendrell Remus

name: James Carville Update
subject: Moments like this can make or break a campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I've seen what it takes to win
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her mid-month deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40611242/325131551/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2116-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYwZGZjNC1jOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDb_xJk8n1MDI7iVnHEg4hPp8UOV057K3RP2TALAWYo=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the mid-month deadline – to elect Val Demings and expand Democrats' Senate Majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40611243/325131552/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2116-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYwZGZjNC1jOTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rDb_xJk8n1MDI7iVnHEg4hPp8UOV057K3RP2TALAWYo=)**

clean_body: I've seen what it takes to win | | | Listen up, friend! Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her mid-month deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it. Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be. Friends,
President Biden gave an important speech yesterday in Georgia where he outlined the grave threat to democracy we face as a country.
I couldn’t agree more with his urgent call to stop delaying and take immediate action to change the Senate rules and to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act — two critical bills essential to protecting our right to vote and defending our democracy.
[Add your name if you agree that our democracy is too important to let Republicans spread lies and push voter suppression without taking action to defend access to the ballot box!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40611469/325132557/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220112_1_1&refcode2=fbd5bf97-ca73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&contactdata=zG6adNVoSDQWt8PRaGFHOjI97SI4N5UDrNRBWfito09WrMsIR1R5rXYzNLnwxEdK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQ1YmY5Ny1jYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j8NvgnR1i9ASNJZCS7AoGzR7hPPTMtnlWcMTYxQF2o=&emci=da080dc2-c073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=fbd5bf97-ca73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2216363)

Throughout 2021, I warned again and again about how our democracy faces a growing threat of authoritarianism from a Republican Party increasingly willing to abandon our core values to appease Donald Trump and his lies about winning an election that he clearly lost.
Voting rights is a right from which all others flow. If we don’t protect that right we turn our backs on the Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, my late colleague John Lewis and so many others who sacrificed so much to secure the right to vote and make our democracy live up to its promise of 'one person one vote'.
As the President said yesterday, having greater numbers of eligible voters VOTE is not a "problem" in a democracy. Elections are about voters selecting their representatives, not about partisans selecting who should vote!
[_Sign here if you agree that this critical moment requires decisive action to pass voting rights legislation and defend our democracy!_ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40611483/325132593/411823727?refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_220112_1_1&refcode2=fbd5bf97-ca73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&contactdata=zG6adNVoSDQWt8PRaGFHOjI97SI4N5UDrNRBWfito09WrMsIR1R5rXYzNLnwxEdK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmQ1YmY5Ny1jYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3j8NvgnR1i9ASNJZCS7AoGzR7hPPTMtnlWcMTYxQF2o=&emci=da080dc2-c073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=fbd5bf97-ca73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2216363)

clean_body: | | = | Friends, President Biden gave an important speech yesterday in Georgia where he outlined the grave threat to democracy we face as a country. I couldn’t agree more with his urgent call to stop delaying and take immediate action to change the Senate rules and to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act — two critical bills essential to protecting our right to vote and defending our democracy. Throughout 2021, I warned again and again about how our democracy faces a growing threat of authoritarianism from a Republican Party increasingly willing to abandon our core values to appease Donald Trump and his lies about winning an election that he clearly lost. Voting rights is a right from which all others flow. If we don’t protect that right we turn our backs on the Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, my late colleague John Lewis and so many others who sacrificed so much to secure the right to vote and make our democracy live up to its promise of 'one person one vote'. As the President said yesterday, having greater numbers of eligible voters VOTE is not a "problem" in a democracy. Elections are about voters selecting their representatives, not about partisans selecting who should vote! Onwards Chris * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

subject: Endorsed by President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
## Mo Brooks nabs Trump endorsement in Alabama Senate race - _Politico_
## [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59470321:WaN40KHVN:m:1:2365227053:120F40782A4EE7AF04AD353C8462C502:r)
Dear Peter -- **President Donald J. Trump endorsed my campaign for United States Senate in Alabama,** and I hope you will join him in supporting me today. In his endorsement, President Trump declared that "Few Republicans have as much COURAGE and FIGHT as Alabama Congressman Mo Brooks." ** I fought to build the wall. ** ** I fought to defend the Second Amendment from all unconstitutional gun grabs. ** **And I fought against the fraud that you and I witnessed in the 2020 election.** **[And I'm asking you to stand with President Trump and support my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or if you can afford it, the legal maximum of $2,900 per person](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59470321:WaN40KHVN:m:1:2365227053:120F40782A4EE7AF04AD353C8462C502:r)**. I'm proud to have fought alongside President Trump for his America First agenda and to have earned his endorsement. **And I'll never apologize to the fake news media or the Socialist Democrats for objecting to the results of the 2020 election**. That's why President Trump declared that _" Mo Brooks is pro-life, loves our Military and our Vets, will protect our Second Amendment, combat the Biden open-border agenda, is fighting for voter integrity (like few others), and was the Co-Chair of our winning, and record-setting, Alabama campaign in 2020."_ **But I need your help right away.** The last thing the Socialist Democrats, fake news media, and swamp RINOS want to see in the Senate is another Trump-endorsed, pro-America First fighter like me. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59470321:WaN40KHVN:m:1:2365227053:120F40782A4EE7AF04AD353C8462C502:r) **[Will you join President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or if you can afford it, the legal maximum of $2,900 per person](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59470321:WaN40KHVN:m:1:2365227053:120F40782A4EE7AF04AD353C8462C502:r)**? President Trump knows that the stakes in the 2022 midterm elections are just too high, which is why he endorsed my campaign for Senate. Socialist Democrats are threatening to blow up the filibuster to impose dictatorial policies granting amnesty to tens of millions of illegal aliens, cementing nationwide voter fraud through mail-in ballots, and banning and confiscating firearms. _Another RINO from the GOP's "Surrender Caucus" just won't cut it. Socialist Democrats, Big Tech censors, and fake news media smear merchants are lying in wait to destroy the typical swamp Republican that folds at the first sign of pressure_. And since Republicans only need to flip one seat to fire Chuck Schumer as Senate Majority leader, the GOP cannot afford to blow a winnable race by nominating some establishment RINO that cowers in the face of the left's attack machine. That's why Donald Trump endorsed me by saying, _" Mo is a great Conservative Republican leader, who will stand up for America First no matter what obstacles the Fake News Media, RINOs, or Socialist Democrats may place in his path."_ **[So please join President Trump in supporting my campaign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or if you can afford it, the legal maximum of $2,900 per person](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59470321:WaN40KHVN:m:1:2365227053:120F40782A4EE7AF04AD353C8462C502:r)**. Talk to you soon,
Congressman Mo Brooks (R-AL)

clean_body: Mo Brooks nabs Trump endorsement in Alabama Senate race - Politico Dear Peter -- President Donald J. Trump endorsed my campaign for United States Senate in Alabama, and I hope you will join him in supporting me today. In his endorsement, President Trump declared that "Few Republicans have as much COURAGE and FIGHT as Alabama Congressman Mo Brooks." I fought to build the wall. I fought to defend the Second Amendment from all unconstitutional gun grabs. And I fought against the fraud that you and I witnessed in the 2020 election. . I'm proud to have fought alongside President Trump for his America First agenda and to have earned his endorsement. And I'll never apologize to the fake news media or the Socialist Democrats for objecting to the results of the 2020 election. That's why President Trump declared that " Mo Brooks is pro-life, loves our Military and our Vets, will protect our Second Amendment, combat the Biden open-border agenda, is fighting for voter integrity (like few others), and was the Co-Chair of our winning, and record-setting, Alabama campaign in 2020." But I need your help right away. The last thing the Socialist Democrats, fake news media, and swamp RINOS want to see in the Senate is another Trump-endorsed, pro-America First fighter like me. ? President Trump knows that the stakes in the 2022 midterm elections are just too high, which is why he endorsed my campaign for Senate. Socialist Democrats are threatening to blow up the filibuster to impose dictatorial policies granting amnesty to tens of millions of illegal aliens, cementing nationwide voter fraud through mail-in ballots, and banning and confiscating firearms. Another RINO from the GOP's "Surrender Caucus" just won't cut it. Socialist Democrats, Big Tech censors, and fake news media smear merchants are lying in wait to destroy the typical swamp Republican that folds at the first sign of pressure. And since Republicans only need to flip one seat to fire Chuck Schumer as Senate Majority leader, the GOP cannot afford to blow a winnable race by nominating some establishment RINO that cowers in the face of the left's attack machine. That's why Donald Trump endorsed me by saying, " Mo is a great Conservative Republican leader, who will stand up for America First no matter what obstacles the Fake News Media, RINOs, or Socialist Democrats may place in his path." . Talk to you soon, Congressman Mo Brooks (R-AL) PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE. ** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-67577520337-echo3-269AE51E8ADC142AA1BFA05481AE0C53@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

| Peter, we have great news to share with you today.

**Elect Black Women endorsed Valerie Foushee!** We're proud that this important organization stands with Valerie because they believe in her campaign and know that she can win and deliver on the change we're fighting for.

[_**Will you help us keep up this positive momentum by pitching in what you can to Valerie 's campaign now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/lVQWh2U2-z23O62HKcTSDtvRX6LOCrbmAaRtUZBIL34=/qwRKBPXUQPucgiuokEsPNnRm_gx_R_B8v821PXzl9Q0=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220112-1-EM)

subject: What sets Georgette Gómez apart

body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
Hi —
Just last week, Georgette announced her candidacy for the California State Assembly. She's running in a special election, which means she has just THREE MONTHS to win this thing.
But here's the thing about Georgette: she knows how to get work done .
She took on polluting corporations as a community organizer. She broke through gridlock on the City Council to pass legislation for affordable housing and public transportation. And when the pandemic hit, she sprung into action to help the folks who needed it most.
Will you help her build a more just and equitable California by donating now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette-gomez-for-assembly-2022-1?refcode=X_011222_Announcement_B]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette-gomez-for-assembly-2022-1?refcode=X_011222_Announcement_B [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette-gomez-for-assembly-2022-1?refcode=X_011222_Announcement_B]Georgette doesn't shy away from a challenge. She faces it head-on — and beats it .
This is going to be a tough campaign on a really tight schedule. But together, we can get it done — so Georgette can start working on the issues that really matter.
By chipping in now, you can help send Georgette to Sacramento to fight for the hardworking people of San Diego County >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette-gomez-for-assembly-2022-1?refcode=X_011222_Announcement_B]
We appreciate you!!
--Team Gómez
