name: Erika Benfield
subject: RELEASE: Erika Benfield Announces "Small Business Owners for Erika" Coalition
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n2eXNm5AMFaugBPiR7ct0csQ9oZ202TvtYQoUwBWIVieyLZG8XSNVU41PE-uJL7ICbws3ygeMi1fF0gi-Ye43tUk-ErymcriQVZi6KesEseQjtkpsfplkdCcLorASRPDPLUPnPIDhJjPlZCkmePvq--cy1OUxjqbh9c-59hVRU=&c=uYDxIHh8_Y5FCJM0F1O5RbwHKKHZf6NsX78gYjTzWz09uZLmDKuSmA==&ch=1f2anlcTt38yRqM_6ZXS-ycRo_3AFhXca9IVnzdRU7CCaL_gSNFbfA==)
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: January 12, 2022
---
| Contact: Derek Dufresne press@erikabenfieldforcongress.com; 202-809-6013
---
| Erika Benfield Announces "Small Business Owners for Erika" Coalition
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n2eXNm5AMFaugBPiR7ct0csQ9oZ202TvtYQoUwBWIVieyLZG8XSNVU41PE-uJL7ICbws3ygeMi1fF0gi-Ye43tUk-ErymcriQVZi6KesEseQjtkpsfplkdCcLorASRPDPLUPnPIDhJjPlZCkmePvq--cy1OUxjqbh9c-59hVRU=&c=uYDxIHh8_Y5FCJM0F1O5RbwHKKHZf6NsX78gYjTzWz09uZLmDKuSmA==&ch=1f2anlcTt38yRqM_6ZXS-ycRo_3AFhXca9IVnzdRU7CCaL_gSNFbfA==)
---
| Lake Mary, FL - Erika Benfield, candidate for Congress in Florida's Seventh Congressional District, announced the launch of the Small Business Owners for Erika Coalition, backed by an extensive list of well-respected local small business owners.
---
| Erika Benfield made the following statement in response to releasing her Small Business Owners for Erika Coalition:
"I am proud to officially announce the launch of the Small Business Owners for Erika Coalition. This group of local small business owners is filled with American patriots who embody the principles of leadership and success that I will take with me to Capitol Hill. I am honored to have so many of these business leaders supporting me in my campaign to be the next Congresswoman of FL-07. Small businesses are the backbone of our communities, but I have seen them constantly struggle due to government mismanagement and over-regulations. When I'm elected to Congress, I will be a steadfast advocate for small businesses. I will fight each and every day to pass legislation that supports and empowers American small business owners.
"As a small business owner myself, I know the sacrifices, time, sweat, and tears it takes to run your own company. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit our country, my small business was hit hard by supply chain issues and price increases. I pride myself on providing a wide array of American-made goods in my business; however, the pandemic forced many of these goods to be delayed for weeks or even months. But, I know how to assess a problem and find solutions. Now, in 2022, my small business is thriving, and I know there's nothing that I can't accomplish despite Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's best efforts to ruin our economy and hurt small businesses like my own. I am confident that my experience as a small business owner will help me in serving as your future Congresswoman, and I am so thankful for the members of this coalition for their trust and faith in me."
---
| The Small Business Owners for Erika Coalition have released the following statements:
Brooke Boltz, Boltz Legal, Oviedo, FL: "Erika has a history of owning a business in the community for over a decade with dedicated clients, including myself. This administration needs to hear from a leader in the small business community to pass pro-small business policies."
Charles & Hannah Smith, Angell & Phelps, Daytona Beach, FL: "We need someone with a pro-business mentality in Washington, DC to stop inflation and rebuild the workforce. I know Erika will be that voice for us."
Jake VrTar, O'Leary's Irish Pub, DeBary FL: "Erika's honest and follows through. She always puts small businesses and people first."
Other members of the Small Business Owners for Erika Coalition include:

* Ellen Hartman, Ellen's Wine Room, Sanford, FL
* Angie Ugarte, DeBary Diner, DeBary, FL
* Brian Stanley, Jet-Set Printing & Signs, Casselberry, FL
* Don Bauerle Sr. & Jr., Highbanks Marina, DeBary, FL
* Sady Garcia, Deltona Gun Exchange, Deltona, FL
* Christina & Lonnie Proctor, Lonnie's Fusion Cuisine, Lake Mary, FL
* Danny Allen, Discount Propane, DeBary, FL
* Clayton Brothers, Clayton & Sons Salvage Yard, DeBary, FL

---
| This is the 2nd coalition of many to be released in the coming months in addition to the other local endorsements Erika has earned thus far from other community leaders and local officials, such as Volusia County Sheriff [Mike Chitwood](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n2eXNm5AMFaugBPiR7ct0csQ9oZ202TvtYQoUwBWIVieyLZG8XSNQ49G1D9dDdklZzuHXcr66b55b9dlJxA1XQCms6QyrgkxZ0x61lCrDbOAuMkhWLG5jLU_ZCReLWJgQeBphaOWY2x7XXM2REwZerzpo6nT6mkyewy1YqCgZcWrH8sn_YEOddeNbIegBsICLoO7lG5K2qap5_9t_V5lvzgpzDLYaeOAxiInxjHSySHNZYCd94TCmvGdzs2r9569YPZRzTmj3w=&c=uYDxIHh8_Y5FCJM0F1O5RbwHKKHZf6NsX78gYjTzWz09uZLmDKuSmA==&ch=1f2anlcTt38yRqM_6ZXS-ycRo_3AFhXca9IVnzdRU7CCaL_gSNFbfA==), Former State Representative [Bob Cortes](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n2eXNm5AMFaugBPiR7ct0csQ9oZ202TvtYQoUwBWIVieyLZG8XSNQ49G1D9dDdkXZCo2wlqf-yA94tEciFrpJlfcjda4szjEtKfz2n9ksyWPLvuWs_R4nS45QlBlKI-ngNeKcTg9hiXyYhVb8hkQQQGvyOTyo48T_ctgsp5iO53jHuAdyVLLfDxzt3XyOvBEpAlbLE6ntGa-O0TY8stFPAeOX6O9ovgDo5cEQ7LA6g0gnQ3-BKTNYY6rWq7vT64b4DZdaFZo_Y=&c=uYDxIHh8_Y5FCJM0F1O5RbwHKKHZf6NsX78gYjTzWz09uZLmDKuSmA==&ch=1f2anlcTt38yRqM_6ZXS-ycRo_3AFhXca9IVnzdRU7CCaL_gSNFbfA==), and Seminole County School Board Member [Amy Pennock](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010n2eXNm5AMFaugBPiR7ct0csQ9oZ202TvtYQoUwBWIVieyLZG8XSNQ49G1D9dDdk4n5yjrHKRvUoADI_MqTBwpVdEWqAlctfelZatVQ0Lb_oI22lN4eCmL2eYEhJldNyrBe0M3-RUanBjiXF470m63avKtnEHSeZ5jIeTyS2pP1zialHiTWViHYGnTTvA-YHFf5OO1_qAqWTDPDQVAN9K5pHkacH9rjUmzKfx4ECAzBzk6Xv3L76jkQO86yi1ZfCKUn79A55KIw=&c=uYDxIHh8_Y5FCJM0F1O5RbwHKKHZf6NsX78gYjTzWz09uZLmDKuSmA==&ch=1f2anlcTt38yRqM_6ZXS-ycRo_3AFhXca9IVnzdRU7CCaL_gSNFbfA==).
Erika Benfield is a small business owner, a former vice mayor of DeBary and DeBary City Council Member, and a proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother.

"As a small business owner myself, I know the sacrifices, time, sweat, and tears it takes to run your own company. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit our country, my small business was hit hard by supply chain issues and price increases. I pride myself on providing a wide array of American-made goods in my business; however, the pandemic forced many of these goods to be delayed for weeks or even months. But, I know how to assess a problem and find solutions. Now, in 2022, my small business is thriving, and I know there's nothing that I can't accomplish despite Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's best efforts to ruin our economy and hurt small businesses like my own. I am confident that my experience as a small business owner will help me in serving as your future Congresswoman, and I am so thankful for the members of this coalition for their trust and faith in me." | The Small Business Owners for Erika Coalition have released the following statements: Brooke Boltz, Boltz Legal, Oviedo, FL: "Erika has a history of owning a business in the community for over a decade with dedicated clients, including myself. This administration needs to hear from a leader in the small business community to pass pro-small business policies." Charles & Hannah Smith, Angell & Phelps, Daytona Beach, FL: "We need someone with a pro-business mentality in Washington, DC to stop inflation and rebuild the workforce. I know Erika will be that voice for us." Jake VrTar, O'Leary's Irish Pub, DeBary FL: "Erika's honest and follows through. She always puts small businesses and people first." Other members of the Small Business Owners for Erika Coalition include: Ellen Hartman, Ellen's Wine Room, Sanford, FL Angie Ugarte, DeBary Diner, DeBary, FL Brian Stanley, Jet-Set Printing & Signs, Casselberry, FL Don Bauerle Sr. & Jr., Highbanks Marina, DeBary, FL Sady Garcia, Deltona Gun Exchange, Deltona, FL Christina & Lonnie Proctor, Lonnie's Fusion Cuisine, Lake Mary, FL Danny Allen, Discount Propane, DeBary, FL Clayton Brothers, Clayton & Sons Salvage Yard, DeBary, FL | This is the 2nd coalition of many to be released in the coming months in addition to the other local endorsements Erika has earned thus far from other community leaders and local officials, such as Volusia County Sheriff ==, Former State Representative ==, and Seminole County School Board Member ==. Erika Benfield is a small business owner, a former vice mayor of DeBary and DeBary City Council Member, and a proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother. | ### | | == | | | | == == == | | Erika Benfield for Congress | 4300 W Lake Mary Blvd, Suite 1010-318, Lake Mary, FL 32746 | | Sent by mailto:press@erikabenfieldforcongress.com powered by

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Ducey's gaslighting is an insult
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40612183/325135408/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMyZjE0MC1jZDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ub9xWuOq3U1wj3wwuiAA4jYV1MCqwffv6Xf7e9z9cB0=&emci=9217df76-7972-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9fc2f140-cd73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Throughout this public health crisis, Governor Doug Ducey has continually failed as a leader, and that failure was on display during Monday’s State of the State speech.
**Arizona is the only state in the nation where COVID-19 is the leading cause of death during the pandemic.** Yet even with the Omicron variant pushing hospitals to the brink of collapse, Ducey failed yet again to offer real solutions.
The truth is many businesses are struggling and COVID-19 infections are soaring, in part because of his administration's rush to reopen, and his desire to go to war with anyone daring to implement mask or vaccine requirements. This has led to more people getting COVID-19, and thus creating severe staffing shortages across the state.
Instead, the Governor mocks the use of masks and continues to turn his back on Arizona hospitals that are so overwhelmed patients are forced to line the hallways.
**Healthcare workers are imploring our elected leaders to do more to stop the spread of COVID-19 and I stand with them. **
The Governor also made time to talk about private school vouchers during his hyper-partisan speech. Rather than imploring the Legislature to act by March 1st to avert the fiscal cliff and keep our public schools open this spring, the Governor pledged to sign any bill that seeks to divert students and resources out of our public schools in the name of “school choice.” Arizonans have repeatedly rejected voucher expansion, but the Governor refuses to respect the will of the voter when it comes to funding public schools.
**Gov. Ducey has failed the people of Arizona. We cannot award his administration's poor leadership with a seat in Congress. **
We’ve seen firsthand how far the Arizona GOP and national Republicans are willing to go to gain power, fighting experts and scientists at every step, gaslighting the people and communities who demand action, only to then take the credit for any progress made in spite of their reckless agenda.
**You have my word that, as your next Congresswoman, I will follow the science and rely on data-driven solutions to protect our communities and invest the resources we need to thrive. **
Thank you,
Kirsten
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40612185/325135410/41694283?refcode=X_11222_DuceysSpeach&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMyZjE0MC1jZDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ub9xWuOq3U1wj3wwuiAA4jYV1MCqwffv6Xf7e9z9cB0=)

Hi there, it’s Brad.

In case you didn’t know, my opponent was just endorsed by a far-right, extremely well-funded Super PAC that is prepared to spend whatever it takes to win this election.

So I’m doing everything I can to crisscross our district, set the record straight, and lock down every voter I can. **[And if you chip in $5, you’ll help me reach a few more voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40613142/325138347/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.12_b1_MMD-brad_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.12_b1_mmd-brad_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzgzNjg3NS1kMTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkIvzCn0QefUhB4ZsEfKphqrCjo3EFnrzcA_OgBRlwE=)**

I know the challenges we face keep coming. We weren’t expecting a Super PAC to jump into the race so early, and now we need to make sure we can respond.

But I’m not worried. You’ve had my back every day since I’ve launched this campaign.

**And that’s why I’m coming directly to you.** Our mid-month fundraising goal is in 4 days, and we still need to raise $4,100 more to hit our goal. Now that this Super PAC is involved, we can’t afford to fall short.

If we are going to take our country back from the radical Left this year, we have to focus on the core issues Americans care about. There will undoubtedly be distractions along our path this year, but I know we need to keep our focus on what matters – real solutions to unleash American greatness. So please take a moment to give me your honest advice through your own private link. Thank you, Erika Benfield Republican for Congress (FL-07) | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress

name: breaking@nanwhaley.com
subject: Our GOP opponent just gave his campaign $4 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Together, we can beat the millionaire candidates.

We have to act fast, team:
**One of our two likely GOP opponents Jim Renacci just announced he’s giving his Ohio gubernatorial campaign _$4 million_ from his own personal wealth.**
Nan is the only non-millionaire candidate in this race and we don’t have a $4 million check on the way. But if enough supporters like you chip in $5, $10 or whatever you can afford, we’ll be able to stay on track to counter our GOP opponents.
**[Can you contribute $5 or whatever you can afford right now to respond to this massive cash infusion and give our campaign the resources we need to flip Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40614135/325142548/1971071300?refcode=nw_em_220112_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRjZjcwOC1kMzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7A29EFIAJ9CaA7421sNywVe_rg84a1wi3GYCzK_V47g=)**
Right now, Jim Renacci is challenging Mike DeWine in the GOP primary and the latest polling shows he’s in the lead. But no matter who emerges as the GOP nominee, both candidates are personally wealthy and have given millions of dollars to their campaigns.
Both will be well-funded in the general election – and both would continue the same culture of corruption and failed leadership that’s allowed Ohio to fall behind.
But Nan doesn’t have millions of dollars to give to this campaign. She grew up in a working class, union household – and she’s running to make sure that Ohioans like her have access to good-paying jobs and opportunity.
**[Together, we can beat the millionaire candidates and elect a true champion for working families to lead Ohio. Chip in $5 right now to elect Nan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40614136/325142549/1971071300?refcode=nw_em_220112_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWRjZjcwOC1kMzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7A29EFIAJ9CaA7421sNywVe_rg84a1wi3GYCzK_V47g=)**
Thank you,
Team Nan

subject: BREAKING: Phil Rizzo Announces Congressional Campaign for NJ-07
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/announces-for-nj-13553115?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | **Phil Rizzo Announces Congressional Campaign for NJ-07**
_January 12, 2021_

_FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE_
Contact: joanna@theresolute.group

NEW VERNON, N.J. -- Phil Rizzo, former gubernatorial candidate and local real estate entrepreneur, announced he is now running in New Jersey’s new 7th District against incumbent Democrat Rep. Tom Malinowski.

Rizzo stated, “It comes as no surprise to patriots across New Jersey that the redistricting process was controlled by insiders determined to maintain their grip on power. The scales were tipped in favor of protecting the progressive Democrats’ hold on our state. And while I was looking forward to taking on Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey’s 11th District, I’m going to bring that same fight to bear against Tom Malinowski in the 7th. New Jersey’s 7th needs a true Republican—no more Democrats and no more establishment RINOs who pretend to be of the people.”

As an outsider to New Jersey politics, Rizzo understands the frustration everyday New Jerseyans have with their party leadership. Rizzo didn’t hold back against the Republican establishment in his primary. “When we go after the elites and establishment Republicans of New Jersey, they will fight back and fight dirty. Tom Kean, Jr. is going to do everything he can to get me to drop out of this race, spread lies, and slander me through his allies in the elitist media,” Rizzo added. “He’s a hack, establishment politician who expects this seat to be handed to him. I don’t expect New Jerseyans to buy what Kean is selling. This seat belongs to the people of New Jersey, not to a decades-old family dynasty.”

Rizzo sparked a statewide movement in 2021, criticizing the status quo maintained by New Jersey’s politicians. “They want it both ways. New Jersey’s ruling class wants us to give them the keys to the kingdom, but all they do once they get to Trenton or Washington is lock us out. The results of the 2021 elections made one thing clear: the establishment was put on notice by patriots from every corner of New Jersey.”

Freeing business from government interference, defending our border, ensuring parents can be engaged in their child’s education, taking back our freedoms from Washington and Trenton, securing elections, and protecting free speech and privacy online are key planks in Rizzo’s platform. In Washington, Rizzo wants to see leaders with “the fighting spirit of New Jersey.”

“Nobody is comfortable with the leadership in D.C. right now. Biden and the Left have run over our economy, destroyed our businesses, trampled our civic and medical rights, and created crisis after crisis after crisis. Afghanistan, skyrocketing prices, and COVID-19 vaccine mandates, all happened within one year of Biden’s regime. And—if past behavior is any indicator—neither Malinowski nor Kean are going to do anything to stop him. The citizens of New Jersey’s 7th don’t want to go from blue to light blue. We need a true Conservative candidate who isn’t afraid to fight for what everyday people in the district want. I am ready to take back **_our_** Congress.”

For more information about Phil Rizzo and his campaign, visit [www.JerseyRizzo.com](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=7ba2abae2d&e=f7e301a8ae) or follow the campaign on twitter [@jerseyrizzo](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=97815b6522&e=f7e301a8ae).
###

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: BREAKING: President Biden endorses changing the Senate rules
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is our chance to pass critical voting rights legislation | | |
---
Folks – Yesterday, President Biden endorsed changing the Senate rules to pass much-needed voting rights legislation. **[This is our chance to pass legislation that will protect the right to vote and American democracy. Add your name today if you support defending the right to vote →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40614412/325143852/2003055011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIxZjcxYS1kNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WY-itduJ5HR9mx-6JHgJeOOucHKNWExXce3harQIgY=&emci=ed9bae4f-ca73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e2b1f71a-d573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5452893)** Across the country, we're seeing partisan politicians attack the sacred American right of free, fair, and impartially administered elections. In Georgia, a recent law enabled the legislature to seize control of the State Election Board, allowing elected legislators to install a partisan majority beholden to the legislature, with the ability to suspend and replace local election officials. And in Arizona, legislators have proposed a bill that would enable the state legislature to override an election certification with a simple majority vote. **These partisan efforts are a direct attack on the integrity of our election system, threatening individual liberty, stability and – most alarmingly – our very democracy.** We can no longer stand by as extreme politicians systematically undermine our elections. We have a responsibility to act. **The time has come for us to change the Senate rules to allow an up-or-down, majority vote to pass laws that will protect American democracy.** We can stop this threat to our democracy, but we must act now before it's too late. **[Will you join me in this fight by adding your name in support of protecting our democracy and the right to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40614413/325143853/2003055011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIxZjcxYS1kNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WY-itduJ5HR9mx-6JHgJeOOucHKNWExXce3harQIgY=&emci=ed9bae4f-ca73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e2b1f71a-d573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5452893)** | | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40614414/325143854/2003055011?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIxZjcxYS1kNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WY-itduJ5HR9mx-6JHgJeOOucHKNWExXce3harQIgY=&emci=ed9bae4f-ca73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e2b1f71a-d573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5452893)

Our country as we know it depends on free, fair, and impartially administered elections. Every aspect of our society, from our schools, to our economy, to our national security, depends on us protecting the foundation of our beloved democracy.
It’s time to change the Senate rules and pass legislation to uphold the integrity of our elections. Our country, and our democracy, depend on it.
Thank you for taking action.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

---
Team, For years, the GOP has waged attacks against voting rights, including closing polling places, restricting vote-by-mail, purging voter rolls, passing voter ID laws, limiting voting hours and ballot collection boxes, and more. Since 2020, when we saw record-high voter turnout, **Republicans have introduced more than 2,000 bills designed to make voting harder in state legislatures.** To combat these attacks on our right to vote, the Democratic House Majority has passed the **John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** and **Freedom to Vote Act** , but neither have moved forward in the Senate for one reason: _the filibuster_. While Democrats have majority control of the Senate, it’s slim. Without 60 votes in support of a bill, the opposing party can filibuster — speak on any topic for as long as they choose — to permanently delay a vote on the bill. Right now, without Republican support, we sadly don’t have those 60 votes to pass these voting rights bills and get them to President Biden’s desk. **The best chance we have to save our democracy and strengthen our voting rights is to change Senate rules and abolish the filibuster for voting rights legislation.** [**Right now, Senate Democrats are considering a vote to get rid of the filibuster to pass these two critical voting rights bills by Martin Luther King Jr. Day. Add your name to join me in calling on them to do what it takes to strengthen voting rights and protect our democracy ASAP!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40614552/325144383/-337220868?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220112filibuster_GV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjIyZDNlYS1kNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKNH6mOEYoCA993Q45XlUyUr_EVTs3W13sOhKaA7G-s=&emci=b87bffe3-d573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0222d3ea-d573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4482565) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40614553/325144384/-337220868?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220112filibuster_GV_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjIyZDNlYS1kNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKNH6mOEYoCA993Q45XlUyUr_EVTs3W13sOhKaA7G-s=&emci=b87bffe3-d573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0222d3ea-d573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4482565)

clean_body: | = Team, For years, the GOP has waged attacks against voting rights, including closing polling places, restricting vote-by-mail, purging voter rolls, passing voter ID laws, limiting voting hours and ballot collection boxes, and more. Since 2020, when we saw record-high voter turnout, Republicans have introduced more than 2,000 bills designed to make voting harder in state legislatures. To combat these attacks on our right to vote, the Democratic House Majority has passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and Freedom to Vote Act , but neither have moved forward in the Senate for one reason: the filibuster. While Democrats have majority control of the Senate, it’s slim. Without 60 votes in support of a bill, the opposing party can filibuster — speak on any topic for as long as they choose — to permanently delay a vote on the bill. Right now, without Republican support, we sadly don’t have those 60 votes to pass these voting rights bills and get them to President Biden’s desk. The best chance we have to save our democracy and strengthen our voting rights is to change Senate rules and abolish the filibuster for voting rights legislation. | With the midterm election approaching in November, and Republicans threatening to take back both the House and Senate, we must do everything in our power NOW to expand voting rights and defend our democracy before it’s too late. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

---
Team, did you see Ashley’s email on Monday about growing far-right extremism here in Bucks County? Not only did Bucks County have the most participants in last year’s violent Jan. 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, but it’s made multiple headlines recently, particularly when it comes to our school boards. **One Bucks County school district reportedly removed LGBTQ books from school libraries, and last week, a school instructed teachers to avoid talking about the insurrection with students.** This sadly isn’t just happening in our neck of the woods. A new _Washington Post_ article investigated the growing far-right extremist movement coming to school boards and local government nationwide, and reported: _“In recent years, far-right groups have been moving away from national organizing to focus on building grass-roots support, harnessing conservative outrage to influence school boards and other local offices.“_ And the scary thing is, they’re winning. We can’t let a few vocal extremists destroy our children’s education or allow more attacks on our democracy to happen. That’s why we need a leader like Ashley in Congress, who will fight back against dangerous misinformation and far-right conspiracy theories, and vote to strengthen our voting rights and public education. **[Extremism is growing under Republican Brian Fitzpatrick’s watch. Help us replace him with Ashley next November and flip this seat blue by pitching in $10 or more now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40615013/325146228/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220112extremism_te_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDIwMGNlNy1kODczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2fVmHecjbq7BkXy7bCeF4NhMgjx0SNMB9mIg1vvHY8=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

That’s why we need a leader like Ashley in Congress, who will fight back against dangerous misinformation and far-right conspiracy theories, and vote to strengthen our voting rights and public education. = **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Team Ehasz | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Army. www.nikkiforcongress.com

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: We're suing
body:
This was state-sponsored censorship at its finest.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb7d94bj872pogt5r0lq6vieouoc4m7c0d31a9d8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s75mcqe8ptimoo6co5mm9pn6d3ic1pm6srksjjj5ctnmoq34cdhceqe6opje9jjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup34phkcipm4ptmc5j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
Dear Fellow Patriot, This was state-sponsored **censorship** at its finest. As a public university, SUNY Binghamton administrators have a duty to protect and defend the First Amendment rights of EVERY student to think and speak freely. Instead, leftist administrators at SUNY Binghamton used your tax dollars to shut down free speech by allowing radical leftist activists to bully, harass, and intimidate conservative students and speakers on campus. As someone who’s been verbally assaulted and abused for my conservative beliefs my entire life, I WILL NOT stand for it. And now **I’m urgently asking for your help to protect the First Amendment and hold liberal administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton accountable for their unconstitutional actions**. **[Will you help me?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo08gkrht2mltupclv95babbr22kn3jaf8vle2i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs)** It all started two years ago when a mob of more than 200 leftist activists at SUNY Binghamton University SHUT DOWN a conservative campus lecture. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z39k87hor76koajfbou7b62habgqbkksc0q0f4og_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) _The students attempted to host a Young America’s Foundation lecture featuring Dr.**Arthur Laffer** , Ronald Reagan’s economic policy advisor, on free markets and conservatism, so that their peers could hear your conservative ideas. _ But, leftist school administrators at SUNY Binghamton didn’t like that one bit. On the day of the lecture, SUNY Binghamton administrators put the leftist protesters up in the room right next to the lecture hall—specifically so that they could easily barge in and disrupt Dr. **Laffer** ’s speech. Then, the faculty ordered the police to stand down if they got wind of physical violence or threats from the hands of the radical leftist agitators. When the day came, Dr. **Laffer** walked into the room with hundreds of students patiently waiting to hear what he had to say... **Before he could even make it up to the podium, the leftist activists swarmed the lecture hall.****** With their fists in the air and bullhorns on blast, they belligerently screamed and shouted—drowning out Dr. Laffer with left-wing propaganda. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr4hg0vqj8prc8i0b6df8fvvhr4fsnqf7b83ulcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) **_Eventually, a few campus police officers showed up to de-escalate the situation. But rather than remove the leftist activists, the campus police escorted Dr. Laffer out of the auditorium and ended the event_**! Worse yet, the SUNY Binghamton faculty then decided to SUSPEND the conservative students who organized the event—instead of punishing radical leftists who disrupted Dr. Laffer. It’s bad enough that the students were harassed and intimidated by vile and obnoxious leftist bullies. But the fact that SUNY Binghamton administrators ENABLED THE LEFTISTS in bullying conservative students makes this a clear violation of the student’s rights. They silenced conservatives. They empowered leftist agitators. And they broke a litany of their own safety rules and protocols regarding incidents like this one. The good news is that my friends at **Young America’s Foundation** are now suing the SUNY Binghamton administrators for unlawfully denying Young America’s Foundation, Dr. Laffer and the SUNY conservative students their First Amendment rights. **But the only way they have a chance of winning the fight for the First Amendment not only at SUNY Binghamton but on campuses across the country is if they gather all the resources necessary to support YAF’s EXPERT team of constitutional lawyers and conservative thought leaders****.** [**That’s why I’m asking you to help Young America’s Foundation protect free speech by sending them a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpsin1h4gnrot5mfotuvsv0bo8gi1cjn9pnnd21g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) ** ** You may have heard of Young America’s Foundation (YAF) before. As the largest and most effective conservative youth outreach organization in the country – they have a phenomenal track record of defending free speech in schools and on college campuses. I know from experience. A few years ago, YAF was organizing a college lecture tour with me, and one of the stops on the tour was UC Berkeley. **It was clear that Berkeley administrators didn’t want me there.** They denied me and YAF access to a lecture hall to host my speech, despite the fact they had granted access to numerous leftist speakers in the past. Apparently, they believed that my conservative message was “too dangerous” and “controversial.” Thankfully, YAF stepped up and sued UC Berkeley for blatantly denying my First Amendment right to free speech and denying the rights of every student who planned on attending. And with the financial support of conservative folks across the country, YAF is winning the fight for free speech and conservative ideas. You see, Young America’s Foundation doesn’t take a single dime from the federal government. Everything they do to defend free speech and conservative values on hundreds of liberal college campuses across America is thanks to the generous financial support of folks like you. And now that they’re standing up to defend the First Amendment across the country, they need your help. [**Will you please send a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75 or more to my friends at Young America’s Foundation and help them defend our First Amendment rights?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za5lf2is7vhe0c8uvm283oqfn8id5h7nvnd404ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) **I am so confident in Young America’s Foundation that I’ve chosen them as my exclusive partner for all of my campus lectures and appearances**. In fact, through YAF I’ve spoken at 60 colleges and universities! And it’s not just me. YAF hosts the most inspiring conservative leaders to introduce your ideas to students in schools. YAF’s campus lectures feature**** NFL star and Congressman**Burgess Owens, Newt Gingrich, Stephen Crowder,** and **Dinesh D’Souza** , **Katie Pavlich** , and many others. These conservative leaders travel across the country to spread your conservative values and beliefs with hundreds of thousands students (and millions more who watch online). That’s why YAF’s lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important. One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas. And with your urgent help today, they’ll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student’s right to think and speak freely. [**Can I count on you to contribute $25 or more to YAF today and protect the First Amendment?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0knhnbf3tdrdm1fc04sl9nk73liolv7fss6uqjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) Sincerely, Ben Shapiro Young America’s Foundation [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh9u1gpdn1sf1cebi4mld6gf2bkbl683ruc0a28g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg3105qrlbe24km7uohqoddmlgs6tgin1ivq2lt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf81dhu79ofp0dptnttesi0vg6045o6h2kquhd98_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc1a38cm5f4o3accaqdf70tujenin0e468crns98_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs) | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrtuh5uq2n91bi3uhvs08g3louhnnhu40tnfd1e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhpg4hkkpt3g5kosr7st7s4fvdvt7qflrh8dnd50_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i62o34c5h2bs)**

YAF’s campus lectures feature** NFL star and CongressmanBurgess Owens, Newt Gingrich, Stephen Crowder, and Dinesh D’Souza , Katie Pavlich , and many others. These conservative leaders travel across the country to spread your conservative values and beliefs with hundreds of thousands students (and millions more who watch online). That’s why YAF’s lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important. One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas. And with your urgent help today, they’ll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student’s right to think and speak freely. Sincerely, Ben Shapiro Young America’s Foundation | | | | ---|---|--- 1-800-USA-1776 Young America's Foundation National Headquarters 11480 Commerce Park Drive, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 The Reagan Ranch Center 217 State Street Santa Barbara, CA 93101 The Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home 816 S. body:
We have big news, Peter:

Nikki Barnes, Rob Long, and Alexandria Ayala just endorsed Nikki!

These three community leaders know that Nikki is the best possible choice to bring something new to our state. Join them and help us build on this momentum. Click here to chip in $10 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jan-2022?refcode=111endorsements]

Marjorie Taylor Greene Suggests 'Second Amendment Rights' Should Be Used Against DemocratsTeam,
I wanted to make sure you saw the most recent deplorable statement from Marjorie Taylor Greene. On a radical-right radio program she said, out loud, that 'Second Amendment Rights' should be used as a defense against Democrats.
This is not the first time that Marjorie Taylor Greene has openly flirted with the idea of violence against her political opponents -- and yet nobody seems to be taking it seriously?
That has to stop. That’s why I’m proud to be throwing my hat in the ring to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene fair and square at the ballot box. Will you chip in $20 today to help our team stand up to her attacks? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220112_mf_newsweek]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220112_mf_newsweek]
Listen, I served overseas -- so I know what it means to responsibly handle a firearm -- but Marjorie Taylor Greene and her radical-right cronies have crossed the line when they are hinting at violence against political opponents.
Our district, our state, and our country deserve better. Will you help us win with a donation today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220112_mf_newsweek]

(If you already know the gist of what we’re talking about, =) Here’s the first one: = And here’s the second one: = Do we even need to explain this further? Bill Lee’s repeated, stunning disregard for the safety of Tennessee families in the face of a global pandemic that’s already killed more than 20,000 people in our state is absolutely exhausting. We can do so, so much better. The good news is, eleven months from tomorrow, voters will go to the polls, where they can decide to begin a new era of compassionate, honest leadership for Tennessee. = = — Team Martin | Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet all of our needs. name: =?utf-8?q?D=E2=80=99Arrigo_for_Congress?=
subject: SIGN ON: Unrig the maps. End gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Republicans in states like Ohio, Texas, Georgia, and North Carolina have passed gerrymandered Congressional maps designed to rig elections for the next decade.
**The Senate has the power to act right now and stop them.**
Our Senators can (and must) pass both the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to ban partisan gerrymandering and strengthen voting protections, especially for communities of color.
**[Join Melanie D’Arrigo in demanding the Senate end partisan gerrymandering and pass the critical voting rights legislation we need to protect our democracy.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAOj1ZVa8DSdlAVicBfHcElEsy05Y_IV0gHTpNjfZTwkMgh_yLz7vjr_MX96vATCotMEL5oJjAzjF6GfdSM4c0Iwxmb4095foipWNAkLgHSwxFCZr08oyYcDjsyzCHXduTizyGP5yHlX_CCQnr0hFFa1uF59eK4zZOHL-i9LH5AB4qRGB7CtQz5-REeaGyB2zgmmfvMfAXRS8YniavTlY3gi8PR--HSMCWrnRtew3yMHiC3L7nTxiHP_gvba7yDuGYg6c7BPnxkan9oT2FnOAS4djXulhiRLDvnLTcrNj8q5f_NSmkxEMrIv8IkbEUAO7kgu75T2Ak5LgGfJjjvMU5uC7zYYJ6GAIGiwBh2eufsLeUJGuO2EhKxs1wTjtXP78wlkh-BQBVpoPDEgVuYWZo9VCfa9JfXEc280ixvFYHkwAWqZKDAtlbsLDdee9m1VfqtTwSN0C-0f9oBIPwMufxK22ESfkVhiYbcBYVsFVw9d_k-FfEG3TJ4vqP5yHg8-W7eFc2R-u1vz-rXAUEezAKR9uAlDdJUMG7MYi4Hkv57IdLNrPn24zFKTw0SCQQudnT2--AxFHLxZUIzVqZXvNmGMP0i1dVhVMKrIvIs3MW0yj7RlNKOt6zGlXf-t2OF64/3in/yWmoCPiYQuCIU7idR_F_BA/h0/vwUuPRR5LqJUY6nkzLrq7MzNgYpeDSO5hvNBrfGQZ0c)**
Voters should be picking their elected officials, instead of powerful politicians hand-picking their voters.
The Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Acts would block partisan gerrymanders.
These landmark bills will crack down on discrimination against communities of color, ensuring that they can fairly elect the representation they deserve.
**Join Melanie in urging Senate Democrats to defend democracy.**

clean_body: | | | Republicans in states like Ohio, Texas, Georgia, and North Carolina have passed gerrymandered Congressional maps designed to rig elections for the next decade. The Senate has the power to act right now and stop them. Our Senators can (and must) pass both the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to ban partisan gerrymandering and strengthen voting protections, especially for communities of color. Voters should be picking their elected officials, instead of powerful politicians hand-picking their voters. The Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Acts would block partisan gerrymanders. These landmark bills will crack down on discrimination against communities of color, ensuring that they can fairly elect the representation they deserve. Join Melanie in urging Senate Democrats to defend democracy. **** Thanks for taking action today. – D’Arrigo for Congress | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. With just under 12 hours left, we’re closing in on our goal, and I know that if just a few dozen folks reading this email pitched in $10 or more, we could easily close the gap. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for coming through and helping us build the strongest campaign possible to make Wes the next Governor of Maryland. Patrick Denny Finance Director, Wes Moore for Maryland | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Join the fight for North Jersey >>> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cashaforcongress/starting-strong?e=ade10d3dbe)
---
| | [ ](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=5e7766589f&e=ade10d3dbe)
---
| | Peter,

There's no time to waste in this fight.

Partisan Democrats saw the writing on the wall when they redrew the 11th congressional district in Congressional redistricting. What they didn't consider is the make-up of North Jersey.**Time and time again North Jerseyans elect fiscally minded conservatives to represent them from Town Council to the State Legislature. **

Until the unprecedented blue wave of 2018, this district was a Republican strong-hold. Now more than ever, **North Jersey families and voters are ready to stop the madness and elect a fighter for North Jersey. **

[**Join my team by donating $5, $15, $25 or more today!**](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=d3d12c71c5&e=ade10d3dbe)
---
| [DONATE TODAY! ](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=64466de621&e=ade10d3dbe "DONATE TODAY! ")
---
| Since Joe Biden took office, North Jersey families have seen the cost of groceries and gas prices sky rocket. **North Jersey needs a fighter who will stop the madness and bring relief to our families and neighbors. **

As a lawyer and advocate, I've dedicated countless hours to improving the lives of North Jerseyans by securing housing for those misled by reverse mortgages, volunteering legal services for first-aid and fire squads, and raising hundreds of thousands for local food pantries.

It's time for change in North Jersey, but I can't win this fight without your help. Join our team and start the year strong by donating today!
**[> > RUSH A DONATION OF $5 <<

>> RUSH A DONATION OF $15 <<

>> RUSH A DONATION OF $25 <<

>> RUSH A DONATION OF $50 <<](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=4b9fa9d968&e=ade10d3dbe)**
---
| Sincerely,

Larry Casha
Candidate for Congress in NJ-11

This is important, Derek. **The attack on our democracy and fundamental freedoms is one of the most significant issues of our time.** As a voting rights lawyer, Chris defended the constitutional right to vote for all Americans. Throughout his life, Chris has worked hard to secure voting rights, first at the Brennan Center for Justice, then, Pitt Cyber at the University of Pittsburgh. So when Republicans in Harrisburg and Washington went all-in on weakening our democracy and attacking voting rights, Chris refused to stand on the sidelines and decided to fight back. The American people have had enough of the sham partisan reviews, spreading of the Big Lie that the election was stolen, rigged gerrymandering maps, and lawmakers pushing voter suppression bills in state legislatures all across the country. name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Paxton's Patriots Daily Update 1/12/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update January 12, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Yesterday, we learned that the Biden admin deliberately requested that an org compare parents' protests to terrorists. Ken Paxton said months ago that the White House wanted to target & silence parents & he'll always fight to protect students' interests.

We have to fight even harder to ensure Democrats up and down the ballot have a shot in our midterm elections this year — and we need your help. **[Our team is up against our mid-month fundraising deadline so there’s not a moment to spare. If we’re going to stay on track for January, we have to bring in $4,500 by midnight on the 16th — click here to chip in immediately>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40616787/325154567/435245919?refcode=ea.bf94fad0-e073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.bf94fad0-e073-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjk0ZmFkMC1lMDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fXPPOsa-G6dUscytvMMGaweVC2XDbVt0DUOn8a7LCJ8=)** When the GOP drew district lines after the 2010 census, the gerrymandering was so egregious that courts _threw the maps out._ **And now, their new maps are clearly designed to give some voters more of a say than others and _dilute_ the political power of voters of color.** They don’t even try to hide it: **North Carolina’s Republican legislators have proved over and over that they care about _nothing_ as much as holding onto their own power.** North Carolinians deserve leaders we can count on to defend our right to have a voice in our elections and make sure that future redistricting efforts are fair and nonpartisan. clean_body: Republicans have proved over and over that they care about nothing as much as holding onto their own power. | Peter, We’ll get straight to the point: A panel of NC judges just UPHELD Republicans’ ultra-partisan, gerrymandered district maps. We have to fight even harder to ensure Democrats up and down the ballot have a shot in our midterm elections this year — and we need your help. = When the GOP drew district lines after the 2010 census, the gerrymandering was so egregious that courts threw the maps out. And now, their new maps are clearly designed to give some voters more of a say than others and dilute the political power of voters of color. They don’t even try to hide it: North Carolina’s Republican legislators have proved over and over that they care about nothing as much as holding onto their own power. North Carolinians deserve leaders we can count on to defend our right to have a voice in our elections and make sure that future redistricting efforts are fair and nonpartisan. That’s simply not the GOP, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Let’s do this, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. body:
Did you see this message from my team?
| | | Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw my team’s message below – this is a critical grassroots effort to start of the election year strong.

**_It’s all hands-on deck as we ramp up to WIN, TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, and SAVE AMERICA!_**

If you’ve already pitched in, thank you _._

[**If you haven’t had a chance to make your first donation of 2022, please do so now >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b8862c581a647eee/5b9878faa1e15a49c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

The bottom line is we have a lot of hard work ahead of us, and we’re counting on top conservative patriots like you.

Together, standing strong and united, we can take back our country on November 8th.

Thank you in advance for stepping up to help. [**Tap or click to contribute.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b8862c581a647eee/148bc55418ddf15fc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

\- Kevin

Here at Team Hern we’re working to kick off the New Year strong.

America’s future is on the line on November 8th... we cannot afford to continue down our nation’s current path!

As Kevin wrote you last week, he’s ALL-IN to stop the insanity in Washington.

Today, we’re asking every supporter to step up and fuel our fight. We ran the numbers – our average grassroots donation in 2021 was $36.18

**Will you pitch in one of the amounts below to help us ramp for the battles ahead?**

clean_body: Did you see this message from my team? | | | Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw my team’s message below – this is a critical grassroots effort to start of the election year strong. It’s all hands-on deck as we ramp up to WIN, TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, and SAVE AMERICA! If you’ve already pitched in, thank you . The bottom line is we have a lot of hard work ahead of us, and we’re counting on top conservative patriots like you. Together, standing strong and united, we can take back our country on November 8th. Thank you in advance for stepping up to help. \- Kevin | Hey Peter, Here at Team Hern we’re working to kick off the New Year strong. America’s future is on the line on November 8th... we cannot afford to continue down our nation’s current path! As Kevin wrote you last week, he’s ALL-IN to stop the insanity in Washington. Today, we’re asking every supporter to step up and fuel our fight. We ran the numbers – our average grassroots donation in 2021 was $36.18 Will you pitch in one of the amounts below to help us ramp for the battles ahead? We know you’re just as alarmed and fed us as we are here at Team Hern. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH of the Biden Border Crisis, 40-year high inflation and supply-chain and workforce disruptions, and this nonsense “Defund the Police” movement that’s spurred a record spike in violent crime! \- Team Hern P.S. Every contribution makes a difference. If you can’t pitch in one of the amounts listed above at this time, please consider making a donation. id:2022-01-07-17:33:47:592t | | ---|--- | | Paid For By Hern For Congress | |

subject: [VIDEO] Let's do the tough stuff, together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617120/325157852/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=&emci=a70ebfbf-2c72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a8c0d438-e273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15353729)
---
Peter --

Here at Team Tina, **we're amped, we're excited, and we hope you will be, too.** Today we launch **our very first campaign video!**

Tina is the leader we need to **get things done.**

It's one thing to talk about problems - it's another thing to get things done. Tina doesn't just talk about making a better future, she puts in the hard work to make it happen.

**[And right here, you can see why she is the leader we need as Governor of Oregon>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617122/325157887/1725975483?refcode=Em22_220112_video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617125/325157890/1725975483?refcode=Em22_220112_video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=)
---
[WATCH AND DONATE RIGHT NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617126/325157896/1725975483?refcode=Em22_220112_video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=)
Tina has a long track record of creating opportunities to better the lives of families and communities across our state.

She **made record investments in education and affordable housing, raised the minimum wage, made sure people had paid sick leave, expanded background checks for gun purchases, started Oregon on the path to a hundred percent clean energy by 2040, and fought to protect reproductive health care here in Oregon,** no matter what happens at the U.S. Supreme Court.

While we've made a start on a better future for all Oregonians, it's not nearly enough. Especially as the pandemic and historic wildfires have changed our lives. From homelessness to climate change, it’s one thing to talk about Oregon’s challenges, it’s another thing to make the tough calls to actually get things done.

Tina is not afraid of making the tough calls. Even when it looks impossible, she is the person to step up.

She doesn't shy away from challenges because she knows that the tough calls are needed to create long-lasting change, because our communities deserve good schools, an affordable place to live, and clean air and water for our children, and their children too.

**[However, we cannot do this work without your support. Donate now to support Tina in her toughest battle yet>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617127/325157899/1725975483?refcode=Em22_220112_video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617128/325157904/1725975483?refcode=Em22_220112_video&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=)
Tina has been called a lot of things over the years. Advocate. Madam Speaker. Tough. And at the end of this year, we will be calling her the next Governor of Oregon.

Thank you for continuing to support us on this journey. It means everything to us, and Tina.

– Team Tina

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617129/325157908/-294883092?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=&emci=a70ebfbf-2c72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a8c0d438-e273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15353729) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617131/325157912/-1484875328?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwZDQzOC1lMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNqNJLgyq4vcM-gliTOD_8xTwaUWHOz6zbFKVIedjfQ=&emci=a70ebfbf-2c72-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a8c0d438-e273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15353729) Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P.O. name: Giffords.org
subject: Official CDC data on gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We just got the CDC’s newest data on gun violence and wanted to share some important numbers with you.
#

We just got the CDC’s newest statistics on gun violence and wanted to share some important numbers with you.
**50%** – That’s the percent of gun deaths that increased for children 14 and younger from the end of 2019 to the end of 2020.
**15%** – Nationwide, gun deaths increased 15% total from 2019 to 2020.
**#1** – And in the year 2020, gun violence was the number 1 leading cause of death in American children.
It’s our mission to make this country safer from gun violence. However, many victims of this violence are the nation’s most vulnerable — children — and we need to do everything we can to protect them now and in the future.
Right now, gun violence in America is shaping the way our children live in the present and think about the future. It doesn’t have to be this way.
[**Please make a $3 donation to Giffords. With your help, we will make sure our children do not have to live in fear of gun violence in America.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220112-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1441_3935704_l8tKbK&akid=1441%2E3935704%2El8tKbK)

name: Team Demings
subject: This is our moment, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend, polling shows me 2 points behind Marco Rubio, and experts say this race will come down to who has the resources to compete.

That's why this is so concerning: Florida can decide Senate control, and I'm currently short of my midnight fundraising goal. So my team sent me your updated supporter record:
Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested contribution: $5
Today's donation: PENDING
DONATE: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2117-fr-text
Donations from your area: 68% to goal
Deadline: 11:59 p.m.

This race is about more than just my unlikely story of opportunity: It's about a meaningful movement for Floridians and the country. It's about expanding our Senate majority. Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip a 50-50 Senate – and we can't let Florida be the seat securing him Senate control.

We can win this – CNN is calling this seat a top pickup opportunity – but we have a steep hill to climb. The GOP is pouring more than $10 MILLION into organizing in Florida to register a groundbreaking number of Republican voters .

Republicans are working in overdrive to make sure no Democrat can flip Florida ever again, friend. This is our moment: It has never been more important to build the infrastructure to fight back, and we need to make early investments. We can't do that if we miss this goal.
I know this people-powered movement is strong enough to defeat Marco Rubio and the GOP, but we need to raise another $50,000 RIGHT NOW to register more Democratic voters and flip Florida blue . Please, friend, I'm counting on you to help me reach this goal:
https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2117-fr-text

Friend, rush $5 right now to help me close our fundraising gap before midnight tonight, pull ahead of Marco Rubio in the polls and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2117-fr-text

I can't thank you enough for your support,

Val Demings

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The drive ends on Saturday night — the same night Donald Trump returns to Arizona for another rally to fire up his supporters in Arizona
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first $3 contribution to my re-election campaign for Senate. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here’s the truth:
We’re kicking-off our mid-month fundraising drive today — one we have to launch now because we’ve started the year a bit more slowly than we’d have liked.
The drive ends on Saturday night — the same night Donald Trump returns to Arizona for another rally to fire up his supporters.
I’m sure our campaign will come up at the rally. Last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” And I’m sure it will inspire his followers to donate and volunteer this time around, too.
So, we’re hoping for a BIG week before he arrives. The amount we raise during this drive is important, but the number of donations we receive is just as important to me. So, that’s why I’m asking:
[**Can today be the day you make your first $3 contribution to my re-election campaign for the U.S. Senate? I would not ask were it not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220112-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1922_6688874_zmepsu&akid=1922%2E6688874%2Ezmepsu)

name: Morton C. Blackwell
subject: Protect free speech on campus
body:
Young conservatives like Sofie Salmon face intimidation and abuse by radical leftists on campus.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This young woman challenged the radical left and won. Listen to her tell the story.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0gdfpm1u40pl7vn7kpu44qr90kofp357p0ff8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i6eor2c5h2bs) Fellow Patriot, Young conservatives like Sofie Salmon face intimidation and abuse by radical leftists on campus. But -- [**thanks to special training and assistance from the Leadership Institute](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jjqp6umfbehfg984d9ba37glo5plfhk0luf3rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i6eor2c5h2bs)** \-- Sofie didn’t back down. **Sofie took on her leftist campus administration after they prevented her from conducting a free speech demonstration.** **And she won!** The result was tremendous. Sofie’s challenge brought down an unfair speech code that violated students’ rights throughout the entire University of Wisconsin system. Click [**here](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3i939bas34rmoq5vrh6vojk37mbuftdna469378_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i6eor2c5h2bs)** to watch the video of Sofie’s story. But the Leadership Institute’s robust field staff and powerful training programs give students the skills and techniques to stand up for their principles and defeat the radical left. [**Will you give $35, $50, $75, $100 or more to train young conservatives to beat the campus left?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoupl94ist30o8vlcuknu8pmh07912p3lb45adu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i6eor2c5h2bs)** **Your donation today will train more students like Sofie to stand for their conservative principles and challenge the left’s biased policies.** [ **Help more students like Sofie win** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmjmcf8e722hpne9k342cb2adt64pe0fo2a73iqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1i6eor2c5h2bs) Thank you. name: Mike Collier
subject: I’ve got your back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Folks — You are powering our campaign for Lieutenant Governor of Texas. [**So if you haven’t made a donation toward our first fundraising goal of 2022 yet, I’d really appreciate it if you could chip in whatever you can spare today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617786/325161981/134239794?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhiNjhmZi1lNDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s-1q8v9AAMbznM8gqABlVEmrKw2Q8TgCqRZr_blGg_g=) Your support is the reason I can go out on the campaign trail and hear about what issues matter most to Texans. And your support is the reason I’m so determined to flip this seat and give you the leader our state deserves. For too long, Texas has put up with a Lieutenant Governor who is only concerned about his own bottom line. Time and time again, he’s called on his wealthy friends to swoop in with big checks to buy this seat and push their special interest agenda. I’m not going to let that happen — not again. **That’s why I have refused to accept a single donation from corporate PACs.** [**But this is important: I’m asking you to add a donation to our campaign before our first fundraising deadline of 2022 expires this Saturday. Every dollar you give helps us build a campaign that can flip this seat, take back the Texas Lieutenant Governor for Democrats, and end the political corruption running rampant in our state government.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617787/325161982/134239794?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhiNjhmZi1lNDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s-1q8v9AAMbznM8gqABlVEmrKw2Q8TgCqRZr_blGg_g=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617788/325161983/-839969798?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20220112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhiNjhmZi1lNDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s-1q8v9AAMbznM8gqABlVEmrKw2Q8TgCqRZr_blGg_g=)

For too long, Texas has put up with a Lieutenant Governor who is only concerned about his own bottom line. name: Patty Murray
subject: Speak out and save Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
What does Roe v. Wade and the right to abortion mean in your life?
#
Peter,
Extreme anti-abortion state lawmakers across the country have been chipping away at reproductive rights for decades – and now, Roe v. Wade is at risk as the right-wing Supreme Court majority decides its fate.
Throughout my career, I have listened to abortion stories from countless people here in Washington state and around the country, and worked to make sure those stories were heard in the Senate as I fought to protect access to abortion. In some cases, the procedure saved a mother’s life. In others, it granted a young woman the opportunity to keep following her dreams.
**[I want to hear from you, Peter. If you’re willing to share, your personal stories can go a long way in the fight to protect Roe v. Wade. How has the right to abortion impacted your life, your family and friends, or your future? Why are you in this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617843/325162311/143772602?ms=pm_em_220112_1&refcode=pm_em_220112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ0ODc0OC1lNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pe8I7U7Om5Tq8Nm2MrQHx9vXvJcltS_EPiVtDaG0sT0=&emci=0a448748-e573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0e448748-e573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13116610)**
It’s simple, Peter: _**everyone**_ should be able to make their own decisions about their pregnancy, parenting, their bodies and their future–without extreme GOP politicians getting in the way. That’s why I am working every day in the Senate to get the support we need to finally pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, codify Roe v. Wade into law, and defend reproductive rights.
**[Please, if you can – share your personal story about Roe v. Wade and abortion now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617844/325162312/143772602?ms=pm_em_220112_1&refcode=pm_em_220112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ0ODc0OC1lNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pe8I7U7Om5Tq8Nm2MrQHx9vXvJcltS_EPiVtDaG0sT0=&emci=0a448748-e573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0e448748-e573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13116610)**
And know that no matter your story, I will _always_ stand up and fight for your reproductive rights.
Thank you,
Patty

**[SHARE YOUR STORY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40617845/325162313/143772602?ms=pm_em_220112_1&refcode=pm_em_220112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ0ODc0OC1lNTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pe8I7U7Om5Tq8Nm2MrQHx9vXvJcltS_EPiVtDaG0sT0=&emci=0a448748-e573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0e448748-e573-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13116610)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a sweeping voter suppression bill. **NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights — and CNN confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first ever Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights — but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support. clean_body: With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell. | | | Derek — Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand: FIRST: Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats. THEN: Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a sweeping voter suppression bill. NOW: Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights — and CNN confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's first ever Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights — but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Raphael Warnock and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Thanks for being a part of this team. —Sen. This is great news. **But let’s be clear: this was an avoidable crisis.** I’m a proud product of Chicago Public Schools, and the daughter of two working-class union members. I know the importance of children being in their classrooms, of parents being able to go to work so they can put food on the table, and also of teachers being able to go to work without putting their lives at risk. Early on, Teachers made clear what they & their students needed, but the city invested desperately-needed COVID-19 relief funds in incarceration, funneled even more money to an already bloated police budget, and paid down city debt to huge banks. **Once again, the most vulnerable Chicagoans paid the price for the failures of our leaders.** Our communities need real investment and we need leaders who will fight relentlessly to bring resources back to our city. Yes, this means adequate PPE and strong testing and vaccination systems, but it also means providing long-term solutions to make sure crises like this one won’t happen again. body:
Sign up to come out and volunteer with Ashley Ward today! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618717/325166549/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pumPwBG_goF1lLPCV4FTju44kOpizhyvDcUutXLzz8o=&emci=622a4586-de73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=38c93dab-ea73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5354188) Hi Peter, We are kicking off our literature drops THIS weekend! January 15th! Literature drops do not require contact, instead it means hanging literature, about the campaign, on the doors of voters. In order to cover a district as large as NC06, we need an army of volunteers. I hope you will join us! clean_body: Sign up to come out and volunteer with Ashley Ward today! Hi Peter, We are kicking off our literature drops THIS weekend! January 15th! Literature drops do not require contact, instead it means hanging literature, about the campaign, on the doors of voters. In order to cover a district as large as NC06, we need an army of volunteers. I hope you will join us! We want to thank all of you who have attended events and donated but now we need everyone's help to contact our voters. We have a goal to reach over 800 doors this weekend and we need your help to achieve this goal.
