name: Kara Hahn
subject: Representation starts with listening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618779/325166691/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=)

Hi there,

With the start of a New Year comes a new list of resolutions, whether to spend more time with family and friends, meet a big goal or make a difference in the world around us.

My New Year's resolution is to flip NY's 1st District, so I can help pass legislation that supports our community and helps our families afford to live on Long Island. **But I know that representation starts with listening, which is why I'm hoping to hear from you today.**

**[Will you take my campaign's quick 2022 resolutions survey now, friend? Let me know what issues are top of mind for you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618781/325166693/-1198005091?ms=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=&emci=8081ddee-cc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=36c93dab-ea73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25369896)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618782/325166695/-1198005091?ms=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=&emci=8081ddee-cc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=36c93dab-ea73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25369896) As a legislator, I don't pretend to have the perfect answer to every problem. Instead, I've always listened to the concerns of members of my community and collaborated with advocates and experts to find solutions that work.

For example, until it was brought to my attention, I didn't know that renters in my community were not able to get their water quality tested without their landlord's approval. I was happy to work with the local water provider to correct that policy, which was creating inequity in parts of Suffolk County.

Similarly, when I first was elected as a county legislator, I wasn't sure what role I could play in combating the opioid epidemic. Yet, I knew it was a problem that needed attention. So I partnered with organizations on the frontlines of this fight, and have been able to write and pass legislation that's saved thousands of lives.

**So today, I'm asking for YOUR input, and I want you to know that your feedback will be central to my campaign and my priorities as we move forward in 2022.**

**[Tell me: What are your top priorities for Congress in the New Year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618784/325166697/-1198005091?ms=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=&emci=8081ddee-cc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=36c93dab-ea73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25369896)** [Protecting women's rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618785/325166705/-1198005091?ms=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=&emci=8081ddee-cc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=36c93dab-ea73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25369896) [SALT deductions](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618788/325166709/-1198005091?ms=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=&emci=8081ddee-cc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=36c93dab-ea73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25369896) [CONTINUED >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618790/325166710/-1198005091?ms=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=&emci=8081ddee-cc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=36c93dab-ea73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25369896)
Thank you,

Kara Hahn

| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618792/325166711/1150476578?refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey_bb_1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40618793/325166713/1150476578?refcode=em22_220112_newyearsurvey_bb_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM5M2RhYi1lYTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmioY9fjKBq0ytgSoH3rduBZXmYZh7IKbFc4dYD9Lto=)

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Urgent: Help stop an attack on the unborn
body:
Why is 2022 going to be an important election year? Because my Democrat opponent, Tim Ryan, wants to codify Roe v Wade.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UGtDJn4zCB6iiUqkJjocr0vUF0ouUNMUvRxNA1la7Fiz4ZOhDwWp2wMnjhWFOby-Np9ZQrwNUbLWa95l-OHjcarZiic87NwvthGsizX-sxOOdlFmLRA9C-_vrUYuxc1pdSSAYBQgYunoYWyYsJpkD48ZfwSmiwE6Zl-YuEZcsP9m0ayQLQ2Uhw==&c=Go9mO3b18jTH8eM6ZOMC3NrYcSGL0jhMNWGS18sX6NTBG5Wjc118ig==&ch=ORHre3BIFgl__UaTDjsuqc_tEpxbPIFdEPwKwsQ0T4aY3nEXFj9ztw==)

| Peter,
Why is 2022 going to be an important election year?
Because my Democrat opponent, Tim Ryan, wants to codify Roe v Wade.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UGtDJn4zCB6iiUqkJjocr0vUF0ouUNMUvRxNA1la7Fiz4ZOhDwWp2wMnjhWFOby-Np9ZQrwNUbLWa95l-OHjcarZiic87NwvthGsizX-sxOOdlFmLRA9C-_vrUYuxc1pdSSAYBQgYunoYWyYsJpkD48ZfwSmiwE6Zl-YuEZcsP9m0ayQLQ2Uhw==&c=Go9mO3b18jTH8eM6ZOMC3NrYcSGL0jhMNWGS18sX6NTBG5Wjc118ig==&ch=ORHre3BIFgl__UaTDjsuqc_tEpxbPIFdEPwKwsQ0T4aY3nEXFj9ztw==)

| Covid-19 is dominating the news cycle, but this is too important to sweep under the rug. How can a man who doesn't care about the unborn care about the rest of us?
Peter,[ I am 100% pro-life, and I believe that all life must be protected. Will you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or any generous amount to help protect the unborn? **Maryland couldn't afford it then, and we certainly can't afford it now.**

As your governor, I will fight for you and your family every single day by holding the line on spending, opposing _any_ tax increase, and delivering much-needed tax relief for Marylanders.

clean_body: | | | | We're so close Dear Friend, In just a matter of hours, we face our most critical campaign fundraising deadline. With the incredible support from Marylanders like you, we've made remarkable progress - but we're still $5,597 short of our goal. With inflation rising to a 40 year high, Marylanders all across the state are being impacted by the rapidly rising costs of goods and services. Now more than ever, we must continue to work toward making our state more affordable. Every single one of my opponents is proposing new pie-in-the-sky spending programs, which will drag us back to the failed tax and spend policies of the past. Maryland couldn't afford it then, and we certainly can't afford it now. As your governor, I will fight for you and your family every single day by holding the line on spending, opposing any tax increase, and delivering much-needed tax relief for Marylanders. But, we need your support before our biggest fundraising deadline so we can continue getting our message out. | | | | | | | Our campaign is supported by thousands of Marylanders, just like you, across the state who want to keep moving our state in the right direction. Your support means the world to me. Together, we can and will win and make history! Thank You, | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

| Peter,
Hello from #TeamGibbons!
We hope your year has started off on a positive note! In the Ohio Republican U.S. Senate primary, things are off to a great start with a new opponent's [poll](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Rac4HXv6cFB0DTc7-R5Bn2iXmmIH8rLr2CelUjMm_aKR4muGEoytKpl0-wbqCQLiVIjpGGxCJUWibqQj1oUO3wLsRTTFYF2MIlk2khjr8RUwEEdlYLvDwpHUluQc8fGvPWhweAtRB4UXau5I85aMHHMwwIs6QGsGQnGtrGt4ow=&c=EsE7zIrivbQtWNPlZI7FUG1sYDF-DD3dA3HxfYyUJcR50i7aJtQeWQ==&ch=uRcW_L9VgJpDdSZ0vfRO8nslu8QOzuOFRabo06EZD2Y5wlTGFBFtjA==) showing my campaign in a three-way statistical TIE for FIRST! Things are heating up, and the one constant is that our support is steadily growing.
Our bus tour is all about getting out to small and large communities and connecting with Ohio voters, and that's what we will continue to do until the primary. This week, I met with some great folks in the Columbus area for a meet & greet and will head to Cincinnati on Friday.
---

| DON'T FORGET! You're invited to the grassroots RALLY with Kentucky Senator RAND PAUL and Ohio U.S. Senate candidate Mike Gibbons in Cincinnati on Friday, January 14 at 3:30. Doors will open at 3 p.m. and attendees will have the opportunity to speak with both Mike and Sen. Paul. | "Gibbons launched a statewide bus tour in the first week of the year, visiting 14 communities in a custom blue and yellow bus emblazoned with "Gibbons U.S. Senate." On Tuesday, Gibbons was in Dublin, near the state capital of Columbus in central Ohio, and on Friday, he is scheduled to be in Maineville, a [village](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Rac4HXv6cFB0DTc7-R5Bn2iXmmIH8rLr2CelUjMm_aKR4muGEoytPV8KeeCTkuTB3B_dF7s9Oco2N07oBdR7WlXwtJXvEF6JzeVIgRhA0b1hYZgEFl9Ax5jwYUzYX6dEDB0mLgyKr0PdtL7saFi0WiU4H5J6PytHtLvMjb0XjXxlFlhyG97Q5VHJImzI2W1gu7Y6er6UfAyrRDsxfps8qYFNtL_1qZdLQsk616g05Xhqh2SO8FR7Q==&c=EsE7zIrivbQtWNPlZI7FUG1sYDF-DD3dA3HxfYyUJcR50i7aJtQeWQ==&ch=uRcW_L9VgJpDdSZ0vfRO8nslu8QOzuOFRabo06EZD2Y5wlTGFBFtjA==) northeast of Cincinnati, for a rally with Sen. [Rand Paul](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Rac4HXv6cFB0DTc7-R5Bn2iXmmIH8rLr2CelUjMm_aKR4muGEoytPV8KeeCTkuToXF0i2aUnctJagvB45W9q11nbFPzpXzi0ovrjqAf3DzjkFaFeetw27DdGaXQMH-hN1q2qPKgO2Gn42cs8p50w3TLa3B6JwyPqszwAwkeoW-OrJvmKK2WavwHSoBEKp-2uxFux5FkFFOYXcCy6J6xd-6vePELiStzl-NBh94SmWqcVYD_cJZnxpC5PHbPan2rInQCj1C6WqzY-cCaoekL_Q==&c=EsE7zIrivbQtWNPlZI7FUG1sYDF-DD3dA3HxfYyUJcR50i7aJtQeWQ==&ch=uRcW_L9VgJpDdSZ0vfRO8nslu8QOzuOFRabo06EZD2Y5wlTGFBFtjA==) of Kentucky. | Things have quickly progressed in a positive direction over the past two weeks and my team is working tirelessly each day to fight for continued freedom and prosperity in America. I know the anger many Americans are feeling as their values are trampled on by the Radical Left and ignored by RINOs, but don't let the Left's distractions and lies discourage you.
Now is not the time to give in, it's the time to stand up, take part in the change needed, and flip Congress this fall. [Click here to volunteer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Rac4HXv6cFB0DTc7-R5Bn2iXmmIH8rLr2CelUjMm_aKR4muGEoytLdW_Gh_yRAqugrfDrhk_QuRkCWokIQ3D8zdASTKmrt-yMfZnz0yMl9VXnSDS5t8b_GbqmBtrMUIclP1R7nyDUe5y_qqXajCMUT2OO7T1j2AAYOuQdbtdWQ=&c=EsE7zIrivbQtWNPlZI7FUG1sYDF-DD3dA3HxfYyUJcR50i7aJtQeWQ==&ch=uRcW_L9VgJpDdSZ0vfRO8nslu8QOzuOFRabo06EZD2Y5wlTGFBFtjA==) or email info@gibbonsforohio.com with questions.
See you Friday with Sen. Rand Paul!

Sincerely,
Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Ed Perlmutter is Out
body:
Liberal Democrats battling to come in
---
| | | | | | Volume 24 | January 12, 2022
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
While Congressman Ed Perlmutter has announced retirement from representing Congressional District 7, Democrats are eying their chance to take his place. Among the names being floated as potential candidates are some of the most liberal in our state. The bad news for them is that Democrats are underwater in Colorado as well as the nation.

A Jan. 8, 2022, poll by CIVIQS shows 51% of Coloradans disapprove of Biden, while only 39% approve. Even more concerning is that 56% unaffiliated voters disapprove of the Democrat leader.

Democrats are out of touch with how their policies are hurting Americans, and most importantly to me, Coloradans.

We have a real opportunity to put a smart, seasoned leader in Congress representing CD7. My pledge is to bring new ideas and solutions to a district plagued by crushing inflation, soaring crime and educational woes.
Send me to Congress to fight for sound fiscal policy, to keep government out of your pocketbook and off your back!
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This past week I traveled south in Congressional District 7 to Salida, where I met with the Republican Women of Chaffee County.
We discussed my run in CD7 and how the new district needs a conservative leader to stand for their way of life.

I also appeared on the radio with The Jimmy Lakey Show, chatted with Peter Boyles, and joined Kristi Burton Brown on The Dan Caplis Show.

This week, I am in Washington D.C. to meet with Congressional leaders about my campaign, then will be home to meet and talk with voters once again.

I will host a Telephone Townhall Meeting tomorrow, Thursday Jan 13th at 6:00pm. Please join us; you can register below under Upcoming Events

. I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| |
---
If you would like for me to speak to your group, please contact my staff to schedule a meeting.
---
| | [Send an email to the staff](mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com)
---
| | |
---
| Every bit can help
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Underestimated...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
I was underestimated, so I know doubting your opponents is a mistake. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40619439/325169643/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhYjVmNC1lZDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vLVqe8X8BOxXj5j5Vw00xLoUYkRzwLzJiBjVRIXsxPg=)
When I became a Senator, I was underestimated. The GOP** __** called me the “accidental Senator” and doubted my ability to deliver for Coloradans. Now, I’m running for reelection and this cycle I secured tax cuts for working families; helped keep nearly 4 million kids out of poverty; and secured critical investments in our roads, bridges, and internet infrastructure for Colorado. I was once underestimated, so I know doubting your opponents is a mistake and this won't be an easy race. The National GOP has raised over $75 million to flip states like Colorado and continue obstructing our progress at every turn. We’re up against Mitch McConnell’s warchest, eight opponents, and soon millions of dollars worth of attack ads. But I’ve seen this grassroots team step up in critical moments, including my last midterm election that I won by a hair. In the months leading up to Election Day, we’ll need to hire and train organizers, quickly respond to attacks, and mobilize voters statewide. Your support makes this election-winning work possible, and giving early goes much farther than a donation made later on in this campaign. **I know the true power of this grassroots team. So, I have to ask: Will you start this election year off strong with a $10 donation to my reelection effort? I’m counting on folks like you to build on the progress we made last year.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40619440/325169644/-20397165?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_IN90_20220112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhYjVmNC1lZDczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vLVqe8X8BOxXj5j5Vw00xLoUYkRzwLzJiBjVRIXsxPg=)****

name: Chuck Norris
subject: I’m so excited to support my friend, Greg Abbott
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
It’s not often that I reach out, but I wanted to email you today to let you know that my good friend and conservative fighter, Governor Greg Abbott, is running for re-election in Texas!
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?39ujz--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | It’s not often that I reach out, Fellow Conservative, _**but I wanted to email you today to let you know that my good friend and conservative fighter, Governor Greg Abbott, is running for re-election in Texas!**_

Fellow Conservative, Governor Greg Abbott is a PROVEN fighter who has ALWAYS fought to SECURE the border, PROTECT the 2nd Amendment, and DEFEND our state’s law enforcement.

He has NEVER backed down from a fight, which is why I know that he won’t back down from his upcoming fight against Beto. **[However, in order to GUARANTEE a victory, he needs our help, Fellow Conservative.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2i-4qqlpo6/ "However, in order to GUARANTEE a victory, he needs our help, Fellow Conservative.")**
**[Will you please chip in ANY AMOUNT today in support of Governor Greg Abbott’s re-election?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2j-4qqlpo7/ "Will you please chip in ANY AMOUNT today in support of Governor Greg Abbott’s re-election?")** **[PITCH IN $1,000 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2k-4qqlpo8/ "PITCH IN $1,000 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $500 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2l-4qqlpo9/ "PITCH IN $500 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $250 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2m-4qqlpo0/ "PITCH IN $250 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $100 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2n-4qqlpo1/ "PITCH IN $100 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $50 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2o-4qqlpo2/ "PITCH IN $50 ASAP>>>")** **[PITCH IN $25 ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2p-4qqlpo3/ "PITCH IN $25 ASAP>>>")**
As an actor on the TV show, _Walker, Texas Ranger,_ I consistently rescued the good guys who were under attack from the bad guys.

And let me tell you, Fellow Conservative, Beto O’Rourke must be confused if he thinks he can convince Texans to give up their freedoms and replace them with his RADICAL, DANGEROUS policies.

He wants to turn Texas into the next New York or California, _**[and Greg Abbott needs OUR HELP to stop him.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2q-4qqlpo4/ "and Greg Abbott needs OUR HELP to stop him.")**_

Thank you,

Governor Greg Abbott just announced that he’s OFFICIALLY RUNNING for re-election in Texas so that we can CONTINUE to implement our conservative agenda across the Lone Star State.

Your support is CRITICAL today, Fellow Conservative. Governor Abbott is working to BUILD THE WALL, protect your 2nd Amendment rights, and defend our law enforcement, **[but he needs your help if he’s going to secure a WIN this year, which is why we’re asking EVERY conservative patriot reading this to chip in RIGHT NOW.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-39ujz-1sw2t-4qqlpo7/ "but he needs your help if he’s going to secure a WIN this year, which is why we’re asking EVERY conservative patriot reading this to chip in RIGHT NOW.")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Protect Michigan's Ag Industry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I’ll fight to ensure that Michigan farmers and the agriculture community thrive and prosper. | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=84f0e55397&e=0636b97700)
---
Agriculture is one of my top priorities.
|
---
|
---
| Dear Peter:

Agriculture and our farmers hold a special place in my heart.

As the _only candidate for Governor of Michigan with a farming background_ , and someone who loves getting his hands dirty, I laugh when pretenders talk about agriculture yet don’t even own a pair of work gloves

Our farmers face a multitude of challenges, whether from unnecessary regulations, excess taxation, or unfair trade policies, **I’ll fight to ensure that Michigan farmers and the agriculture community thrive and prosper.**

_**But I need your help to do this.**_

Did you know Michigan agriculture adds more than $104 billion a year to Michigan’s economy? It is only second in diversity to California. Our state’s food and agriculture system also employees over 800,000 workers.

This is important for our state, and one of the reasons it is a priority for me. Here are several priorities I’ll be addressing as Governor:
* A permanent fix to the estate tax and capital gains tax for family farms.

* Protecting farmers from overseas markets for in-season fruits and vegetables.

* Strengthening right to farm laws.

* Removing bureaucrats and regulations from farming policies.

* Improving rural infrastructure including broadband internet and natural gas access.

[Read more on my website.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=28bd62e80f&e=0636b97700)

Michigan has a rich and diverse economy. **While we’ve suffered tremendously the past two years under Governor Whitmer’s lockdowns and bureaucratic policies, I see a bright future ahead.**

**But we must defeat Whitmer.** That’s why it’s so important for you to get involved today. Please help me in this election.

Whether you [volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a4c20435ae&e=0636b97700), tell your friends and family, or [make a donation](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a9f4267ade&e=0636b97700), every bit helps.

**Your donation of $100, $50 or $25 is needed.**

If you could donate even $10 it will help make a difference in this campaign.

---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=c06b3df6a6&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Think about that. Less than the cost of a pizza.

**Can you donate $10 to the campaign to help us Fix Michigan?**

I’m campaigning every day, visiting all corners of this great state. But _I can’t do it without you_.

Please consider making a generous donation today.

Thank you. Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Press Release: Representative Vernon Jones Responds To Brian Kemp's Christmas List
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 12, 2022
PRESS CONTACT: [GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM](mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM)
---
| |
---
PRESS RELEASE: REPRESENTATIVE VERNON JONES RESPONDS TO BRIAN KEMP'S CHRISTMAS LIST

---
| |
---
|
---
| ATLANTA, January 12, 2022
Background; Out of desperation for his failing re-election campaign, today, Brian Kemp came out with a laundry list of what he wants to give back to Georgians now. Where has he been for the past three years?

"I'm glad to see that Brian Kemp has read my Contract with Georgia and taken another plank from my platform. In desperation for re-election, he now wants to play Santa Clause after Christmas. HO HO HO" Vernon Jones

---
|
---
| |
---
| About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running to be the next Governor of the state of Georgia. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat Brian Kemp, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.
---

---
|
---
| |
---
| | Vernon Jones for Governor | 2951 Piedmont Rd. , Atlanta, GA 30305
---

subject: I Stand with Trauma Survivors. Will You?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
I Stand with Trauma Survivors. Will You? | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=49ab0b9238&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | Friends,

My lived experience shapes the work I do, and I believe we need more representation in the Pennsylvania legislature to help amplify the voices of the survivors and prevent the ongoing system of violence against women.

As a rape survivor myself, I know the systems in place are hard to navigate for anyone but especially for those coping with extreme trauma. By forcing survivors to relive the experience over and over, it makes it difficult to seek justice.

I continue to see the painful difficulties facing vulnerable communities seeking help through my work assisting survivors of rape and domestic violence.

An estimated 10 million people every year are victims of family and domestic violence – as many as one in four women and one in nine men will experience this trauma in their lifetimes.

We need to create safer spaces and more accessible systems to support and protect vulnerable community members.

We also need to support and partner with organizations that have proven track records of doing the work to assist domestic violence victims. We need to make sure organizations like the WOAR Philadelphia Center Against Sexual Violence, Center City Crime Victim Services, Philadelphia Sexual Assault Response Center, Women’s Law Project, World Healthcare Infrastructures, and more are utilized as trusted resources and have their voices heard in the legislature.

**Legislation best serves the community when it is informed by the community.** That means listening to survivors and the folks with boots on the ground._Good legislation means listening._

_Deja_

---
|
### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=9082859c78&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja Alvarez is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. If elected, Alvarez would become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=4ed1b422b1&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: FWD: NY AG moves on Ivanka and Donald Trump Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
This will come as no shock to you, Friend - and it's why grassroots Democrats like you must keep up the pressure on the Trump family. After being subpoenaed by the New York attorney general, Ivanka Trump and Donald Trump Jr. are refusing to testify about alleged wrongdoings at the Trump Organization.
---
The members of the Trump family are one and the same. Their modus operandi is to consolidate wealth and power for themselves, no matter whom and what they hurt in the process, and to protect one another at all costs. And now, they've consolidated nearly the entire Republican Party around protecting them as well. **But no matter who you are or how powerful you are, you must be accountable in the eyes of the law.**
**So please, if you haven 't spoken out yet, I still need 282 grassroots responses before 11:59 p.m. tonight: [ Click here to add your name if you believe criminal charges should be considered for Donald Trump and his family.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-TFF?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1125-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trumpfamilyfraud%3Fcode%3Djtk1125-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Sat, Jan 8, 2022
Subject: NY AG moves on Ivanka and Donald Trump Jr.

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qxQQA216FtYMWmuhnBMTLPX0aHeX87ru&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
There's a legal storm swirling around the Trump family, Friend - and it's about to start pouring.
New York Attorney General Letitia James has issued subpoenas for Ivanka Trump and Donald Trump Jr. - seeking to uncover the truth and bring accountability for alleged wrongdoings in the Trump Organization.
Whether in the White House or Trump Tower, the former President and his family have consistently taken steps to enrich themselves while harming others and threatening our democratic institutions. **Whether it 's in business or in government, we must hold Trump and his family accountable - and ensure they are never again in positions to inflict damage.**
Right now, nearly the entire Republican Party is holding hands with Trump and trying to protect him at all costs. No amount of shady business dealings or attacks on our democratic institutions can loosen the Republican Party from Trump's grip. They are _counting_ on grassroots Democrats like us to look the other way. But I know this movement stands for truth and accountability. **So, in light of these revelations that Attorney General James is investigating Donald Trump 's children, we must keep up the grassroots pressure to uncover the truth.**
**[Click here to speak out and add your name if you agree: Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump and his family?](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-TFF?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1125-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trumpfamilyfraud%3Fcode%3Djtk1125-su-nd)**
Thank you, as always, for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=culTKaFH2ACfQldodS0TLrr6Z1OFhXb9&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

2022 has officially begun, which means that midterm elections are just around the corner. With only months left until Election Day 2022, it’s crucial that we have input about your priorities for Kansas. Your input **_is important_** as the Senate race heats up. Mark is running for Senate to ensure that the needs of **_everyday Kansans_** are represented in Congress. He is accountable to you and welcomes your thoughts.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Kevin McCarthy’s Breitbart exclusive
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
I want to preface this article headline I’m about to share with you with a caveat: Breitbart is a race-bating, despicable mouthpiece for the far-right and those looking to harness the anger of those on the fringes of politics. That being said... and maybe for that reason, Kevin McCarthy just did an exclusive interview with them. In the interview, McCarthy once again threatened to strip me of my committee assignments in Congress if Republicans win a majority. **Kevin McCarthy Plans to Strip Ilhan Omar off Foreign Affairs, Eric Swalwell and Adam Schiff off Intelligence Committee** Here’s the thing, Derek – this may be little more than McCarthy’s usual craven appeal to his base, but it is nonetheless a serious threat. If Donald Trump demands he do something, Kevin does it. And Trump believes that no one has done more to hold him accountable, or was more of a force in bringing about his impeachment than I was. (And I’m proud of it.) This is yet another reason why a Republican majority must never happen. McCarthy knows that I will never shy away from my committee oversight responsibilities. That I will always stand up to him, and expose his duplicity to the American people. But there is a far bigger concern than what McCarthy would do to remove Democrats from their committee assignments in an attempt to undermine accountability, and that is this: He will vote to overturn the next presidential election if Trump loses again. **We cannot – and I cannot express this enough – allow Kevin McCarthy to hold the Speaker's Gavel. We just can’t. We cannot allow the GOP to take the House. It would spell disaster.** **If you can, please pitch in anything meaningful to you right now to my re-election campaign. I am going to throw all my weight to ensure I hold my seat in Congress and help Democrats across the country win. name: Doug Gansler
subject: I care deeply about Maryland
body:
| Hi friends, Since I kicked off my campaign in May, my team has worked relentlessly to spread the word about my bold agenda and connect with voters all across the state. I've had the opportunity to participate in forums and interviews, attend dozens of events, and host my own meet and greets all over Maryland. I have been able to do all of these things and more because of the support and donations from people like you, friend. **Now, I 'm asking for your support again, as we approach the most important fundraising deadline to date.** Our campaign is required to report all of our fundraising numbers up to this point and it's critical that our report reflects the movement we've built together over the last several months. I'm running for governor because I care deeply about Maryland and I have the experience needed to take on the greatest challenges of our time -- crime, COVID recovery, climate change, and choice. If you're on Team Gansler, **please make a donation by midnight tonight** and help us get to work to make Maryland a more just, more sustainable, and more prosperous state. **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan12deadline](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yS1xp6NAMAS4Ab76BygH-xqCBqF5vUtQ5eBf-T5C99zBttvNTbYbsrTzRMS5YihEJmrv6ty2Z80R0EdAUlhpjfUCOnsKZW2CXzg0H0c7cO24ehrmErcoVU5BDWmcUqSyKzNNghyNF2nLNVtFr-gFPQRoIWs__LbmFj3w4bKYVOKiGSwHIrmaRnwJ8mlC2k7xDy8Kkg00FR0RBmL99IVxV-T-O6MiqPaIBSkYsXkGWJ5t9nLzzFW7LLxO1pTN8M7wW1maD2FNpu4I_keQAfPgQRlchsPX5bSTcoDtw5OzydzD5BcoLslNG20xTduLwsRn4KaP-KIE5bqPP18bd2_DVe/3in/PThBCE9BQ3KlhXpmiVjC8Q/h0/CdJJiyvIrMNCPfrwWLm1m3gEUGKWbxSV_6B07cNyFT4)** Thank you, Doug

name: Steven Olikara
subject: We Need Honest Politicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with link to campaign website:
https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Olikara-logo-long.png
https://www.stevenolikara.com

Photo of Steven Olikara sitting at a table, talking with voters: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Steven_Oregon_Progressives.JPG]

Dear Peter,

On Sunday, Ron Johnson made it official - he's running for re-election. He is drunk on power and broke his promise to Wisconsin voters to serve only two terms. This is why we need term limits. I'm the only Senate candidate in Wisconsin calling for them.

We shouldn’t underestimate Ron Johnson. He's won in two Republican wave elections. 2022 is shaping up similarly. We need a candidate who can win the general - and that means shaking up the traditional electoral math.

Our campaign is built to win. We're attracting the broad coalition needed for a true statewide victory, including disillusioned voters who may not otherwise come out to vote in a midterm election. This is a fight for our democracy. Let’s win this together!

Many thanks for your support,
- Steven

If you’re ready to replace Ron Johnson with honest leadership,
please join our campaign for US Senate.
We can meet this moment and change how we do politics.

clean_body: Image of Olikara campaign logo with link to campaign website: Photo of Steven Olikara sitting at a table, talking with voters: [] Dear Peter, On Sunday, Ron Johnson made it official - he's running for re-election. He is drunk on power and broke his promise to Wisconsin voters to serve only two terms. This is why we need term limits. I'm the only Senate candidate in Wisconsin calling for them. We shouldn’t underestimate Ron Johnson. He's won in two Republican wave elections. 2022 is shaping up similarly. We need a candidate who can win the general - and that means shaking up the traditional electoral math. Our campaign is built to win. We're attracting the broad coalition needed for a true statewide victory, including disillusioned voters who may not otherwise come out to vote in a midterm election. This is a fight for our democracy. Let’s win this together! Many thanks for your support, - Steven If you’re ready to replace Ron Johnson with honest leadership, please join our campaign for US Senate. We can meet this moment and change how we do politics. Peter, I’ll cut to the chase:

**[I’m emailing for $5 to help fuel my campaign before Saturday’s mid-month fundraising deadline. Click here to donate and help me win this election >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40620426/325174374/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.12_b1_MMD1_X_F1_S1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.12_b1_mmd1_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2QxZThmYi1mMjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmR9LFAd-_fzwteosTrttN5BBQwGKbnDRpaVZwlOr5I=)**

I’m setting a goal to raise $2,000 more before Saturday’s deadline. I know it’s ambitious, but if we all chip in, I know we can get there.

But as we’ve seen time and time again, there is nothing a dedicated group of people can’t do when they put their mind to it.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: New CDC Records Detail Agency Head Walensky Wanted Details of Death of Teenager Reported to Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it obtained 314 pages of records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention that show Director Rochelle Walensky’s communications, which include her request for details about the death of a teenager who died days after receiving a coronavirus vaccination.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 10, 2022

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it obtained 314 pages of records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention that show Director Rochelle Walensky’s communications, which include her request for details about the death of a teenager who died days after receiving a coronavirus vaccination. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 10, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == “The American people have a right to know as much as possible about the safety of the COVID vaccines,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The CDC needs to be more transparent about its investigations of COVID vaccine adverse events, including deaths, reported on VAERS.” == ---|--- | | | | == | == More than three years after the Islamic Republic of Pakistan enacted a historic law guaranteeing transgender citizens fundamental rights and protecting them from discrimination and harassment, American taxpayers will fund a program to “promote broader social inclusion of transgender people” in the south Asian nation. The goal is to help Pakistan’s transgender community develop vocational skills and knowledge to improve economic opportunities by, among other things, teaching them how to establish and manage small-scale businesses. Uncle Sam is also throwing in “seed funding” of up to $600 to help transgender Pakistanis set up a business after their skills training. == ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch is front and center in the effort to hold the Biden administration accountable throughout the ongoing COVID-19 crisis. Last year, Judicial Watch sued the administration for information on the Chinese government’s reported abuse of U.S. diplomatic personnel. Specifically, Judicial Watch sought documents on the Chinese government’s use of anal swabs COVID-19 tests on U.S. diplomats. As Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton states, “is [the use of anal swab testing] just an opportunity for China to mess with our diplomatic personnel by shaming them or embarrassing them?” ---|--- | | | | | As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. Situated around 10 miles from Mexico on the banks of the Colorado River, Yuma, in southwestern Arizona, began to see an unprecedented influx of illegal aliens in fiscal year 2021 along with the nation’s other Border Patrol sectors. ---|--- | | | Fox News New York is blatantly violating the Constitution and should be investigated by the Department of Justice (DOJ) for prioritizing non-White individuals for certain coronavirus treatments, critics told Fox News. Tom Fitton, who leads the conservative group Judicial Watch, similarly told Fox News that the Justice Department should investigate the issue as it constitutes a form of illegal discrimination. Judicial Watch AG Garland testified that he based his memorandum off of a letter from the National School Board Association (NSBA) that labeled parents as “domestic terrorists.” The National School Boards Association later issued an apology for the letter. In November, Republicans on the House Judiciary Committee questioned the completeness of Garland’s testimony. = The Washington Times Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said he was permanently banned from TikTok, the popular social media video platform with China-based ownership. The head of the conservative activist group said he was removed from TikTok without an explanation. = = = = = == == | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Top 4 liberal media targets of 2022
body:
The radical left-wing media is already showing who they want to destroy in 2022. I’m here to warn you NOW about their plans to destroy these TOP 4 targets: [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6750%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=3f9HTdkJBgepqz7R4PPwcA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69690%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jj4n%2fFoHcM5xfam9IHM0Uw&sysid=1)
Friend,

The radical left-wing media is already showing who they want to destroy in 2022. I’m here to warn you NOW about their plans to destroy these TOP 4 targets:
> **#4: Republicans**
This is a given, but be prepared for it to get even worse as they start to call Republicans, terrorists or racists.
> **#3: Comedians**
The regime in charge of the media cannot allow for any deviations from the socialist narrative. Joe Rogan, Tim Dillon, and Dave Chappelle all represent a threat to the Establishment Media. As champions of free speech, the left-wing media will seek to destroy them.
> **#2: Parents**
Lenin (a Soviet era communist) said in order to bring about total domination you must control education. The radicals in the media will continue their war on parents.
> **#1: Unvaccinated**
The unvaccinated will be the excuse and scapegoat for the failures of vaccines and mandates. The rhetoric here may get very dangerous.

I am warning you, but I am also asking for you to support the Media Research Center (MRC) to expose the radical bias in the media. It’s no longer the news corporations. It’s also collusion with the White House and Big Tech.

[_**Can you send an urgent donation of $10, $50, $100, or any amount you can generously spare to the Media Research Center?**_

_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $35 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>**_
**_Donate $500 >>_
_Donate $1,000 >>
Donate Other >>_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69690%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jj4n%2fFoHcM5xfam9IHM0Uw&sysid=1)
I am the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

**Thanks to our efforts exposing bias in the media, 90% of Americans do not TRUST the media as a reliable source of information. **

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. We are teaching voters to Believe in America - Not the Media.
_**Here’s how MRC exposes the fake news media:**_

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.
* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.
* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC’s social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[_**Please help me DEFEAT the leftwing media and their lies by becoming a supporter of the Media Research Center today!**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69691%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3LbCIIzUUSyyoGFZ738k1w&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $35 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>
Donate $500 >>
Donate $1,000 >>
Donate Other >>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69690%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jj4n%2fFoHcM5xfam9IHM0Uw&sysid=1)

The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization recording the media 24/7, identifying lies, exposing false media coverage, and holding the media accountable.

Our efforts have led to reporters being terminated for fake news reporting, major news publications retracting false statements, apologies from news personalities, and more.

I am truly worried about the uptick in dangerous rhetoric from the media. They are calling Republicans and parents terrorists. They are putting a false blame onto the unvaccinated.

If we do not expose them, then their lies will influence voters which will have bad consequences.

[_**Please prayerfully consider making a generous donation of any amount by clicking here. **_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69692%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t9uGKi%2brL9K48vp9q0pJ9g&sysid=1)

I hope my email reaches you in time. I am looking to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to expand our operations in 2022.

Thank you for standing up for liberty,

Brent Bozell
President & Founder of MRC
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hunter=20Estes?=
subject: Under the Dome - Legislative Session begins
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132226?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

I hope all is well!

**We are now over a week into this year’s legislative session!** Hundreds of bills have already been dropped in the House and Senate on a vast range of topics.

Let’s jump right into the update on The Good, The Bad, and The Interesting...

**The Good:**
**-_HB 464,_ the College Sticker Price Act of 2022,** from Rep. Donnie Bell, would have Mississippi higher education institutions create a public calculator that would allow prospective students to better understand the costs of college and the availability of technical and vocational programs. This bill would be a big win for transparency within higher education and would help to strengthen the Mississippi workforce and give prospective students the capacity for greater reflection before deciding on career paths.

**-_HB 415_** and _**SB 2089,**_ from Rep. Nick Bain and Sen. Angela Hill respectively, would both place limitations on the salary of the Mississippi State Superintendent. MCPP’s [**Fat Cat Report**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1b413c5d93&e=5703353baa)** ** revealed the largesse that exists in the salaries of many public officials. We currently have one of the highest-paid superintendents in the nation. We applaud these attempts to reel in the administrative state.

**-_HB 231,_** from Rep. Lee Yancey, would authorize public and private employee exemptions from COVID-19 vaccine mandates. Government vaccine mandates, especially those concerning private businesses, are a massive overstep of governmental authority. This is a good bill that defends the freedom of Mississippians from encroachment.

**-_HB 493,_** from Rep. Steve Hopkins and Rep. Dana Criswell, would give greater freedom to licensed physical therapists to help patients. With skyrocketing healthcare costs, we need to take substantive steps like this to reduce barriers to access and drive down costs.

**The Bad:**
**-_HB 54_** would automatically register voters. Clean voter rolls have become a major issue for Mississippi and states across the nation. Areas that have instituted similar policies have often had tremendous difficulty with messy voter rolls with a range of folks becoming or remaining registered who should not.

**The Interesting:**
**\- Speaker Philip Gunn released the Mississippi Tax Freedom Act of 2022.** The legislation seeks to get rid of the income tax, which would have a profound impact on the Mississippi economy and would allow hardworking Mississippians to keep more of their own money. We’ll be reviewing the legislation and providing further details on the impact of the bill.

**-_HB 444_** would create a committee to produce an official state song of Mississippi. We can only hope that if this happens then Gov. Reeves, Speaker Gunn, and Lt. Gov. Hosemann will offer the first rendition of the new tune.

**As bills move through the legislative process, you can stay updated on them, learn about what they do, and find out how your legislators are voting through our[Legislative Tracker.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=baa44b1824&e=5703353baa)**
If you have questions about upcoming legislative issues, please feel free to send me a question.
---
| |
---

All the Best,

Hunter Estes
Senior Director, Policy & Communications

_Ps. Be sure to follow our Facebook and Twitter pages for detailed updates about the legislative session._
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b1b31e979b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b1b31e979b).

_Copyright © 2022 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Erica Smith
subject: I dropped out of school
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

If you’re reading my email this morning, there’s a good chance you’re
accessing the internet from where you are in your area.

Unfortunately, there are more than 400,000 North Carolinians — myself
included — who lack access to high-speed broadband, let alone any sort of
internet access in 2022.

Broadband isn’t a luxury, it’s a utility. That’s why I’ve made universal
broadband a major part of my campaign platform.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/33689?refcode=em20220112-other-764&t=1001&akid=764%2E3698%2EULKzs3 ]I’m ready to deliver for everyday people in Congress — and if you’re
looking for a progressive leader who will fight tirelessly for urgent
legislation like universal broadband, will you please make a donation of
$5 or more to our grassroots campaign today?

Universal broadband is a policy that is personal. Years ago I moved back
to my parent's home in Northampton County to take care of my ailing father
and study at Duke Divinity School.

I was back in my rural community where there wasn’t a half-decent grocery
store within a 30-minute drive. The dial-up internet connection was so bad
I had to drop out of school. I was devastated. I thought I was foreclosing
on my dreams.

It’s not just me and my family — all over North Carolina’s 2nd District
and across our nation, folks are still forced to choose between their
rural homes and the pursuit of their passions.

Lack of broadband access limits employment and educational opportunities
for far too many Americans. In particular, universal broadband
infrastructure would level the playing field for rural Black communities
in the South.

clean_body: [1]Erica Smith If you’re reading my email this morning, there’s a good chance you’re accessing the internet from where you are in your area. Unfortunately, there are more than 400,000 North Carolinians — myself included — who lack access to high-speed broadband, let alone any sort of internet access in 2022. Broadband isn’t a luxury, it’s a utility. That’s why I’ve made universal broadband a major part of my campaign platform. [ ]I’m ready to deliver for everyday people in Congress — and if you’re looking for a progressive leader who will fight tirelessly for urgent legislation like universal broadband, will you please make a donation of $5 or more to our grassroots campaign today? Universal broadband is a policy that is personal. Years ago I moved back to my parent's home in Northampton County to take care of my ailing father and study at Duke Divinity School. I was back in my rural community where there wasn’t a half-decent grocery store within a 30-minute drive. The dial-up internet connection was so bad I had to drop out of school. I was devastated. I thought I was foreclosing on my dreams. It’s not just me and my family — all over North Carolina’s 2nd District and across our nation, folks are still forced to choose between their rural homes and the pursuit of their passions. Lack of broadband access limits employment and educational opportunities for far too many Americans. In particular, universal broadband infrastructure would level the playing field for rural Black communities in the South. [ ]I’m dedicated to making universal broadband a reality in America, along with passing other urgent changes like universal healthcare, a living wage, bold climate action, and voting rights. Can you please make a donation of $5 or more today? [ ]Donate $5 Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Erica Erica Smith for Congress [ ][IMG] Contribute to Erica's campaign:

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The University of Georgia Bulldogs are NATIONAL CHAMPIONS! To celebrate, we’re giving away an autographed UGA jersey!
|
---
Fellow American -

**The University of Georgia Bulldogs are National Champions!**

The last time we won a National Championship, I was on the field playing alongside my fellow Dawgs.

I'm incredibly proud of the young men who battled back, after losing to Alabama in the SEC Championship a month ago, to play one of the best games of their lives Monday night. I know from personal experience they will appreciate this season for the rest of their lives and fondly remember the brotherhood they've built with their teammates.

Fellow American, I think 2022 is going to be "The Year of the DAWG!!"

To celebrate Georgia's victory, we're having a HUGE contest. We're going to give one lucky member of Team Herschel a signed #34 jersey, _**and I'll personalize it just for our winner!**_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3f33d09bb4df4f30bf81219e8158a3a9&_e=2FzrK9bZGWwOvutcofR4uQm8tVcPUII4XMRXQEyvB5ASMyPeqlkLxdRdrkrloYHrKggre9n_3ZoqH8ntanw58LC8NFHYDrXL_z09vWJ76D0x6155kdANsF8iuj8uLnw7mM1y9utPfUZOuDosf3MscUUs35kySylk_nQ7oaqs6mApUV6y3KoYGqYF5B-WhPpBPc1SG_6U7D2SHO6XYRi1Ctt4mUImIDKanL0fArJesFpvlL5ZehhzigRZEcifZwBKCuQgnayBBC2nuUAC2lSh4Fba18IqjJINGMGUc42m6Gy_rLto6MpLAQyDyeeBN9E1TK8wnlG6uWaMB0WAbb92NBaNnXmhTNCvmV1mdAhDqJf-NEkNDNorYGUVm6tIg6OxGEIbQ3hniQhGncsDjMPaGfkYDb4nc4EVSbIqPOv6Js-aG1Ofu8ldRVEyVT_0jlPEI9lnkAXXP6nv3owRMeMHSONB3ftZkQpd9k706dxNs6NZjvjxNq6HqO_6HbvSDwWM)

clean_body: The University of Georgia Bulldogs are NATIONAL CHAMPIONS! To celebrate, we’re giving away an autographed UGA jersey! | Fellow American - The University of Georgia Bulldogs are National Champions! The last time we won a National Championship, I was on the field playing alongside my fellow Dawgs. I'm incredibly proud of the young men who battled back, after losing to Alabama in the SEC Championship a month ago, to play one of the best games of their lives Monday night. I know from personal experience they will appreciate this season for the rest of their lives and fondly remember the brotherhood they've built with their teammates. Fellow American, I think 2022 is going to be "The Year of the DAWG!!" To celebrate Georgia's victory, we're having a HUGE contest. We're going to give one lucky member of Team Herschel a signed #34 jersey, and I'll personalize it just for our winner! Thanks for your support. Way to go Dawgs! Team, I have amazing news! As one of my top supporters, I wanted you to be the first to hear that the Ohio Supreme Court has **_struck down_** the incredibly gerrymandered State House and Senate maps that almost took away our voice and right to a fair democracy. This is a **major** victory for Ohioans. Because of your hard work and dedication, we have prevented a major attack on our democracy from changing the shape and direction of lives all across our state. But the fight isn’t over yet. [**This is just the beginning of pushing hard and protecting our access to fair democracy that listens to we, the people. Dear Friend -- Wisconsin finds itself at a crossroads. If the last two years have taught us anything, it’s that Tony Evers and his allies in Madison cannot be trusted with positions of power. In order to reclaim Wisconsin, and ensure our freedoms are protected against power-hungry bureaucrats, **conservatives across Wisconsin must be more mobilized and organized at the county level than ever before.** **Join us as we fight for a state where:**
1. **Parents reclaim their rightful spot in the classroom.**
2. **Crime is criminal once again.**
3. **Our elections are free, safe, and secure.**

To defeat Tony Evers and restore prosperity to Wisconsin, it’s going to take all hands-on board. That starts with you. | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0UF5H2coycpFiBJdU5eGKTbGQZv8g2-fpYq0wsXFOiWwardxG9H2Ic-0pzr7X0D2AA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=membership_push_v3&n=2 "Click here to join your county party today!") name: Jessica Mason
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Demand protection of voting rights NOW
body:
Yesterday in Atlanta, President Biden and Vice President Harris called to end the filibuster in order to advance passage of voting rights.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40621185/325177390/-1288899752?refcode=220112_JAPT_votingrights1_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVlYTIwYi1mNjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ag3ejofDFlDTM5vfD-L2zhK_oW0HfKXHG60ARoFNmmk=)

Team New Deal,

Yesterday in Atlanta, President Biden and Vice President Harris made a major speech that called for an end to the outdated (_and racist_) filibuster in order to ease the passage of voting rights.

For far too long, the filibuster has prevented advancement of civil rights. It was originally used to promote slavery and segregation — and to block voting rights for Black people. _**Today, the filibuster’s racist and anti-democratic implications continue to stall voting rights.**_

**The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. H.R.1 the For The People Act. The Freedom to Vote Act.**

These key pieces of legislation would prohibit racial discrimination in voting, end gerrymandering, reform campaign finance, and ensure that our elections are clean and fair. **These voting rights bills have already passed the House but thanks to the archaic filibuster, they have DIED in the Senate.**

It’s time to get serious about voting rights if we’re going to ensure that every voice is heard in this year’s midterm elections. **[TAKE ACTION NOW: Add your name to tell the Senate to protect our voting rights immediately! >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40621186/325177391/442630340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVlYTIwYi1mNjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ag3ejofDFlDTM5vfD-L2zhK_oW0HfKXHG60ARoFNmmk=&emci=345a0782-c173-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b95ea20b-f673-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25363451)** **______[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40621187/325177392/442630340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVlYTIwYi1mNjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ag3ejofDFlDTM5vfD-L2zhK_oW0HfKXHG60ARoFNmmk=&emci=345a0782-c173-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b95ea20b-f673-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25363451)** Thanks for using your voice, ****Jessica**** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40621188/325177393/-1288899752?refcode=220112_JAPT_votingrights1_headshot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVlYTIwYi1mNjczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ag3ejofDFlDTM5vfD-L2zhK_oW0HfKXHG60ARoFNmmk=)

---
Peter,

This is a dire moment for our democracy. All across the country, Republicans are leveraging their state power to suppress voters, specifically targeting communities of color to stop working Americans from reaching the ballot box. All eligible New Mexicans should have the right to vote safely and with confidence that their vote will count.
**As other states disenfranchise voters, New Mexico is taking every action to protect and expand voting rights. I just proposed new legislation that will:**
* **Improve voter access and participation** by making Election Day a state holiday, which will ensure that every eligible New Mexican has the opportunity to cast a ballot, regardless of their work, family, or community obligations

* **Streamline voter registration** by automatically registering eligible voters when they complete a transaction at the MVD

* **Restore the right to vote to formerly incarcerated people** , which will be a dramatic step toward justice and inclusion

* **Enhancing protections for Native voters** by expanding the timeline for Indigenous nations, tribes, and pueblos to request alternate voting sites

New Mexico is already a national leader in voting rights – and with these improvements, we will pave the way toward a stronger democracy. Together, I know we can overcome anti-democratic right-wing attacks.
**If you agree that every eligible American should have fair access to the ballot box, will you sign my petition today?**
**[It's up to us to protect our democracy. Please sign here to strengthen and expand voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40621562/325178942/1365853984?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk1151-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU2MWJlMC1mNzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bv76-1JMlOBYCAm-p9MXni0aJM9bqLob_2uqO0pRhw=&emci=4c9b7728-4673-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9de61be0-f773-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24265352)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40621563/325178943/1365853984?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk1151-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU2MWJlMC1mNzczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bv76-1JMlOBYCAm-p9MXni0aJM9bqLob_2uqO0pRhw=&emci=4c9b7728-4673-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9de61be0-f773-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24265352)

And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

We're counting on 25,000 supporters to put pressure on the Senate by signing our petition to END the filibuster and finally pass voting rights legislation. | | | Friend: After the GOP pushed hundreds of statewide voter suppression bills last year, Senate Republicans are poised to weaponize the filibuster to block federal voting rights legislation protecting your right to vote. It's clearer than ever: We can't stop rampant GOP voter suppression efforts without abolishing the filibuster. That’s why we must take action NOW to defend our democracy's future. We're counting on you to be one of the 25,000 supporters to increase pressure on the Senate by signing our petition demanding the Senate END the filibuster and finally pass voting rights legislation NOW. But with time running out and the future of our democracy on the line, we're falling short of the signatures needed from your area and still missing your name: | | Thank you, Team Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8uv6c24lr51l3p1vss8n67ouhngdbnnnlqphuhg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1h6eob1clh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znq142cbda22426sff73qchug3uoucp0s1h9nbmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1h6eob1clh2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8pon3kvcerops7vhqm66ov3htoah1cn15op13to_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1h6eob1clh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfdqe7cb6g2mu66sia8bhiemq3op40gb6fu0m2do_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1h6eob1clh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zohvadn1rhb31kb3n0866vjdpqd7iimib6rv9rag_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1h6eob1clh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zci86gi6jnfp3gdloa9g2ukdtdb86d80dgnarep8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1h6eob1clh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zfbb0l6k4qa13b5t5fcm3pe078kgrs3bdta0gvqg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvb51umiov9b9godnsismf1blf7ulk9op2kf1pbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c1h6eob1clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: quick
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We have to win every race in November if we hope to defend our majority.
#

Hi team, here's the situation:
Our online fundraising goal for the month of January has us needing about 5,000 individual donations in order to fuel our effort to keep Alex in the Senate.
But as of today, we’re at 1,592, so we have some work to do and we need your help to get back on track.
What do you say?
[**Can you make a contribution today — of $5 or whatever you can afford — to help us close our January fundraising gap? We’ll put your donation immediately to work in our efforts to hold this seat and defend Democrats’ majority in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jan22?refcode=em220112-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=576_159979_rd_qqy&akid=576%2E159979%2Erd_qqy)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jan22?refcode=em220112-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=576_159979_rd_qqy&akid=576%2E159979%2Erd_qqy)**
The truth is, our majority in the Senate is razor thin. We have to win every race in November if we hope to defend our majority. So we are getting started early here in California and your support today will have a HUGE impact.
Thank you!
\- Team Padilla

name: Team MTO
subject: Keeping the ‘slow-motion insurrection’ out of NM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
Extremists are stacking the deck for 2024

Peter,

In the wake of the anniversary of the January 6 insurrection, let’s be reminded that the continued assault on the very fundamental tenets of American democracy has not ended, and in many ways, it is being accelerated.

We must recommit ourselves to maintaining an electoral system where every citizen – Democrat, Republican and Independent – can cast their ballot easily and securely. And every citizen must have confidence that every one of those votes will be counted.

Hey team –
Governor Roy Cooper just released a video endorsing Cheri Beasley to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator!

He understands just how important this race is and that Cheri has what it takes to win. But he also knows that you cannot win statewide in North Carolina without a large grassroots movement, and it’s why he’s counting on all of us to do everything we can to elect Cheri.
