name: James Tarantin
subject: Our Embassy in Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let's keep it that way. |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=866df0aa6d314fb9bf2969ec7e12cf0b&_e=ryRoRJma5JJToAN_S5SOQkrfs-XPiAkw6s6ewIUEafNyBnsBVvXGYQWdvsg3CDPq5srxkjh6rAbAna0C_ngrlR7hCsMvDpc7Y2Aow1NRaQewmAwjfstLsGL2N2Rw_Aee1sJL_1ioPT9G_9U0eGlMLtdL1_thJoik-VXqtDh3CrtqskmE5uuayjLnb6P5SrcqFI-5i3OO98wsxLYj86O-GVl10TAWD6vYpFdZiTop0sf5WMPUP2kfR33vE0QtnamYERrUqNEMJ4gEhMSJGMX_AGZg3uDTGFBXAr9Ef9ETnafGsJAPUxdqtDHJTMxe94kvmHWF5dKJC_bn8b06zXamirfMcDYadV1cgPca1eJ5MnGKRNV7kxo1goroUnBuIZOGi54QDAzzKaTJALdURN8e9SyAw4B8A0NBpwPj4m0htdxzp5MaxmE3tFD3jLRXpCt3Zm0eRhVmGmy5pLn6_liIYZD3NiTJp6_DikWcLf79QPkZq_ewrO04xQfmM5eRQxG-)

Hey Peter,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=866df0aa6d314fb9bf2969ec7e12cf0b&_e=ryRoRJma5JJToAN_S5SOQkrfs-XPiAkw6s6ewIUEafNyBnsBVvXGYQWdvsg3CDPq5srxkjh6rAbAna0C_ngrlR7hCsMvDpc7Y2Aow1NRaQewmAwjfstLsGL2N2Rw_Aee1sJL_1ioPT9G_9U0eGlMLtdL1_thJoik-VXqtDh3CrtqskmE5uuayjLnb6P5SrcqFI-5i3OO98wsxLYj86O-GVl10TAWD6vYpFdZiTop0sf5WMPUP2kfR33vE0QtnamYERrUqNEMJ4gEhMSJGMX_AGZg3uDTGFBXAr9Ef9ETnafhXkdO07pHJbpKkxZmgxrBoqQR-n-uDJ0CRnemcyx7jutIIE6BJRkWrhg4g30pYDjgnRvgfO2oPwsaxe9RtATQKjORUSPasI_UWJ-1q7gDAIirwkPP1nkZ9R7DCWYVtIAzT7im0utCHaSn-lUIGLctyWw2CL_9Baev0WsjUR43p4DaeW5MDcHdq4zXHPhuDkdNofP2gzLvuBR6mRbCQ7oP)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. [**Don’t you agree Peter?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=866df0aa6d314fb9bf2969ec7e12cf0b&_e=ryRoRJma5JJToAN_S5SOQkrfs-XPiAkw6s6ewIUEafNyBnsBVvXGYQWdvsg3CDPq5srxkjh6rAbAna0C_ngrlR7hCsMvDpc7Y2Aow1NRaQewmAwjfstLsGL2N2Rw_Aee1sJL_1ioPT9G_9U0eGlMLtdL1_thJoik-VXqtDh3CrtqskmE5uuayjLnb6P5SrcqFI-5i3OO98wsxLYj86O-GVl10TAWD6vYpFdZiTop0sf5WMPUP2kfR33vE0QtnamYERrUqNEMJ4gEhMSJGMX_AGZg3uDTGFBXAr9Ef9ETnad56DzIRo8ThkmZn6AK3dQNToGg7pAYOGSg69Z-z8YvKDulSI6MWHvTl7hInRed9M54dDPt6f7oJ8LbEyDuHdbyTGUIkdJVlfOsJucVnXaehRai7zbyMVaHWKXNixlLECMKPlg1XMGs0jOkH6mgi9zjmUL9pTjUlFE36CIT1_AxE-bGURP2sNp-GV1FD21YY2rkMSBinxA5pn8g6loMnHzt)

**I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**If you agree with me then please help me become the next Republican Senator from Maryland, and let’s finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=866df0aa6d314fb9bf2969ec7e12cf0b&_e=ryRoRJma5JJToAN_S5SOQkrfs-XPiAkw6s6ewIUEafNyBnsBVvXGYQWdvsg3CDPq5srxkjh6rAbAna0C_ngrlR7hCsMvDpc7Y2Aow1NRaQewmAwjfstLsGL2N2Rw_Aee1sJL_1ioPT9G_9U0eGlMLtdL1_thJoik-VXqtDh3CrtqskmE5uuayjLnb6P5SrcqFI-5i3OO98wsxLYj86O-GVl10TAWD6vYpFdZiTop0sf5WMPUP2kfR33vE0QtnamYERrUqNEMJ4gEhMSJGMX_AGZg3uDTGFBXAr9Ef9ETnaeSe4sE3DY_HKVCBbAV_JdOn91JT6HjApt0VNZoqR2XWKVDg-MmkGJ0Mp2fwdB360I2U3v1qzi9_q8VDLXfY-1VTSsczSvWKT-ep83a2brZIl4r-DdUrvAdqJrfinf7f7KsplF3-E_JyVwBOrmza1gq8ozBzswayYOtxTTm3Bq-ODi3AWt8LBmky7Ep1wzXi5TAUY1HNE5yzDm8Z-gwLcu_)

Thank you,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=866df0aa6d314fb9bf2969ec7e12cf0b&_e=ryRoRJma5JJToAN_S5SOQkrfs-XPiAkw6s6ewIUEafNyBnsBVvXGYQWdvsg3CDPq5srxkjh6rAbAna0C_ngrlR7hCsMvDpc7Y2Aow1NRaQewmAwjfstLsGL2N2Rw_Aee1sJL_1ioPT9G_9U0eGlMLtdL1_thJoik-VXqtDh3CrtqskmE5uuayjLnb6P5SrcqFI-5i3OO98wsxLYj86O-GVl10TAWD6vYpFdZiTop0sf5WMPUP2kfR33vE0QtnamYERrUqNEMJ4gEhMSJGMX_AGZg3uDTGFBXAr9Ef9ETnadYf3t9VrLPIOUWWqnAv3EGaVxooRU_Y8bzUY2DbsE4GvTJtp_KJCJA-XaucNNhutQRqEZPGcUDr6JTpkXBldI0gc9VWAvSxjhRf0Ji7inwKPwNX7MSmupNEgqbZj55stJ1Rf5ct17Gj7swDt_GbSxFo5FoxgIvyYK7QlMd9kDjJdHyNgUrAboHlwgt3ye-R7bKgNfJQvAw1mD4RhGkdPyY)
**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN FOR SENATE **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=866df0aa6d314fb9bf2969ec7e12cf0b&_e=ryRoRJma5JJToAN_S5SOQkrfs-XPiAkw6s6ewIUEafNyBnsBVvXGYQWdvsg3CDPq5srxkjh6rAbAna0C_ngrlR7hCsMvDpc7Y2Aow1NRaQewmAwjfstLsGL2N2Rw_Aee1sJL_1ioPT9G_9U0eGlMLtdL1_thJoik-VXqtDh3CrtqskmE5uuayjLnb6P5SrcqFI-5i3OO98wsxLYj86O-GVl10TAWD6vYpFdZiTop0sf5WMPUP2kfR33vE0QtnamYERrUqNEMJ4gEhMSJGMX_AGZg3uDTGFBXAr9Ef9ETnacNgtCyAxmMbNoJvl0MkLDn_WcHvw6D8akCreGffiER-O6BYHd9bkVjbcJZwZ0TS3uodWpkbL_UVEdveqLRIWpc6pHuX9lyybO7vw2L_MLRFMRHPM1MOI8jkQXbullHQSw8wrt7uKiCv-LM6oIbQEIzFahHfTRjF0FBlv6pLnbk4Z2e8wMq3sL9ZnKd8SJFtbJmlS9RjjA552EbqlCGczsS)

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: Freedom is Prevailing in Florida
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jlV0ENQ_wx6VhC-tie7Pyz9V4p-znZVhREJUlgplfvTVknwC8IllVhhNpM2BD7TlkncELqsFlcbbtXBFrtC0i-pZHdMkr2upZVvGgR9GphoFGyYA_sjG8YcRSQth7iJjdld1J7pK3U-vfqJOCVJbgcH0uyWCtTNFqWd5fQ6ROUaPIjuT0cN78gyt4W1ac5Lf9cTKEyFDRsY=&c=KzGu5x3dPwCjCRSene642YZy7WfWW6g_Dxj1BnAT1wtdWOROo-i8mg==&ch=-4kU3a9UmXKurMCN5JCD6bOe4QMgUj5PY0Q2oSS8FiWZfiy7yEawuw==)
---
| Peter,
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, Florida is the freest state in the United States. But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive. Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices. With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID. Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse. As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida. Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is hold those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable. He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude. Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems. Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become. Get ready, Florida - Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you. Sincerely, Casey DeSantis
---

clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, Florida is the freest state in the United States. But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive. Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices. With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID. Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse. As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida. Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is hold those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable. He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude. Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems. Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become. Get ready, Florida - Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you. Sincerely, Casey DeSantis | | == | == == == | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | | | | | Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 | | Sent by mailto:info@rondesantis.com

subject: Why I'm running

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e6dba5af418af95/2492b907f3e829fbc3d6b838967d376c/37793)

# **Friend — A couple of days ago, we celebrated the men and women of law enforcement on Law Enforcement Appreciation Day. **

---
I’m grateful for our law enforcement officers in Georgia, and across the country. They work around the clock to keep our communities and families safe. They deserve our full support, and one of the reasons I’m running for the U.S. Senate is to ensure they have it. **Will you stand with me to Back The Blue? **
---
[**STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e6dba5af418af95/1d1e81d9982f483ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Democrats have unleashed a violent crime wave on America with their support of the defund the police movement. Raphael Warnock has enabled it every step of the way, and he has a long history of demeaning law enforcement. [**That has no place in the U.S. Senate, and it ends if you stand with me.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e6dba5af418af95/9adfe222e82b8920c3d6b838967d376c/37793) I will ALWAYS support the men and women in law enforcement, and I’m proud to have the support of 76 sheriffs across all of Georgia. I hope you’ll stand with us.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e6dba5af418af95/bf7f0a74b8093225c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e6dba5af418af95/4c81de8bb19c63b7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/1e6dba5af418af95/3d824c4d0b9f0ef2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. Peter,

Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. led with fearless determination in the face of adversity – never backing down on the right for civil rights and equality.

Michele has strived to embody the determination of Dr. King throughout this campaign and her entire time in public service. Because as the lone Black and queer person in the Florida state legislature, she's experienced firsthand the need to fight for ALL people – no matter their skin color, background, sexual orientation, or zip code.

That's why we hope you will join us in honoring Dr. King through volunteer opportunities we've got going on over the next few days:

Louis DeJoy’s delays, cutbacks, and sabotage were a key piece of Trump and the GOP's direct assault on mail-in voting -- and they're only getting worse.

But now, the USPS Board of Governors will meet TODAY for the first time since Joe Biden nominated replacements for two Trump loyalists -- and **_Democratic strategists need to know where you stand:_**

**Please -- we need 50,000 more responses by midnight, but we’re still missing yours!**

Peter —

When I talk to folks here in the Second Congressional District and all across Nebraska, I hear over and over again that voting rights are a top concern — and I couldn’t agree more.

That’s why I was so disappointed to see that my opponent, Don Bacon, voted against the most recent historic voting rights legislation in the House of Representatives. [_**Will you sign my petition today to send a strong message to Don Bacon and his Republican colleagues that there is real support from folks in Nebraska and all across the country for major voting rights legislation?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623248/325185648/-1587436743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY5M2YwNS1mZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jy6ykTFbZWiTWbP8cxAOL0mjzYFFKQuRqiRktO0souw=&emci=bdc0d438-e273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ef93f05-fe73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12219043)
| [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623249/325185650/-1587436743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY5M2YwNS1mZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jy6ykTFbZWiTWbP8cxAOL0mjzYFFKQuRqiRktO0souw=&emci=bdc0d438-e273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ef93f05-fe73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12219043)
---
The right to vote is the cornerstone of our democracy, but for too long this right has been inaccessible for so many in our country, disproportionately affecting low-income folks and people of color. When I am elected as Nebraska’s first Black Congresswoman, I will always fight for the issues that matter to my constituents, starting with real voting rights reform. [_**Until then, I hope you will add your name today to show real grassroots support for this critical issue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623250/325185651/-1587436743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY5M2YwNS1mZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jy6ykTFbZWiTWbP8cxAOL0mjzYFFKQuRqiRktO0souw=&emci=bdc0d438-e273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ef93f05-fe73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12219043)
| [SIGN NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623251/325185652/-1587436743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY5M2YwNS1mZTczLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jy6ykTFbZWiTWbP8cxAOL0mjzYFFKQuRqiRktO0souw=&emci=bdc0d438-e273-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ef93f05-fe73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12219043)

He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to keep this open seat red with Devin Nunes stepping down. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. subject: Breaking News ----
body:
Congressional Frontrunner TinaRamirez Announces Candidacy for Virginia’s12th Senate District. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=8d86f7ec69&e=ae0ea222da)
---
|
**Redistricted Congressional Frontrunner Tina Ramirez Announces Candidacy for Virginia’s 12th Senate District**
**Chesterfield, VA** \- After careful consideration of the recently finalized Virginia redistricting lines, Tina Ramirez is announcing her candidacy for Virginia’s new 12th State Senate District. Tina was the clear frontrunner for the Republican nomination in the former Virginia 7th Congressional District, having outraised all opponents, garnered national media attention, and hosted one of the largest launch parties in Virginia history with over 500 people in Chesterfield County. Tina remains committed to serving and to honoring the tremendous outpouring of grassroots support she’s received. For this reason, she has decided to run for Virginia’s newly formed 12th Senate District to represent the people of Chesterfield County. Under the new redistricted maps, Tina was drawn into the 1st Congressional District, currently held by Republican Rep. Rob Wittman, who has Tina’s full support.

_The following quote is all attributable to Tina Ramirez_ :
**“I made the decision to run for office with the goal of putting a check on liberal policies that are taking away our rights and freedoms, making our schools about education again, and getting government out of the way of our businesses and entrepreneurs. I have fought for our most fundamental freedoms around the world and I am committed to defending them against government overreach here at home as well so my daughter can grow up in an America that remains a beacon of freedom to people everywhere. Over the past 7 months, I have been humbled by the overwhelming wave of support I have received in pursuit of this goal. I am thrilled to carry this fight forward to State Senate District 12 and to represent my neighbors in Chesterfield.”**
---

# [Tell the January 6th Committee to Subpoena Rep. Jim Jordan. Sign Now >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78d7c66b-d39d-40d8-b292-b5de57dc4d5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Republican Congressman and one of Trump’s closest allies, Jim Jordan, is refusing to cooperate with the January 6th Committee about his involvement in the January 6th Capitol riots. For months, Jim Jordan insisted he had “nothing to hide” when it came to his role in the planning of the January 6th attacks. But now that the committee has asked him for information, he’s changed his mind. Enough of this crap. If he won’t come willingly, it’s time to force him to. We know Jim Jordan was involved in meetings that led up to the events on January 6th. Americans need to know the truth and the full extent of Jim Jordan’s involvement. He must be forced to testify. [Sign your name to tell the January 6th Committee to subpoena Jim Jordan >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75b6eb44-a65e-4a55-b675-1c8881abf685/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: It is clear – DeSantis will dramatically restrict abortion

body:
it’ll take all of us working together to throw him out of office |

**NEW TODAY**
**Politico: Florida Republicans craft restrictive abortion law Democrats have little power to stop**
Friend, _I’m worried about Florida if Gov. DeSantis remains in office._

In July, **Ron DeSantis asked the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade**. Today, Politico reports that DeSantis “broadly suggested support for any measure that limits access to abortion.”

We know that DeSantis won’t stop at restricting reproductive rights. He’s also limited voting rights, refused to tackle climate change, and allowed COVID to spread through Florida unchallenged.

The past four years have shown his true colors, and I don’t want to find out what will happen if he wins reelection -- and then runs for president.

But I can’t defeat him on my own. No one can. Instead, it’ll take a huge, statewide movement to toss Gov. DeSantis out of office, which is why I’m writing this email.

Yesterday, my team shared that we need to raise another $20,000 by January 15th. Then this morning, my Finance Team told me we were off to a slow start. But then an incredible thing happened: many of you stepped up and contributed, and we’re almost back on track to hitting our goal.

**[If you can chip in today (any amount will be appreciated), we’ll be able to catch up. You’ve never let me down, and I’m grateful for your continued support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623832/325187937/668392057?refcode=20220112_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjI3NzRhNS0wMTc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PrURWzUV_7Ern0u4wsdgMlDyM6nmvJ4iDSAnDh-psbQ=)**

Over the past year, the integrity of our democracy has been repeatedly challenged — making it even more imperative that we protect the right to vote.

Yesterday, President Biden and Vice President Harris called on the Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. I join them in urging the Senate to pass these key pieces of legislation.

**Nothing — not even the filibuster — must get in the way of defending this crucial right.** [_**If you agree, I hope you will add your name to my petition telling the Senate that they must pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act swiftly.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623872/325188171/165576707?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM3M2QzMy0wMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRpJJ6CN_hIk-eOnExsVyg4tDJI5aSVU_6rGzyR8AtM=&emci=a3efdc8a-fc73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3ac73d33-0274-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14239920)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Two steps forward, one step back
body:
I wish I could say I’m shocked that more than a dozen schools in the Portland area are now shut down due to Covid and staffing shortages.
---
| | Dear Peter,

I’ve been raising the alarm about keeping schools open for the better part of a year. I’ve pointed out the problems, laid out ideas to prevent this, and repeatedly brought this up in the course of my campaign. So I wish I could say I’m shocked that [**more than a dozen schools in the Portland area are now shut down due to Covid and staffing shortages**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623967/325188816/1201444733?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE5Y2NlOC0wMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OiXz-jnl5NchbdXfqIraTDaSfepGlRzvtPs6qxpSAj0=&emci=f1044f8a-ff73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0319cce8-0274-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126). Unfortunately, the list is likely to grow in the coming days.

**But the truth is it didn’t have to come to this.** The lack of preparation and forthright planning has been the name of the game since March 2020. It was forgivable then. All of us were scrambling to figure out how to respond to a once in a generation crisis, but we’re two years into this thing.

**Enough with the excuses. And enough with the lack of urgency from the Legislature and the State of Oregon.**

In December [**I put forward a plan**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40623969/325188818/-963274027?s=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE5Y2NlOC0wMjc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OiXz-jnl5NchbdXfqIraTDaSfepGlRzvtPs6qxpSAj0=&emci=f1044f8a-ff73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0319cce8-0274-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126) to prepare for the omicron surge and keep our schools open. It called for expanded testing, updated testing protocols, and vaccine mandates for teachers, staff and students. And as omicron surged, the state dithered.

Our students, families, faculty, and staff deserve to know that there is a firm plan in place. **They deserve to know that _someone_ is looking ahead and working to give them stability and put the interests of students and teachers first.** Oregon needs a Governor who will lead, who will bring people together, to plan ahead, and make tough choices. It’s time to get beyond managing through crises and start planning to avert them.

Thank you,

---

---

name: Tom Perez

body:
We close the books on our first-ever public filing deadline in less than 6 hours, and frankly, we're coming up short of our goal.

Team,

I know we've emailed you a lot, and it's getting late, so I'll keep this short:

We close the books on our first-ever public filing deadline in less than 5 hours, and frankly, we're coming up short of our goal.

**I truly cannot stress this enough: This deadline is make-or-break for our campaign.** Everyone will see our numbers in a matter of days and judge the strength of our campaign accordingly.

If you can, **_[please chip in $10 to help meet our goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40624120/325190043/-262818907?refcode=bpi_em_20220112-Filing-Deadline-7-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2JhYzRiYS0wMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4uzdIcp_-xEGrf2rJWD1_LsWczVosi_ehvNzdLl_Qs=)_** and put us in the best possible position to succeed.

I truly cannot stress this enough: This deadline is make-or-break for our campaign. Everyone will see our numbers in a matter of days and judge the strength of our campaign accordingly. Hi Peter,

**My name is Jeff Bartos—I’m a husband, a father, an actual lifelong Pennsylvanian, born and raised in Berks County, PA, and I’m running as a Republican for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**

I was tired of campaign conservatives, opportunists, and carpetbaggers embedding themselves in this crucial race at a critical moment in our commonwealth, and countryー _[**that’s why to prove my Pennsylvania and Conservative credentials, I put together my ‘Pennsylvania First’ plan >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=556e6fc011284216b386008ac62d1b68&_e=adoId6DEkKrLbRm5AI1JplkuCjxwal54AnCNIvFUas48hwUyyS_l17oK2wMxaREU9nEfycq0j0vHa38p78-kCzzDfcQwKP0bD5w-ibYFAhe0U8zRozESFJHb2h-jDGmeRwWe_Nzc30Pj77QBHMURknsAQ-EPXfiykDn7Jdifxv71-sB-0JtmriMM30q04wpSKVxkm7VLACxdD4Jsre0dPpf0lcDV0ZBXMEPXj8O-TSiSJxW9kBTOzSnZlhy_e3ck3-ClgTszpCXr-F94nlRsTx3U3JrOU4QcaNOBXLyysSnTXLilA_RA0uYMeuhsX70o0ZucODZPxP6uh17N04ffvTTIq6P9SYQQU8LLzYH_4ZsdL5zGNKymyuzpKRxp_1_6AJCTEeYZphrq8b2-bBiictBCiCJ-Mknn60a65CmrDCNElyl3SzzxDBIhZrVT2sB_4kAfd2S-0uq9ueb8wGkabnC3lfnu1DDTjhu6-JisSpmJuHia35pBzf3yRm2MnSUX)__[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=556e6fc011284216b386008ac62d1b68&_e=adoId6DEkKrLbRm5AI1JplkuCjxwal54AnCNIvFUas48hwUyyS_l17oK2wMxaREUmC60UywnBoDwPBczqQpoueIHc4uyZulZYO0b7jD93Thc1X_YozRJJQ_gZltzOgZHNEKevs-L-Su3WHzcu9qx0voBiDfg9Rmy3V5DHebmQWg8T2E5127vnP4q0O0R0m-V81PPvLbDnCEdok_swDIJQmRx-Ohgwa0QSNWlrnE5St5OuIvID5geYZF5kUqnNp2Y8Nch4UDfKLpPhV6vJBUXStt3etsCM13SxmjEkJZb9Kok04Pgc69Q0F0gfgTCyEzmeV_Zt-j2XDS9jImVNrlwXw30zYvCcsLBjIBpjA04t1RJ8ZUYgs9nfbEq4QEAzgLdoPGgJ-6XUgekcSDUcuuxsF1hvVGbUfmIsDY0KXL1LskNRxJhAE90XwMHzLD-84KlMIruls3yY6dE922I-41AP2hVSuGkdvEqK-oWPHUSYW6EdAtZ8Jno3jZ-X1WeDh6I)_

What does my ‘Pennsylvania First’ plan entail?
**‘Pennsylvania First’ Plan:**
✅ Eliminate vaccine mandates and other costly mandates on small businesses.
✅ Hold China accountable and protect American jobs.
✅ Oppose any radical attempts to ‘Defund the Police.’
✅ Always stand up and defend the Second Amendment.
✅ Ensure every Pennsylvanian knows their vote counts, and the system is fair.
✅ Make it easy for everyone to vote and impossible to cheat.
✅ Cut Washington’s spending and eliminate bureaucratic waste.
✅ Protect Pennsylvania’s key industries: Energy & Agriculture.
✅ And that’s just the start!
[**PUT PENNSYLVANIA FIRST AGAIN!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=556e6fc011284216b386008ac62d1b68&_e=adoId6DEkKrLbRm5AI1JplkuCjxwal54AnCNIvFUas48hwUyyS_l17oK2wMxaREU9nEfycq0j0vHa38p78-kCzzDfcQwKP0bD5w-ibYFAhe0U8zRozESFJHb2h-jDGmeRwWe_Nzc30Pj77QBHMURknsAQ-EPXfiykDn7Jdifxv71-sB-0JtmriMM30q04wpSKVxkm7VLACxdD4Jsre0dPpf0lcDV0ZBXMEPXj8O-TSiSJxW9kBTOzSnZlhy_e3ck3-ClgTszpCXr-F94nlRsTx3U3JrOU4QcaNOBXLyysSlbf8rSp4YGtvExsMCLCXp6L3aggXgSbew9VYE9yoxa0PMAfJzJgiIiwMiLNJ14mEhMFNLPNCGUEITP0ro7dofe6vC1ICxcSaY41Jj0GJdkTcRrwZLr6wt5XvnRBlTaLL9m48Fgm0uIJ4Vh1verNEKFKZH8N_ttU9ABdnOavE-CNR4-6pgmG3--iI1h6Al_KvDqrbt95nmIsB4lj94L79Us)
I know you’re probably wondering who I am and why this politician is emailing youー _**well, that’s the great thing, I'm NOT a politician!**_

_Let me tell you how this political outsider came to run for office and why I’m the right choice to take on the Washington machine._
I’m not a career politician who has spent their life in Washington.

I’ve spent my life _building businesses_ , _creating jobs_ , and _carving out my own American dream_.

I’m proud to have created tons of great jobs right here in Pennsylvania and help other PA families realize their own American dream.

That’s why I’m offended to see celebrities and opportunists walk into our state and try to take advantage of this race.

In the GOP Primary for Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate Seat, I stand alone as the only candidate with meaningful ties to the state and a proven conservative record.

My proven conservative credentials and long history in the state make me stand out in a crowd of carpetbaggers with no history of standing up for the conservative positions they now claim to espouse.

Further, I'm the only candidate actually from PA which means I have a real-world understanding of Pennsylvania’s communities to offer a cohesive plan for the state. While other candidates move here, treating our seat like an At-Large district, I know Pennsylvania is unique, and I’m prepared to lead.

**_[Pitch in to help me Put Pennsylvania First Again >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=556e6fc011284216b386008ac62d1b68&_e=adoId6DEkKrLbRm5AI1JplkuCjxwal54AnCNIvFUas48hwUyyS_l17oK2wMxaREU9nEfycq0j0vHa38p78-kCzzDfcQwKP0bD5w-ibYFAhe0U8zRozESFJHb2h-jDGmeRwWe_Nzc30Pj77QBHMURknsAQ-EPXfiykDn7Jdifxv71-sB-0JtmriMM30q04wpSKVxkm7VLACxdD4Jsre0dPpf0lcDV0ZBXMEPXj8O-TSiSJxW9kBTOzSnZlhy_e3ck3-ClgTszpCXr-F94nlRsTx3U3JrOU4QcaNOBXLyysSn0xQOPcRmOle67EVdHiZ0dNmUq8344AMfM968Wwk_pbTEqQJaaPwmzmL3QBve1TU_8PwpEX8QY5EVT3sn1t-itp2BN8LRWrdF3o3wqe3sLUNJBL0gVp6rdf8MISSikrdrSueEQj90KqOVIOJi-OeznjDhYjQJTPcb8V3in8IKvQTDZgyjjft24_LkmiAKqe9aRZ5OK-ZRBmdFK3KR94ShR)_**

clean_body: Tired of campaign conservatives, opportunists, and carpetbaggers embedding themselves... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | | THERE’S ONE MAN WHO WILL ALWAYS PUT PA FIRST! He fought for Pennsylvania before, and he’ll do it again in the Senate! | Hi Peter, My name is Jeff Bartos—I’m a husband, a father, an actual lifelong Pennsylvanian, born and raised in Berks County, PA, and I’m running as a Republican for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. I was tired of campaign conservatives, opportunists, and carpetbaggers embedding themselves in this crucial race at a critical moment in our commonwealth, and countryー What does my ‘Pennsylvania First’ plan entail? ‘Pennsylvania First’ Plan: ✅ Eliminate vaccine mandates and other costly mandates on small businesses. ✅ Hold China accountable and protect American jobs. ✅ Oppose any radical attempts to ‘Defund the Police.’ ✅ Always stand up and defend the Second Amendment. ✅ Ensure every Pennsylvanian knows their vote counts, and the system is fair. ✅ Make it easy for everyone to vote and impossible to cheat. ✅ Cut Washington’s spending and eliminate bureaucratic waste. ✅ Protect Pennsylvania’s key industries: Energy & Agriculture. ✅ And that’s just the start! I know you’re probably wondering who I am and why this politician is emailing youー well, that’s the great thing, I'm NOT a politician! Let me tell you how this political outsider came to run for office and why I’m the right choice to take on the Washington machine. I’m not a career politician who has spent their life in Washington. I’ve spent my life building businesses , creating jobs , and carving out my own American dream. I’m proud to have created tons of great jobs right here in Pennsylvania and help other PA families realize their own American dream. That’s why I’m offended to see celebrities and opportunists walk into our state and try to take advantage of this race. In the GOP Primary for Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate Seat, I stand alone as the only candidate with meaningful ties to the state and a proven conservative record. My proven conservative credentials and long history in the state make me stand out in a crowd of carpetbaggers with no history of standing up for the conservative positions they now claim to espouse. Further, I'm the only candidate actually from PA which means I have a real-world understanding of Pennsylvania’s communities to offer a cohesive plan for the state. While other candidates move here, treating our seat like an At-Large district, I know Pennsylvania is unique, and I’m prepared to lead. name: Kolin Kearns
subject: Tell the Senate: Reform the filibuster & protect voting rights
body:
| | Friend, **Yesterday, President Biden delivered remarks in Atlanta to elevate the urgent push for federal voting-rights protections.** Now, it’s time for him to deliver results. **In his speech, the president finally endorsed Senate rules reforms fighting back against relentless Republican obstruction.** With his support for a voting rights “carve-out” on the filibuster, this could be a turning point in our efforts to safeguard the right to vote and save our democracy. This comes just after Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer vowed to bring filibuster reform to a Senate vote by January 17. These next few days will be pivotal in the movement for voting rights. Can we count on you to speak out? [Act now: Urge your senators to reform the filibuster so we can save our democracy from extreme voter suppression.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40624332/325191576/-1226680468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGM4Y2MyYS0wNDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6eorKaoUxH9tdNPyDclWKUwXNYpdtRSt4JJAqvYjebU=&emci=dcc8cc2a-0474-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ddc8cc2a-0474-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6787172) **Let’s be clear — Senate Democrats have the power to change and even abolish the filibuster.** The filibuster did not exist when the Senate was first established, and in recent decades it’s been modified 161 times. In 2017, Mitch McConnell amended the filibuster so he could pack the Supreme Court — allowing Trump to install three extreme justices with lifetime terms. If the GOP can make an exception to the filibuster to fill the judiciary with right-wing judges, why can’t Democrats do so to protect all Americans’ voting rights? Critical pieces of legislation like the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act have already passed the House of Representatives — it’s the filibuster, and Senate Democrats unwilling to do what’s right, that’s stopping them from becoming law. **The Democratic majority in Congress was elected to pass popular, necessary legislation to make Americans’ lives better. The filibuster is an antiquated, anti-democratic tool to hold back that progress, and it must be removed.** We can’t afford to waste any more time. [Write to your senators: Reform the filibuster so we can finally pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40624333/325191577/1502202887?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGM4Y2MyYS0wNDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6eorKaoUxH9tdNPyDclWKUwXNYpdtRSt4JJAqvYjebU=&emci=dcc8cc2a-0474-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ddc8cc2a-0474-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6787172) Thank you, Kolin Kearns
National Digital Campaigns Manager
NextGen America

Thank you, Kolin Kearns National Digital Campaigns Manager NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: Freedom is Prevailing in Florida
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qdbwKpKa1PMF2JbTNiJbedXb2htUMZ7ZfdmFlySUR6CqZNF54oupjf9eu8dXvBxf5m81L8ZDaiENZcCOg_VQS7wh81OkPNQNO0jjWpfj7_0FLQvS_UcFcaqabXOFjK0oBOubq-CHe-4F5EFF_gYNIJiW4kZYvLRn7Gp-bb7rUZqB3dcbfHQpEbyvd5sbys0mSt5j9Gjts0U=&c=IBdOL_23O_UQSpo8P9h-gB5kPbMe-wV4bFK7Tw37Z5_-B-JA4mtYNg==&ch=FQpCeQgi-Bu71X2EiAhYzuQUJSgRRjXvq5x-zLipDELY7kvQozdY0Q==)
---
| Peter,
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, Florida is the freest state in the United States. But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive. Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices. With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID. Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse. As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida. Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is hold those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable. He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude. Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems. Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become. Get ready, Florida - Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you. Sincerely, Casey DeSantis
---

clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, Florida is the freest state in the United States. But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive. Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices. With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID. Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse. As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida. Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is hold those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable. He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude. Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems. Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become. Get ready, Florida - Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you. Sincerely, Casey DeSantis | | == | == == == | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | | | | | Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 | | Sent by mailto:info@rondesantis.com

| Friend,
I want to again wish you and your family a very Happy New Year!
Despite our great challenges, I am truly optimistic about 2022. I believe Americans have had enough of the Left's radical agenda and will vote to put Republicans back in control in Washington so we can turn things around for our country and for Texas. Are you with me?

name: BREAKING REDISTRICTING UPDATE (via Team Cranley-Fedor)
subject: 🚨 The OH Supreme Court just handed Republicans a DEFEAT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
It was clear to everyone involved that the GOP’s new district maps were a blatant partisan gerrymander. | **_BREAKING: Ohio Supreme Court strikes down state House and Senate maps_** Friend — Mike DeWine violated his oath when he signed off on the GOP’s new district maps. John Cranley never will. It was painfully clear from the start that the GOP’s district maps were a _blatant_ partisan gerrymander. Although Ohio voters twice called for a nonpartisan process, **corrupt GOP legislators ignored our people** and drew maps to protect their majorities no matter what. Now, the state Supreme Court has THROWN OUT Republicans’ legislative maps and given our redistricting commission 10 days to fix their mistake. But we know we can’t trust the GOP redistricting commissioners as far as we can throw them. **All they care about is maintaining their stranglehold on power — we HAVE to hold them accountable.** **[We need 500 committed defenders of our democratic process to join us in the next 24 hours. Sign our petition immediately to CONDEMN Republican gerrymandering and DEMAND fair maps>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40624627/325200817/688570379?refcode=ea.aa04a7ef-0774-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.aa04a7ef-0774-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTA0YTdlZi0wNzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpleEeKeF686aAVQuXLT5_SQL3XCdl3hq8AgOoXSf68=&emci=d91be099-fd73-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=aa04a7ef-0774-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=22604289)** Look, Republicans have made one thing abundantly clear: They’re willing to go to any measure they can get away with to hold onto power — no matter what the voters want. And what is it that the voters want? **Nonpartisan redistricting and _fair representation._** **[As governor, John will always defend and uphold the will of the people. Joe Biden and the Democrats have proven to be a disaster for America. | Everything is at stake, this year Peter. We must mount our strongest effort yet to help Republicans nationwide win tremendous turnaround victories and seize majorities from the Biden-Harris Democrats.

That’s what it’s going to take to bring the disastrous, socialist, open borders Democrat agenda to a screeching halt - **and set up the opportunity to retake the White House in 2024.**

But to achieve everything we need between now and next November to make this historic reversal, we’re counting on our most committed supporters **[to renew their 2022 Membership Card RIGHT NOW.](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=21b9008898dd44b09e6166a0ddb6803e&_e=FOfTyhwnOxK4hHccI4sfDcEAGTWJ-ds6oOc0gaeC9COuaUYKe5HOiPNKQhwq3lnYEJqslahPcNbdQjEc1QY21LXLPR3OSP22kXLtah_HooZYcM7gg1gmEPTMw_liSlsYrM74_9E1xooMtkc47UmYc5vPPBf93OYC72Rld3e5PSRL-e47ZQ-wgkJuufL49RV3vUYGJcACTI4r-1gCFlNntPHxPKmgQMLY6bsThNZldD44Lgv8g7doPDfGbBCT-7_qB8Y-Ysxqj2vThAYbyNzwGh-5F7pAyxTxLdHYqNk6lqhgmkYzpXo1kV5rMG07p7rXNeKHnpgXjDxKd_IHtJH1lalxratERSLrTbk1MIrU_ERlglOUvc3YWKR3lEEwUnwOUO1Sk0Zml7CeKfVeOnUlgw%3D%3D)**

Joe Biden and the Democrats have proven to be a disaster for America. They STOPPED all the progress we made on the border wall under President Trump, opened our borders and allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood into our country.

That’s just the beginning, too, Peter - they’re rolling out their radical schemes to further shrink our freedoms and increase their control over America:
_
1. Passing legislation to make it even easier to cheat in elections with their absurdly named “For the People Act” ...
2. Conniving to further erode our Second Amendment rights by increasing background checks and banning whole classes of firearms...
3. Cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline, reducing American energy output, importing more oil from overseas, and driving up prices for workers and families...
4. Pushing disastrous plans to “Defund the Police” and further divide our people over identity politics pandering...
_

---
Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvlkoC49D0lpBKShWYYHYufV_P4hEqNoCIRRQ21YIkdcjOew3O4VY09eiIinzLnNNB6cQT-EI_Vq_lBhxiGlvlVCAhgzERQxN9Mz-fDEDAxHaYWJ_inPK6tZFrW9cOxe3XjDrx_hXyUzAwzcv9niFLf9ZMlfY5iXedyfRiAMfG1R84_Fky-FAVb9BYy1r6G5sMIKfjx8yg4LSPJIJJqvQYmf3CCmQGoWUR_1ChzCaxjkbU)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district_!

When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvlg15ml_NZA3wpFS5yJqbO_sQm5zlkLZSWY7TGzL6kMzEmEOYf4GwWLAQWOrAcmNxCRA42v4fyF8TXcSnxp877UYtDAIf2nDaeIYVYX83snXJRYmgZMhgCvWZ3g-ht5vRdth_SeWLOlUR6OmpL8kYkw0WaZL0XZilhYANiKXkpqnRJ6_SQvYH2inOIs1Pr8FRQCOFipnY5GAFeUNR_-S1d4NQI2F0qyNDYIH51fxybme3)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority.**

Can you think of anyone better to be the Republican Party's spokesperson on border issues than a resident of a border community? I can't.

That's why w**e must do everything that we personally can** do to help Monica succeed in her congressional race.

But none of this can happen without **[YOUR HELP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvlj4MOhX9t--nYO54R5hltc60Cn17tN8k55ApHfZsdo0ucu_7HiBtRchWF792rI6NLSdJvVhIjvUzU-zeIJaUQEAj4riUAwQJAWYoIkn7AWoOwioKYOT7PVrzk3X0mAjv_pXspeA0tzJCvAChiMtyW_2nteeT8QjVdssU1UZnKg1RfUimKPxVV24NR5-XtnGB8WxcvexjMTVPU8Z3Pw7M72362ba7NpByupbpgw_WylCN)**.

**[Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I know? She has my full support, now I need my supporters to have her back too.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvlg0AFEq2BoF9Q6jnX_socAwOjggioSqF-n20JXXZjbmCRc8L9hZ19pSyzxtMPNRKoop6ZoyPFKLws_0wI1okiIgjQYqFGDRSIYIH20HfsJfHAL-s-tFbG4NyMtFalNw_DyZ8mefQAXtnYLZ236pVPGG6P5WGNVzeDR5Bg3bh33b2pXZUVfiJNyPQH6d5Ei-CCyWxtx7Dzo7PuRJDgVQcPR8B4ZszUTRZJiHo7FgqzOm0)**

---

Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, and**I need her in Congress with me**.

Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream

Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an **excellent addition** to Congress.

[**Republicans only need to pick up five seats to win back the House next year, can I get you to chip in $25, $50, maybe even $100 towards Monica’s campaign so she can help us take back the House majority?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvlnEbrWsJPiqEVoCUrelzjQmSkboC1gTBa_FKF1KOcrWAaVZE0lsBdEs8TmVl91uQeR9AjXhlvrumgylZtpu5dIM0CrKvvuGfbqn1o-0rZsBJXa81-5Lq3cWBZ9NvSrYpY1qRqYqjh5Qiyj_Iu-krcCQj6pN8oiz0M_nLlY8by30S2nEpIWXYSo7AL7WmcwbJ8Q9JWI_WP3EQ6hj0RfbPk4leHjev249ZvCJX_AcHXkD2)

I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. **I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people**.

[**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvltwjDvesEGI_NZL8MgnoCYXNUCekgaiDSbgf4qcwa6c0T5bfY8Y8f2k4KfVj_ipwC0oH8xGdDqPvWdHxIuuSo7GWFfzNeQiH-rVbIda8QwL6cV7NHBTdzHT-pI-4Ha8NOi4jZlehbE4ioI-Ey53IdhUTiHVkTUzvh1PRBU5OxHM68ToCFzK_WgAtD3iVkV-4ONcHIiHHQB6FpdBYlrIRHJSoJYFaWrxBJ8unpkm8_7Mg)

**[Can I count on you to support the entire party by joining me in backing Monica?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvliAxk4hu7oVFqEbUw6oKX330PR6-U3IOlJL3t9YgOdOD0_zAeJ79Eagwpk0Bd1TV5KyaINucgdLE1zHN_9V3uYL6jvByPreKZ3h8okddMeV5vGXM_ORhl2HRJ0heyliObsGcuxaduB7Pw_RrDz3jWA9_jViEDD1-OLyKrHgho78jBd5tWEj-8b9JQCbits7a6TAYz78mn2caDQStT1mJD5cZ_4N-n_kfJufITe--JC2A)**

Thank you
Rep. Dan Crenshaw

**P.S.** Monica is headed into a multi-way primary for the Republican Party's nomination and **[she sincerely needs your help today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a4e7c123d3e4cf5ba9a5c6ea9c94a48&_e=EMNUz13wLfLdKT7sqrC9vTHBPP7G8L0DPsCL5IvzkGj2UHBwQqb7xj_ssDgzTONj_7yFUl3gYWfr_wI8tMuAkcJRiqnISlWmxACVkKzCaUFubQ2_eQFjw6Je9B2jikRKilBaizgM2z5orWCixXjL2mSLe8BNf1eMYadkGmIzfn7Z714vHA9qosBxPC-Tq_7NOkinK3UmlT2bLseDPxaPr_SGWoXQyQ8vUWWdOGqdyPAPhb4WUqohaxZnvOkvmsurmtn_t4xpOqK9Y36lzeCvlhaJnm31uQ8VUaO0p2Hb2RPTzJ-O1Z_r_5Q9WWPLjLOpestRELUVbLX8HZ1sAV1vria7eI0Fk5iKtajQynm-AXJ2FrFLr49g57nc5g2qn8K_O-t3VgXKIeM0VamziMi44FjItLMjRSI-JfDnTp3r_bZLyaE8jUa7smMLt5-xtTHmXKt9iRHexpj89WVQFF7m9HmO5wyEH5X5aHv48WnW7uisVOH3JXUfGjTnSHuYXTmR)**. body:

| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=9a77f10d37104797bbec7a861d3a6817&_e=agM1u_p9NqLhIuVBR8HI9ywZzPxqKncFi-dvBoyD1Bsj564I1Qu7pRWTG3NoyGWiKNOaV_s0AggrO4CnKMP2A7iMXROpOiPuXhZiGqspXxaEn-IqNzikBJdaX2U7mJmWlYYwGAjEMhFBdhIlN3X__nAuoyHORoP1JCI2qUBmsJyfWmlzqyYMLHVaTHE5gKyLiQRUieLfygT8IqN7L4-tZoQlYwTMJnENfcjMxXrGlyVEkm8KcsHqdKHoE8czolhpZ3rRkNRZOb1vHGm5fe4kmZgtUN180ERV1KmTP6UJIfopMnnMJmuVEAXYCJjR78O3LecXKiDwzbQVFb3DA2vVxmruSomp_6nW2tWOTOYVhubXz8hFmJIOIe3pGlYXqmRvLd3XpeMMfPAQVxWYQnSj8hUNU8aCVj61qx1iPbRm5679XZf9LHkndq78pzYBpAxr1wg7s8_HvKhocCw5Lm0VQXDaGbCjtdFWxaN6zO1iSj326NwcAuXeRpAe0NYmeSZmjx93VJyy0KhNYMj3r_2f8Q%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
Nancy Pelosi is gearing up to spend her DCCC’s $131 million war chest right here in Texas.
---
_She knows our brand-new 38th congressional district that my good friend Captain Wesley Hunt is running for will END her majority._
---

body:
It's officially election year and November will be here before we know it. With election experts calling our race a "toss-up" and three Republican challengers already running against me, we need to kick things into high gear in order to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40624989/325210993/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc1NWQxZC0wYzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=06_bJ68hxG1xQTiuh8KLujnmNfugoxSJC9yPAIfdw9w=&emci=c73497c5-e473-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=76755d1d-0c74-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

It's officially election year and November will be here before we know it. With election experts calling our race a "toss-up" and three Republican challengers already running against me, we need to kick things into high gear in order to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority.

But running any campaign isn't cheap and our race will be one of the most expensive congressional races in the country. After redistricting, we have over 150,000 new voters to reach in the redrawn 8th congressional district, so we need to make sure we have the resources to hit the road and reach voters in every corner of our newly drawn district.

One of the ways you can help make the biggest impact on this campaign is by becoming a monthly donor. Knowing my team and I can count on your support every month – whether it's $1, $5, or $25 – helps us plan our budget and ensure we're prepared for whatever national Republicans and our opponents throw our way.

**[Will you commit to a monthly recurring donation to my campaign from now until Election Day? Your sustained support will help us protect my seat and our Democratic House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40624990/325210994/-1046294633?refcode=em22_220112_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220112_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc1NWQxZC0wYzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=06_bJ68hxG1xQTiuh8KLujnmNfugoxSJC9yPAIfdw9w=) ** | [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40624991/325210995/-1046294633?refcode=em22_220112_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220112_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc1NWQxZC0wYzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=06_bJ68hxG1xQTiuh8KLujnmNfugoxSJC9yPAIfdw9w=)

clean_body: Our campaign’s only public filing deadline is about to hit, and we are just a few hundred dollars away from reaching our goal. | = | Peter, I know that many members of my team and my family have been reaching out to you over the last few days. I wanted to reach out and make one last appeal before the deadline at 11:59 PM tonight. Our campaign’s only public filing deadline is about to hit, and we are just a few hundred dollars away from reaching our goal. I know we set an ambitious goal, but there’s a reason for that: I’m running as a bold progressive, so this campaign can’t shy away from bold goals and ideas. = | = I’m ready to get to work improving the education system, taking decisive action on climate change, and ensuring equal opportunities for all Marylanders — but first, I need your help to ensure I have the resources to build a winning campaign. Before midnight, we need to show that our campaign has what it takes to win this fight and bring real change to Maryland. = I’m depending on grassroots donors like you, Peter. If you’re committed to this campaign and the promise of a more just and equitable future in Maryland, now is the time to show it. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you as always for your support, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Ron Johnson (R-WI)
subject: Here is my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
I’ll keep this simple: I am running for re-election so that we can take back the Senate and save the country we so dearly love. Peter, **I’ll keep this simple: I am running for re-election so that we can take back the Senate and save the country we so dearly love.** As someone who spent over thirty years building a company, I understand the importance of hard work and I know what I need to accomplish in the U.S. Senate is far from over. Throughout my time in the U.S. Senate, I have worked tirelessly for transparency and accountability in government. I have defended freedom, worked to grow our economy and create more opportunity, put a halt to out-of-control deficit spending, strengthen our military, secure our border, and hold the Biden Administration accountable for their continued incompetence. I have never been afraid to speak important truths and push back against the lies, distortions, and false narratives of the radical left, mainstream media, and Big Tech. Because of my efforts and hard work, I have become target #1 of the left and their allies in the media. The biased news has continually smeared my name and twisted my words through a liberal prism, forcing me to continuously respond to lies that the _New York Times, Washington Post, Milwaukee Journal Sentinel, NBC News_ and others have published and broadcast. To win this campaign and keep this Senate seat in Republican hands, I will need your help. There is no doubt that Democrats and the media have set their sights on me and this Wisconsin U.S. Senate seat. I am their top target this cycle to expand their majority and implement the dangerous Biden Agenda. But their non-stop attacks will not deter me. I have defended freedom, worked to grow our economy and create more opportunity, put a halt to out-of-control deficit spending, strengthen our military, secure our border, and hold the Biden Administration accountable for their continued incompetence. I have never been afraid to speak important truths and push back against the lies, distortions, and false narratives of the radical left, mainstream media, and Big Tech. Because of my efforts and hard work, I have become target #1 of the left and their allies in the media. The biased news has continually smeared my name and twisted my words through a liberal prism, forcing me to continuously respond to lies that the New York Times, Washington Post, Milwaukee Journal Sentinel, NBC News and others have published and broadcast. To win this campaign and keep this Senate seat in Republican hands, I will need your help. There is no doubt that Democrats and the media have set their sights on me and this Wisconsin U.S. Senate seat. I am their top target this cycle to expand their majority and implement the dangerous Biden Agenda. But their non-stop attacks will not deter me. Can I count on you to join me? Together, we can do this! Ron Johnson | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
| | | **[We are in for the fight of our lives to protect our historic Democratic House Majority. That's why I'm reaching out to you today for your help and your $5. If you can give any amount today, you'll be helping us build the strongest foundation possible for the battle that lies ahead in 2022 - and we'll send you our brand new Membership Card as a token of our appreciation.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4AD~)**
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
It's hard for me to put into words how grateful I am for all of your support in defending our historic Democratic House Majority.

Every day, we get to work tirelessly on behalf of the American people - but this would have been impossible without your CRITICAL help.

And it's your support that will allow us to protect our Majority and our progress for years to come.

So I'm coming to you today with both gratitude and a request:

****[Will you give $5- or any amount - today to claim your new Membership Card and help our House Majority emerge victorious come Election Day 2022?](https://links.e.dccc.)****

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Scrappy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
A lot has happened in our race to flip Wisconsin's Senate seat blue, and I wanted to take a moment to bring you up to speed on what you need to know: Team —

A lot has happened in our race to flip Wisconsin's Senate seat blue, and I wanted to take a moment to bring you up to speed on what you need to know:

**First,** _The Cook Political Report_ upgraded Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up, and _Roll Call_ and _CNN_ both called Republican Senator Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent up for re-election.

**Then,** the latest head-to-head poll of our race showed I'm the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson, 48% to 46% — and we have a lot of room to expand our lead with Wisconsin voters.

**Now,** Ron Johnson announced he is officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin and he has moved quickly to launch two statewide TV ad buys to reach voters.

This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for our campaign, and I need your help to make sure we have the resources to get our message out to as many Wisconsinites as possible in the coming months. Ron Johnson isn’t waiting around, and we can’t either — we need to move now.

**[That's why I'm humbly asking you to consider chipping in to support our campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline. Early investments will be critical in a toss-up race like this one. Anything you can give will allow us to continue building up our early voter outreach program to make sure our message is reaching folks across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40625221/325214489/1928095881?refcode=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI4Mzk1ZC0wZDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLmkQ26FCDN1BwkJG3YXE5GFSr4ox2t4D7Z-xryIBxw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40625222/325214490/1928095881?refcode=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI4Mzk1ZC0wZDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLmkQ26FCDN1BwkJG3YXE5GFSr4ox2t4D7Z-xryIBxw=)

Ron Johnson has given up the fight for working families. Instead, he’s busy spreading vaccine misinformation, promoting conspiracy theories, covering up for the January 6 insurrectionists, and blocking relief for working Wisconsinites — all while deepening his own pockets and enriching his wealthy campaign donors.

Our state and our country deserve a better U.S. Senator who is looking out for your interests, not the special interests that are more than well-represented in Washington. That's why I got into this race.

I'm running to bring new leadership to Wisconsin. We need a Senator who will be as scrappy as they need to be to deliver on the kitchen table issues that matter most to workers and families — like guaranteed paid leave, lower prescription drug costs, affordable child care, good-paying union jobs, the right to vote, and an economy that works for everyone.

But beating a two-term incumbent won't be easy. Ron Johnson already has Donald Trump’s full endorsement in this race, and Mitch McConnell and his dark money network will pour millions into Wisconsin to protect the Republican incumbent.

I’m not accepting any corporate PAC money in this campaign — never have, never will. That means combatting the outside attacks from Johnson's allies will depend on the support of this incredible grassroots team. So, I’m asking:

**[Will you chip in any amount meaningful to you to help us flip this U.S. Senate seat from red to blue and expand our 50/50 Democratic Senate majority? With your help, we can make sure this is Ron Johnson's last year in office and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40625228/325214496/1928095881?refcode=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI4Mzk1ZC0wZDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLmkQ26FCDN1BwkJG3YXE5GFSr4ox2t4D7Z-xryIBxw=)**

Forward!

— Sarah

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest poll of the race. With your help, we can flip this seat blue. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40625229/325214497/1928095881?refcode=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220112_mm2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI4Mzk1ZC0wZDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLmkQ26FCDN1BwkJG3YXE5GFSr4ox2t4D7Z-xryIBxw=)
