name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: GOP Gubernatorial Debate - Tonight in Lawrence County
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=b1ec95759b&u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=b4d6a139e8)
---
| |
---
| | **A Message From Bill McSwain **
---
| Friend,

The second GOP Gubernatorial Debate is tonight in Lawrence County!

I'll take the stage at the Scottish Rite Cathedral in New Castle to make my case for protecting security, family, and freedom as Governor of Pennsylvania.

The event is a double header - Senate candidates are scheduled to debate first at 6pm, followed by Gubernatorial candidates starting at around 8pm. The debate will be livestreamed on the WKBN website, more information [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=71febc5413&e=b1ec95759b).

Can't watch the livestream? Be on the lookout for videos and highlights in your inbox later this week!

Our campaign to restore Liberty to our great Commonwealth is growing every day because of supporters like you. This is only the beginning!

Yours in the fight,

Bill McSwain
_Republican Candidate for Governor
U.S. Marine Commander
U.S. Attorney appointed by Trump_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Astorino?=
subject: New York is a mess
body:
I know I can fix our problems. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=7950b1e818&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

As we know all too well, New York is a mess. New Yorkers can’t afford another four years under Democrat control. Just last week, Governor Hochul touted her plan to spend, spend, and spend some more. Unfortunately for hard-working New Yorkers, that means she’s coming after you with higher taxes, fees, surcharges, and tolls.

It’s time to make it clear to her and the Democrats that we are not their ATM.

As a former 2-term Westchester County Executive, I am the only candidate who has the experience to force fiscal discipline, as I did for 8 years with a Democrat-lead County Legislature. I inherited a $1.8 billion budget and left my successor a $1.8 billion budget. And we never once raised taxes - in fact we cut them.

It took a spine of steel to constantly hold the line on spending and buck the special interest groups. I was successful because I always put taxpayers first.

I’m the only candidate that has proven time and again that I can win in blue areas of New York and deliver real results. I’m the only one in the race against Hochul with executive governing and private sector experience.

_Truth is, I need your support now, more than ever. I’m up against a major fundraising milestone. A contribution today means a lot and will help spread the word that New Yorkers will not stand for another four years of tax-and-spend policies and a radical Leftist agenda._
---

[ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=aa538e44c8&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=fbfe0e3d06&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $100 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=3c79134df9&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $250 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=874a270bb3&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $500 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=faa228aed2&e=3ca66fc65a)

---

[ CONTRIBUTE $1,000 ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=f0e24d0e7e&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| New York desperately needs help, and I know I can fix our problems. We can all agree that it is time for a change in Albany and better days are ahead for New York...but only if we change the cast of characters in charge.

[**Please consider contributing $25, $50, $100, or even as much as $500 today and join my fight to WIN NEW YORK.**](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=b79588167f&e=3ca66fc65a)

Thank you for your continued support and dedication to the state we love.

[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=0db12621d3&e=3ca66fc65a)
_**Rob Astorino**_
Former Westchester County Executive
Republican Candidate for Governor

---

[ SUPPORT ROB ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=57803467c1&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=9c3fd27e73&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Woke Bureaucrats, Broken Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | |
---
| | Friend,

For the last year, Loudoun County Parents have done what no one else could: show the entire world how broken and warped our kids’ education has become. Jennifer Wexton has said nothing and done nothing after a child was sexually assaulted on school grounds, the crime was covered up, and Loudoun County Schools failed to keep our children safe. We deserve a representative in Congress who will stand with parents, not with Loudoun’s woke School Board. In Congress, I will fight to keep our kids safe and ALWAYS PUT THEM FIRST.
---
| [Join Jeanine in taking the fight for parents all the way to Congress! ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=27af767664&e=fc83fb200d "Join Jeanine in taking the fight for parents all the way to Congress! ")
---
| Jennifer Wexton silently stood by while the School Board pushed Critical Race Theory and canceled advanced math classes. They even supported lawless Commonwealth Attorney Buta Biberja as she pushed her soft-on-crime agenda and put a rapist back in school with our kids.
I’m running to give parents a choice. We have been failed by state legislators who supported [HB 257.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ec00032ec1&e=fc83fb200d) We have been failed by woke school boards. We have been failed by Jennifer Wexton. In Congress, I’ll put parents and our kids before woke, soft on crime agendas. But I need your help to get there.
---

clean_body: | | | | We're approaching our goal Dear Friend, With the support of thousands of Marylanders all across our state, we are approaching our goal for tonight's critical deadline! We're now just $3,012 away! With inflation rising to a 40 year high, Marylanders all across the state are being impacted by the rapidly rising costs of goods and services. Now more than ever, we must continue to work toward making our state more affordable. Every single one of my opponents is proposing new pie-in-the-sky spending programs, which will drag us back to the failed tax and spend policies of the past. Maryland couldn't afford it then, and we certainly can't afford it now. As your governor, I will fight for you and your family every single day by holding the line on spending, opposing any tax increase, and delivering much-needed tax relief for Marylanders. But, we need your support before our biggest fundraising deadline so we can continue getting our message out. | | | | | | | Our campaign is supported by thousands of Marylanders all across our state who want to keep moving our state in the right direction. Your support means the world to me. Together, we can and will win and make history! Thank You, | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

## 5 Statements To Trigger The Left:
---
I just [tweeted](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2679835.1656.1.f9d92d75e5b54d7f406134913d1b000c) 5 Politically Incorrect Truths and the Left is losing their minds on [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2679835.1657.1.0a51ba6c65bdea01757b659c62c24578) right now. With the volume of Leftists reporting the [Tweet](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2679835.1658.1.02d27619dbe7daa6c5bb648432722f0f) there is a chance I might get suspended from [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2679835.1659.1.5c2e73ca2253e7d860c0e33bc3c67a56) or even banned. When I arrive in DC, I will continue to speak the Politically Incorrect **TRUTH** and _tackle_ Big Tech!
---

If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet and greet or a fundraiser, please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com

Jackson Lahmeyer

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The University of Georgia Bulldogs are NATIONAL CHAMPIONS! To celebrate, we’re giving away an autographed UGA jersey!
|
---
Peter -

**The University of Georgia Bulldogs are National Champions!**

The last time we won a National Championship, I was on the field playing alongside my fellow Dawgs.

I'm incredibly proud of the young men who battled back, after losing to Alabama in the SEC Championship a month ago, to play one of the best games of their lives Monday night. I know from personal experience they will appreciate this season for the rest of their lives and fondly remember the brotherhood they've built with their teammates.

Peter, I think 2022 is going to be "The Year of the DAWG!!"

To celebrate Georgia's victory, we're having a HUGE contest. We're going to give one lucky member of Team Herschel a signed #34 jersey, _**and I'll personalize it just for our winner!**_

The last time we won a National Championship, I was on the field playing alongside my fellow Dawgs. I'm incredibly proud of the young men who battled back, after losing to Alabama in the SEC Championship a month ago, to play one of the best games of their lives Monday night. I know from personal experience they will appreciate this season for the rest of their lives and fondly remember the brotherhood they've built with their teammates. Peter, I think 2022 is going to be "The Year of the DAWG!!" To celebrate Georgia's victory, we're having a HUGE contest. We're going to give one lucky member of Team Herschel a signed #34 jersey, and I'll personalize it just for our winner! Thanks for your support. Way to go Dawgs! name: Dr. Kathleen Harder
subject: What do you bring to the party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email]I’ve been blessed beyond measure to have upheld a highly successful 30-year career as a medical professional. I accomplished it through perseverance, believing in myself, and working harder than I could even put into words. But just like most, my path to success wasn’t strictly linear.
My childhood, although imperfect, gave me the rare gift of determination and grit, and that gift turned into a desire to break every glass ceiling possible . I dropped out of college during my junior year to support my family, and it wasn’t until after I had my second daughter that I decided to go to medical school. During that first med school interview, the person in charge crossed his arms, stared right into my eyes, and said... "So, what do you bring to the party?"
Well, let me tell you what I’ll bring to the party in Congress.
If I’m elected to represent Oregon’s Sixth District in Washington, I will protect Oregon families and bring my medical knowledge with me to advocate fiercely for every single child and parent.
I’d be honored if you could make a $25 donation to my campaign for Congress today. This donation will help us communicate with voters to let them know why I’m the representative who will fight day in and day out to improve their daily lives. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email]
As a doctor and as someone who looks for the best plan of action, I can tell you with confidence that moving forward is our best option . I’m frustrated by the actions of science deniers and conspiracy theorists in Congress, and I can’t sit back any longer and watch them continue to block meaningful legislation and harm their own constituents with misinformation.
So, just like I told my interviewer when I was applying for medical school, I’m bringing education, determination, grit, and compassion to the table. And I’m ready for my next chapter.
If you’re with me, please consider a donation to my campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh?refcode=220112-email]
Together, we will move forward.
Thank you,
Dr. Kathleen Harder

name: Christy Smith
subject: The most important piece of legislation this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40625799/325219540/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDg0NTI3ZS0xNDc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BC4W6DS_qg1UEeEKp2kO01-rIoti4U1IDzwd7Ci0Ldw=&emci=630bf78c-1473-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=5084527e-1474-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=11385749)

Dear Peter,

Right now, we are facing one of the most pivotal moments in recent memory – a moment we decide **how willing we are to protect the right to vote in this country.**

Since the 2020 election, we have seen the most egregious GOP-led attacks on voting rights in generations:
* In Georgia, after Democrats historically flipped two Senate seats to gain control of Congress, the Republican legislature immediately imposed onerous voter ID laws, limited ballot drop boxes, and criminalized the handing out of food and water to voters in line.

* In Arizona, they passed a law that banned the collection of absentee ballots and throws out any ballots cast in the wrong precinct, which was found to have a disproportionate impact on voters of color and Native voters.

* In Texas, they banned 24 hour and drive-thru voting, banned officials from automatically sending mail-in ballot applications, and empowered partisan poll workers, opening the door for widespread voter harassment.

It's no coincidence that Republicans, after a shameful 2020 loss and historic voter turnout, are going after our fundamental right to vote. They know that when people turn out, they lose.

clean_body: | Dear Peter, Right now, we are facing one of the most pivotal moments in recent memory – a moment we decide how willing we are to protect the right to vote in this country. Since the 2020 election, we have seen the most egregious GOP-led attacks on voting rights in generations: In Georgia, after Democrats historically flipped two Senate seats to gain control of Congress, the Republican legislature immediately imposed onerous voter ID laws, limited ballot drop boxes, and criminalized the handing out of food and water to voters in line. In Arizona, they passed a law that banned the collection of absentee ballots and throws out any ballots cast in the wrong precinct, which was found to have a disproportionate impact on voters of color and Native voters. In Texas, they banned 24 hour and drive-thru voting, banned officials from automatically sending mail-in ballot applications, and empowered partisan poll workers, opening the door for widespread voter harassment. It's no coincidence that Republicans, after a shameful 2020 loss and historic voter turnout, are going after our fundamental right to vote. They know that when people turn out, they lose. But we don't have to let them get away with it. In a few weeks, the Senate will vote on the Freedom to Vote Act, a critical piece of legislation that makes Election Day a federal holiday, creates automatic voter registration, expands early and absentee voting and so much more. I will not sit back and watch as Republicans like Mike Garcia attempt to unthread the fabric of our democracy, and I know you won't either. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Christy = =

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A damning report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, did you see what the _Washington Post_ just reported?
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9839?refcode=em20220112-953&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=953%2E420207%2ElgUj6J)
How we respond to this news will matter for generations to come. We simply cannot keep moving forward without real action on climate. That’s why I’m fighting so hard for the Build Back Better Act — which includes $550 billion in investments to fight climate change. And there’s so much more we need to do right away to protect our environment. This can’t wait.
[**Peter, can you join me in pushing to fight climate change with the urgency necessary? Contribute $3 today to help fuel our critical work to pass Build Back Better and protect our environment, our communities, and our planet.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9839?refcode=em20220112-953&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=953%2E420207%2ElgUj6J)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9839?refcode=em20220112-953&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=953%2E420207%2ElgUj6J)**
We know the climate crisis is not some far off problem. It’s here, it’s now, and it’s an emergency.
Extreme weather and the deadly damage wrought by ever more frequent climate disasters won’t let up until we act — until we transform the way we are treating this planet. As long as we refuse to transition to clean energy, and continue allowing the status quo that puts corporate profits ahead of our communities, more disasters will come and the climate crisis will only get worse.
**The Senate has a chance to take immediate action by investing $550 billion in fighting climate change. They must act now.[Can you chip in $3 right now to fuel our fight for our planet and the entire Build Back Better agenda?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9839?refcode=em20220112-953&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=953%2E420207%2ElgUj6J)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Georgia won, will you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The University of Georgia Bulldogs are NATIONAL CHAMPIONS! To celebrate, we’re giving away an autographed UGA jersey!
|
---
Fellow American -

**The University of Georgia Bulldogs are National Champions!**

The last time we won a National Championship, I was on the field playing alongside my fellow Dawgs.

I'm incredibly proud of the young men who battled back, after losing to Alabama in the SEC Championship a month ago, to play one of the best games of their lives Monday night. I know from personal experience they will appreciate this season for the rest of their lives and fondly remember the brotherhood they've built with their teammates.

Fellow American, I think 2022 is going to be "The Year of the DAWG!!"

To celebrate Georgia's victory, we're having a HUGE contest. We're going to give one lucky member of Team Herschel a signed #34 jersey, _**and I'll personalize it just for our winner!**_

clean_body: The University of Georgia Bulldogs are NATIONAL CHAMPIONS! To celebrate, we’re giving away an autographed UGA jersey! | Fellow American - The University of Georgia Bulldogs are National Champions! The last time we won a National Championship, I was on the field playing alongside my fellow Dawgs. I'm incredibly proud of the young men who battled back, after losing to Alabama in the SEC Championship a month ago, to play one of the best games of their lives Monday night. I know from personal experience they will appreciate this season for the rest of their lives and fondly remember the brotherhood they've built with their teammates. Fellow American, I think 2022 is going to be "The Year of the DAWG!!" To celebrate Georgia's victory, we're having a HUGE contest. We're going to give one lucky member of Team Herschel a signed #34 jersey, and I'll personalize it just for our winner! Thanks for your support. Way to go Dawgs! name: John Fetterman
subject: not great
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
A brand-new super PAC is dumping a huge amount of money into this race.
#
Derek, I have some (not great) breaking news to share: 😬
**A new Dr. Oz-aligned super PAC is dumping a *huge* amount of money into Pennsylvania.**
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again, Derek – Dr. Oz is trying to BUY this Senate seat. Just look at the facts:
* Dr. Oz has a reported net worth of $100 million
* He’s already sunk more than $4 million dollars into TV ads
* And now, a collection of ultra-rich mega donors can write unlimited checks from the sidelines to a super PAC that is dumping tons of money on TV ads

**We’ve got a money storm coming our way.** The only way we can stop it is if grassroots supporters from every corner of Cresco are able to step up and chip in what they can.
**[Will you help us raise $50,000 to fight back? If about 2,500 of yinz can donate before midnight, we’d raise that much and send an unmistakable message that we will not allow Dr. Oz and his rich friends to buy this election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40759?refcode=ema20220112-4176&t=1&akid=4176%2E434096%2Eh51x3L)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40759?refcode=ema20220112-4176&t=2&akid=4176%2E434096%2Eh51x3L)**
We know that our campaign is powerfully supported by grassroots donors unlike anything we’ve ever seen in Pennsylvania. But that doesn’t take away the fact that the unlimited power of super PACs can easily overpower the work of the people if we’re not prepared. That’s basically why these shady PACs exist in the first place.
**We need to be prepared for whatever Oz and his powerful friends throw our way****, Derek.**
If we can get a couple thousand of our Team Fetterman supporters to chip in right now, we can raise $50,000 today and send a clear message about the kind of grassroots strength they’ll be up against.
**[Please, if you can afford it today, make a contribution to help us raise $50,000 to fight back against Dr. Oz’s new super PAC and the huge amount of money it's pouring into Pennsylvania.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40759?refcode=ema20220112-4176&t=3&akid=4176%2E434096%2Eh51x3L)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40759?refcode=em20220112-4176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4176%2E434096%2Eh51x3L)**
Derek, it’s not an exaggeration to say this campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. Whether you can give today or not, I’m incredibly grateful that you’re on the team. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220112-4176-footer&t=23&refcode2=4176_434096_h51x3L&akid=4176%2E434096%2Eh51x3L)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4176%2E434096%2Eh51x3L)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4176%2E434096%2Eh51x3L)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We need to support Jessica Cisneros in the final stretch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It's clear that in order to pass bold legislation on climate, voting
rights, racial justice, and economic justice, we need to replace status
quo corporate Democrats with candidates who will fight for the people.

Jessica Cisneros is running for Congress to take on Henry Cuellar and his
corporate backers. But with in-person early voting starting in just over a
month, and mail voting starting even sooner, we need to go all in to
support Jessica’s campaign in this final stretch.

We’re setting out to raise an additional 250 contributions, split between
Jessica’s campaign and Justice Democrats, to help support our work of
reaching voters across TX-28. Even just a single donation will help make a
massive impact in this crucial stretch. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88835?refcode=em20220112-21454&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21454%2E1203867%2EleeG_Z ]Can we count on you to split a
contribution of $3 to Jessica and Justice Democrats to help
us reach our goal?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88835?refcode=em20220112-21454&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21454%2E1203867%2EleeG_Z ]Contribute $3

Henry Cuellar has raised millions in campaign cash from billionaires and
corporations, all while advocating in Congress for policies that have left
working-class South Texans behind.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88835?refcode=em20220112-21454&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21454%2E1203867%2EleeG_Z ]Can you chip in $3 to power the campaign it will take
to defeat Cuellar? We’re counting on 250 people to step up in this final
stretch!

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21454%2E1203867%2EleeG_Z ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21454%2E1203867%2EleeG_Z ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220112-21454-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21454_1203867_leeG_Z&akid=21454%2E1203867%2EleeG_Z

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21454%2E1203867%2EleeG_Z

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Charles Booker
subject: No more political games.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we have to
get this guy out of office.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14560?refcode=em20220112-1443&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14560?refcode=em20220112-1443&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px ][IMG]

Rand Paul led a dangerous push to spread COVID misinformation to make a
profit off Big Pharma. He’s voted down countless bills that would support
workers and families who have been hurt the most in this pandemic. And now
instead of focusing on ways to help Kentucky — one of the hardest hit
states by recent COVID surges — he’s playing political games. Again.

Enough is enough. I’m running to replace Rand Paul because the cost of
inaction is too high.

But I can’t do this work alone,
Peter. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14560?refcode=em20220112-1443&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px ]Will you chip in
$5 or anything you can to fund our voter outreach efforts
so we can make history in Kentucky this year? It’s critical we secure the
funds we need to build our organizing programs and retire Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14560?refcode=em20220112-1443&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px ]Contribute $5

For years now, Rand Paul has been picking a fight with Dr. Fauci to
distract us from his own failed leadership and selfish priorities in the
Senate. Yesterday, Rand once again chose to focus his time on levying
irrelevant, personal attacks on Dr. Fauci.

But this time — Dr. Fauci fired back with screenshots of Rand’s website
which shows how the Senator is trying to fundraise off of getting Dr.
Fauci fired.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14560?refcode=em20220112-1443&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px ][IMG]

Kentucky is hungry for bold change and I’m ready to lead this work so we
can bring real, working class leadership to the Senate.

We’re working to build a campaign that represents ALL of us, from the hood
to the holler. But doing this kind of in-depth voter outreach takes a lot
of resources and funding.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14560?refcode=em20220112-1443&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px ]That’s why it’s important we send a loud message today about the
strength of our movement and power our organizing efforts. Will you chip
in $5 or anything you can to help out?

Let’s win this,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220112-1443-footer&t=1026&refcode2=1443_346206_w-X4px&akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1443%2E346206%2Ew-X4px

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Help get Beto on the air across Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Greg Abbott is buying his first TV ads. How we respond today is critical.
#
It’s official: Greg Abbott is up with his first TV ads of the cycle, which will be airing statewide through the Republican primary.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51655?refcode=ema20220112-171206&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)
Unsurprisingly, Abbott’s ads use his disastrous border wall as a prop. But they don’t say anything about actually supporting our border communities — let alone his failure to protect Texans from Covid-19, or his incompetence and corruption that led to the power grid crisis last year.
**Texans need to hear the whole truth about Greg Abbott’s record, which is why we need to get OUR message on the air as soon as possible. And with your help, we can.**
**We’re setting a brand-new goal to raise $100,000 in grassroots donations toward our TV advertising budget.**[**Can Beto count on you to chip in $3 or more to help get our first TV ads on the air across Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51655?refcode=ema20220112-171206&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)
**[Help Fund Our First TV Ads »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51655?refcode=ema20220112-171206&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)**
Campaigns like Abbott’s don’t often spend so much on TV this early in the race. But apparently when your mega-donors help you get a $55 million head start on your opponents, you can use a different playbook.
Abbott thinks he can spend his way out of having to face real accountability for the tens of thousands of lives lost to Covid-19, or the millions of families harmed during last year’s winter storm.
**We’re counting on you to make sure he doesn’t succeed.**
**[If our hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters come together, even just to chip in a few dollars, we can get Beto’s message on the airwaves all across Texas. Will you pitch in toward our $100,000 TV advertising fund?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51655?refcode=ema20220112-171206&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)**
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51655?refcode=ema20220112-171206&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)**
There are so many Texans out there who are looking for a reason to join our campaign. If we can get on the air and share the truth that’s missing from Abbott’s ads, we can bring folks everywhere in the state into our winning coalition.
Let’s do this,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220112-171206-footer&t=24&refcode2=171206_444211_Vq9BRJ&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=25&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=171206%2E444211%2EVq9BRJ)

body:
You may remember my time in the NFL, winning a championship with the Raiders in the 1980 Super Bowl. I might have left the playing field for the political arena, but this Republican Party is the most important team I have ever been on. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7d706ed6e42c4daab7d8210c0a635a14&_e=mb3EHHS-MVe40r5I66g7qoqPC23FCdg5mnOlFkabz2x29zlPA0v_aS43-Ef3Z08MXQAQVtPwpoVgGSY5BlQKmWipKzHNvLSLSQiE9tWREBuiz541UEemO45W7Evu2zBZ9z8wpHxtL2872ztfLMUGxrS1nxynNrCOlrsfLkAtuhFed0JXniNRJUb2YJcSlAhAYMOh84GhMqXabSAM5ENGIvlYE8flnNE-3ItXUGA9fGJkcqrO-grJXw4vsxw0XKJJg45U4Ie7Rr7ZCeZvGn4pde3PBx9FUOJhIwykXNc020dbUSCc2URsMlSE9Y9bm6IvqhPhEu1kx7JrXXOYsdtF2_s4anwzp-HcscTZrstl-AMVNLIZnvZbs_dXEwVkjXKgxrY9iXqrMqxH9WdUhdjKg6PC9JG_rQmarHmQe6SQv5ln0XX9oeshWpg3XeAqvz5YMb8mZ7v_d9SPAde65mpt8g%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

You may remember my time in the National Football League, winning a championship with the Raiders in the 1980 Super Bowl.

**I might have left the playing field for the political arena, but this Republican Party is the most important team I have ever been on.**

If we want to make our team stronger and take back the House from the radical-Left, we need steadfast conservatives to flip Democrat seats in 2022. [**Which is why I am proud to support April Becker, the Republican candidate in Nevada’s nationally-targeted Third Congressional District.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7d706ed6e42c4daab7d8210c0a635a14&_e=mb3EHHS-MVe40r5I66g7qoqPC23FCdg5mnOlFkabz2x29zlPA0v_aS43-Ef3Z08MXQAQVtPwpoVgGSY5BlQKmWipKzHNvLSLSQiE9tWREBuiz541UEemO45W7Evu2zBZ9z8wpHxtL2872ztfLMUGxrS1nxynNrCOlrsfLkAtuhFed0JXniNRJUb2YJcSlAhAYMOh84GhMqXabSAM5ENGIvlYE8flnNE-3ItXUGA9fGJkcqrO-grJXw4vsxw0XKJJJYo7BaqmjQsjd62LTxzBKXkPf45GNkw1Xko9vCDzP8fZO5WtbnSX74WqSmmFruuNfVjiJmlP7D50Y4_5tYr33Tq5awgARfgHXE7sZsE9b75AbAQYj3n9lsfTWmT7gIzqWBu4Ef1-0uji34giEEsXcjg0swizs0YzdxwgrzW6RmMueV0WZf8nhBfL1ZLo2YKoC7zROd_3e9iG7hKS3nDm0A%3D%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7d706ed6e42c4daab7d8210c0a635a14&_e=mb3EHHS-MVe40r5I66g7qoqPC23FCdg5mnOlFkabz2x29zlPA0v_aS43-Ef3Z08MXQAQVtPwpoVgGSY5BlQKmWipKzHNvLSLSQiE9tWREBuiz541UEemO45W7Evu2zBZ9z8wpHxtL2872ztfLMUGxrS1nxynNrCOlrsfLkAtuhFed0JXniNRJUb2YJcSlAhAYMOh84GhMqXabSAM5ENGIvlYE8flnNE-3ItXUGA9fGJkcqrO-grJXw4vsxw0XKJJkPCraQft6_a1NpUUklm71uQIq0FR4pYznRi9-Z8HKXy7ZWx-kLtfgztP0ZEk_Xb6pg645kE5EE5Wu0xwLRTiBmB81fThdDl-ZppTgZAQ72Q6Cvp9Aqm7l70kvKNf1-mjsr8MlkkSghmMjOf_qNtpOuG8O2xK3Yll0OG6-3h8TdNKIYUfketC9BeF97e_s4SzAxPI_jXonR39ucz5KtkWog%3D%3D)

name: Nate Sandvig
subject: Say “NO” to Another Shutdown!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
I’m fighting to protect our students’ right to learn. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/780bad9cadecd992/1561b2886cd00defc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends,

Today, our children are living in a dystopian reality of forced masking and distancing in our schools, thanks to the tyrannical decrees of far-left politicians and bureaucrats.

**And now, we have state officials telling our schools to drop extracurricular activities or face the threat of another state-mandated SHUTDOWN!**

The research is clear – the online “learning” our kids were forced into was a disaster.

_WE MUST KEEP OUR KIDS IN SCHOOL, PERIOD!_

[**If you’re on board in our fight to stop this insanity, please rush a secure donation >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/780bad9cadecd992/9d8f4514c75bf355c3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
[**PITCH IN NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/780bad9cadecd992/073042ae262971dec3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
These mandates are not about safety. They are about top-down government control and stripping away personal freedom, and those that are hurt the most are the disadvantaged and vulnerable.

**We need to stand up and FIGHT BACK against this nonsense!**

I’m taking a stand to protect our students’ right to learn, and I’m grateful for your support.

\- Nate

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: The Barbershops of Toledo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Last weekend, Morgan was meeting with the community
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220112-509-footer-ak&t=2&akid=509%2E90090%2EnLTiij)
Last weekend, Morgan was in Toledo and met with members of the community across the city. Morgan stopped by six barbershops and salons to connect with and listen to people about what matters most to them.
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20389?t=3&akid=509%2E90090%2EnLTiij)
_**"I'm in this thing because we need people in Washington who understand our communities and are going to put that perspective above their careers, above the money, above everything. We need our power back and that can start now."** — Morgan speaking to WTOL 11._
We’re running this grassroots, bottom-up, community-focused campaign because we know that only a different kind of Democrat can flip Ohio blue, and in a 50-50 Senate we need bold candidates to win in 2022. **[If you’re with us, can you chip in $5 today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20389?t=4&akid=509%2E90090%2EnLTiij)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20395?refcode=em20220112-509&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=509%2E90090%2EnLTiij)**
Electing an advocate for working people, and not taking _one dollar_ from corporate PACs to get there, means that it will take a movement of working people coming together. To continue getting out into the community and meeting voters where they are, we need all the grassroots donations that we can get.
**[So if it makes sense for you today, please, donate to our campaign to fuel our efforts across the state of Ohio.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/20389?t=24&akid=509%2E90090%2EnLTiij)**
Thank you,
Morgan Harper HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220112-509-footer&t=25&refcode2=509_90090_nLTiij&akid=509%2E90090%2EnLTiij)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=509%2E90090%2EnLTiij)

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Sex and the City
body:
Just the facts, ma'am Hi there, [**In a country with so many empty homes, we can afford to house every homeless person. That’s what I stand for. If you do, too, can you support me with a quick $3 donation here, so I can fight for affordable housing for all in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40626072/325220934/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjE1NDljOS0yMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDr6TSzfkIHwujb1WUhNlGPH2h-XMMXCCjU9APQMuBs=) I tweeted last week that there are 28 empty homes for every homeless person in the US — a fact I got from Census data. While the responses were mostly supportive, I also got responses like this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40626073/325220935/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjE1NDljOS0yMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDr6TSzfkIHwujb1WUhNlGPH2h-XMMXCCjU9APQMuBs=) I love it when instead of engaging on the facts, people give me casual sexism instead! It’s easier to say that, since I’m a woman, I must watch _Sex and the City_ and get my facts from there. I guess as a woman, I’m unable to read spreadsheets from the Census? [**I bring this up because I want you to know that in this era of misinformation, I always stick to the facts and give you the truth. I’ve arrived at my policy platform of housing for all, Medicare for All, and the Green New Deal based on the facts. These are the right policies to save people’s lives, and I hope you’ll support me with a donation now so I can fight for them in Congress. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40626074/325220936/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjE1NDljOS0yMzc0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDr6TSzfkIHwujb1WUhNlGPH2h-XMMXCCjU9APQMuBs=) There are over 550,000 homeless people in the U.S., and 4.7 million people are likely to be evicted in the next 2 months. Almost 20% of Americans have lost their entire life savings during the pandemic. Countless people are living in subpar living conditions — like the 17 people who died in a Bronx apartment building fire — because they can’t afford anything else. clean_body: Just the facts, ma'am Hi there, = I tweeted last week that there are 28 empty homes for every homeless person in the US — a fact I got from Census data. While the responses were mostly supportive, I also got responses like this: = I love it when instead of engaging on the facts, people give me casual sexism instead! It’s easier to say that, since I’m a woman, I must watch Sex and the City and get my facts from there. I guess as a woman, I’m unable to read spreadsheets from the Census? = There are over 550,000 homeless people in the U.S., and 4.7 million people are likely to be evicted in the next 2 months. Almost 20% of Americans have lost their entire life savings during the pandemic. Countless people are living in subpar living conditions — like the 17 people who died in a Bronx apartment building fire — because they can’t afford anything else. It’s time to treat housing like a human right in this country. If you agree, please donate now to help me fight for housing in Congress. You can use any of the links below ⬇️ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = I am a housing rights organizer, and I’ve risked arrest occupying empty buildings to get more housing for our homeless community in Tacoma. With so many empty homes and buildings, there’s no good reason for people to freeze to death on the street. Thank you for your support, -Rebecca Parson Candidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to: Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States Paid for by Rebecca for Washington If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Manchin & Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Getting as many calls and emails to Senators Manchin and Sinema as possible is important.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220112-2732-header&t=1&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)
The worst wave of voter suppression in decades is unfolding in statehouses across the country.
We have a bill on the table that would strengthen voting protections before the 2022 elections, but in order to pass it, we need Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to support an exception to the filibuster so these bills can be voted on.
**Senate leadership has been clear that getting as many calls, emails, and everything in between to both Senators Manchin and Sinema is important.** So that’s where you come in:
[Can you send a letter to Senators Manchin and Sinema calling on them to support changes to filibuster rules so that we can protect our democracy and pass essential voting rights legislation?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/manchin-sinema-voting-rights/?source=em20220112-2732-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=2&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)
**[Send a letter →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/manchin-sinema-voting-rights/?source=em20220112-2732-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=3&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)**
Last year alone, 19 states passed 33 laws that make it harder for Americans to vote.1
The _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ would prevent some of the worst of these voting rights attacks in time for the 2022 elections.
This bill has been stuck in Senate gridlock for months as the Republican minority continues to abuse the filibuster to block its passage.
But the truth is that exceptions to the filibuster can and have been made — many times! In fact, between 1969 and 2014, 161 exceptions to the filibuster’s supermajority requirement were created.2
While we work to abolish the filibuster altogether, it’s critical that we take the necessary steps _**now**_ to protect voting rights. Only then will we have a chance at electing more Senators who support the will of the people.
[Please send a letter to Senators Manchin and Sinema now and we will deliver them to their offices electronically. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/manchin-sinema-voting-rights/?source=em20220112-2732-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=4&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)
Thank you for speaking out.
Team AOC
**[Send a letter →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/manchin-sinema-voting-rights/?source=em20220112-2732-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=5&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)**
1 - [Brennan Center for Justice
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10365?t=6&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)2 - [Brennan Center for Justice](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10368?t=7&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220112-2732-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=8&refcode2=2732_2526796_a9lTBJ&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220112-2732-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=9&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=10&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=11&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=12&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=13&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=2732%2E2526796%2Ea9lTBJ)

body:
First, they attacked me for being pro-life. Here’s what got them riled up this time. | |

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=16e48155a0374cfbbfc6e4047ba3fab4&_e=5d6asGMuemkJJdVJzw-Y_hJ76zgl2dF-urmoTHFpR8CEID6ppMjKj2ok_asc7xkupaSWmNUnspPdXGdHD4PonflQnL6HGA8I6Tjxx_aumSmpMtAelFgh8pHlxQubRROX_rL8QtpGsXWtY7JgeNTqu1kEUntO4GI6cw8ren2eA7QIPgQkzQ2ZyV8gYu9XMuAxIFBtj-kMIdHpUGvxwplNYnu-9FT-lSmGFZh_REXTyotsixXcb2VFqgXXKuZBkbTKscfIiBX6icwGjTI-LShH_RyHqGZ5jJCaxTQR1pLohdcUv1rHjNuAoxqDqdV2W2iAptUfww7e4lX-at6DOEq5jJz2C6csSs5FQnGbnI0yOrYiLofPXDkqKsNKW9yPDAgks8Yh23TENLwDGKwLtPwIaoQjHQV3kOH5hPwQxS2gQsnt99AulHSv9KMn7A4pvzK2db_us1sZiDtqXjoQMxtNLrZbBU_suzcc1UfmVZf3m5TzH7FIFRrswx4m1sIWoSCC)

Peter,

It looks like I’m the Woke Left’s new favorite target.

This group attacked me the other day for my pro-life views. Now they’re coming after me AGAIN for speaking the truth about Nevada’s corrupt election laws.

[_**See for yourself.**_](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=16e48155a0374cfbbfc6e4047ba3fab4&_e=5d6asGMuemkJJdVJzw-Y_hJ76zgl2dF-urmoTHFpR8CEID6ppMjKj2ok_asc7xkupaSWmNUnspPdXGdHD4PonflQnL6HGA8I6Tjxx_aumSmpMtAelFgh8pHlxQubRROX_rL8QtpGsXWtY7JgeNTqu1kEUntO4GI6cw8ren2eA7QIPgQkzQ2ZyV8gYu9XMuAxIFBtj-kMIdHpUGvxwplNYnu-9FT-lSmGFZh_REXTyotsixXcb2VFqgXXKuZBkbTKscfIiBX6icwGjTI-LShH_RyHqGZ5jJCaxTQR1pLohde4sNc3hS5aUNkz4dz_DgSZvOVDF-ECebNofrukEUU1GSe6mZHoxFF5T9tYkK-pCQ7QN2Qw-mMoj5UTn2cUSgjp1IpNeJKCarBLVcUhJeQNJI5pQaNfI-cMoaa_0A6Zr6w-Smn_fc0MsFPazlmo8oMzUhSRNppWE5KUsHY4xBv0OngEa7rvOeQj9EJQXDCB8XtdC78jfEPOrT2oOhI6_D9e)

[**FIGHT FOR FAIR ELECTIONS**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=16e48155a0374cfbbfc6e4047ba3fab4&_e=5d6asGMuemkJJdVJzw-Y_hJ76zgl2dF-urmoTHFpR8CEID6ppMjKj2ok_asc7xkupaSWmNUnspPdXGdHD4PonflQnL6HGA8I6Tjxx_aumSmpMtAelFgh8pHlxQubRROX_rL8QtpGsXWtY7JgeNTqu1kEUntO4GI6cw8ren2eA7QIPgQkzQ2ZyV8gYu9XMuAxIFBtj-kMIdHpUGvxwplNYnu-9FT-lSmGFZh_REXTyotsixXcb2VFqgXXKuZBkbTKscfIiBX6icwGjTI-LShH_RyHqGZ5jJCaxTQR1pLohddXKbuVpXaR0gySvYhgb42BNoTSnm3z8jcUkoh1P14GUjqvQNAPvIe3BBrRaGmUbSk3fb6QRX6vtviMUQFEAJFneqK1I-yFowGh4mp22kE1AJrYNxU4G-N3ClJsa52if5tPvVvuIipCxza1rYnB4DKR_bcqWC6Bqfjec08ZfaUPWhuJm3B7SWCk6ZUKOcMmXGaslcpjMLEGFYWkpQv37cq6)
Liberals are targeting me because they know I’ll deliver on my promise to make Nevada’s elections secure again.

_I was the FIRST Secretary of State in Nevada to conduct a forensic election audit. I even got rid of election officials who failed to protect our right to vote._

**When I’m Governor, I’ll continue the fight by:**
* **Eliminating ballot harvesting**
* **Ending universal mail-in voting**
* **Requiring voter ID**

[**STAND WITH ME FOR SECURE ELECTIONS**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=16e48155a0374cfbbfc6e4047ba3fab4&_e=5d6asGMuemkJJdVJzw-Y_hJ76zgl2dF-urmoTHFpR8CEID6ppMjKj2ok_asc7xkupaSWmNUnspPdXGdHD4PonflQnL6HGA8I6Tjxx_aumSmpMtAelFgh8pHlxQubRROX_rL8QtpGsXWtY7JgeNTqu1kEUntO4GI6cw8ren2eA7QIPgQkzQ2ZyV8gYu9XMuAxIFBtj-kMIdHpUGvxwplNYnu-9FT-lSmGFZh_REXTyotsixXcb2VFqgXXKuZBkbTKscfIiBX6icwGjTI-LShH_RyHqGZ5jJCaxTQR1pLohdcJs0rWirxYPlGImGg1ELCv60rgz9AYoh3f4y7x2GtAR1AI-pRua7kCbK0zhIIB_3vpFygSNCgm-jrPqQS4gyAntmkqHSZIQCAWer9wzS-YFU7jcMoXh9Jw6NZ8jj6Lf_WN7GBQGvtwKS0K7McLo-mVF6fXgLgeUwfDvYaFZJ5Hi8J_t-UrAfGBEL0ZBkrvtgEu9LHa38QVox1NveaI5evd)

– Dean

| Hi friends -- Did you see this important message from Doug? We have just **6 hours left** until our critical fundraising deadline! **[Can you make a donation right now to help us reach our goal by midnight tonight?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yS1xp6NAMAS4Ab76BygH-xqCBqF5vUtQ5eBf-T5C99zBttvNTbYbsrTzRMS5YihEJmrv6ty2Z80R0EdAUlhpjfUCOnsKZW2CXzg0H0c7cO230tuumHRDza3KPLziCx3gm6tfeeqCl00XvkOHx1xowDhO97mIrKZk6E4Z8A2mvkJsl08-3Dy1Uixoutq57CtbgAyuxzElSTQwEyH4vTy6GKr4ODYc0UNBJyb8AD4OPda9K2UaNP_5AghFWtdzO4yqz8CS9lldTfdLvFswDZOE3NCs_xjgcr8peo49rqy3FqGdxQbYNECLtYM6K7lWObQk8cwiU1ruWAitzWvBZEHCa3/3in/EQGzV1irQhiVd-YZN-ut9w/h0/WrIWVXaf8UBPoadshx47N4VDQxvRxmwt26teyUpsG1U) ** Thanks for your support, Tom Van Horn Finance Director

\-------Begin Message------- From: Doug Gansler <info@douggansler.com> Subject: I care deeply about Maryland Date: January 12, 2022 at 12:01 PM
---
Hi friends, Since I kicked off my campaign in May, my team has worked relentlessly to spread the word about my bold agenda and connect with voters all across the state. I've had the opportunity to participate in forums and interviews, attend dozens of events, and host my own meet and greets all over Maryland. I have been able to do all of these things and more because of the support and donations from people like you, friend. **Now, I 'm asking for your support again, as we approach the most important fundraising deadline to date.** Our campaign is required to report all of our fundraising numbers up to this point and it's critical that our report reflects the movement we've built together over the last several months. I'm running for governor because I care deeply about Maryland and I have the experience needed to take on the greatest challenges of our time -- crime, COVID recovery, climate change, and choice. If you're on Team Gansler, **please make a donation by midnight tonight** and help us get to work to make Maryland a more just, more sustainable, and more prosperous state. **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan12deadline](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yS1xp6NAMAS4Ab76BygH-xqCBqF5vUtQ5eBf-T5C99zBttvNTbYbsrTzRMS5YihELamp4JczE5RPfd_F_N7W6BbGIMnXs1zCJ2Rz4SV1t8lOZ8lhDBV-ZihbCwcZD8K-AN389I890xaE0KLQYaYJdamvkkZ8rKGLkQnBl-g6nyTQ9CplKHfOAwjQGToRWplXGzEuiJaDKh3XYWH0Dydx3GUs5fhMrV_YaKhHGf07-Siaxu1mPyN9tfqEfY7SIzlptWLihgjfgG5GbjoGDk8kDpyZXgobd_2A-NOyx47kBKXsG_Gl2e9rNw7XSAPrYT8kJ23q-Fj8N-3yu679MOFqla/3in/EQGzV1irQhiVd-YZN-ut9w/h1/KEwrSHOqDiQ7nWP23H3h5PwAI35ONQm8zHDowwQ6_HQ)** Thank you, Doug

Susan Wild’s job performance is far below what our Lehigh Valley friends, families, and neighbors deserve. We deserve transparency, accountability, and true work being done by our representative. name: Jesse Jensen
subject: This is getting ridiculous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
It doesn’t take a genius to know kids are better off in the classroom Peter, I'm sure you've seen the news coming out of Chicago where the teachers union is _holding the education of its students hostage_ by refusing to teach in person. It's not just Chicago. School boards across the country are ignoring our kids' best interests and catering to partisan special interests. You've always been such a strong ally of my father, and he really wants to showcase his TOP supporters during his FIRST RALLY of the year. This is your chance to go down in HISTORY as one of the Patriots who SAVED AMERICA, and all you have to do is take the next step. I'm talking with my father again tomorrow to give him an updated list of names that will be broadcast LIVE during his rally. We would love to see your name on that list, Friend. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Team -- Thanks to Senate Democrats, **2022 is starting off with a HUGE win for the American people!**

Under a new law that just went into effect, MILLIONS of Americans will no longer have to worry about surprise out-of-network medical bills.

These surprise bills used to cost families thousands or even _tens of thousands_ of dollars for services they thought were covered by insurance -- but Democrats like Maggie Hassan fought _**relentlessly**_ to change the law to protect patients, and they WON.

****We've launched an URGENT Live Poll to find out where this grassroots team stands on Senate Democrats' latest health care win, but we're still missing your response!

Our poll closes at MIDNIGHT! So please, take action now:

******RESPONSES STILL NEEDED IN PENNSYLVANIA: 109
Do you agree that Americans should be protected from surprise medical bills?**

Folks, we’re calling on this team to submit their 2022 approval rating for Gov. Steve Sisolak.
From implementing Nevada’s public health insurance option to defending reproductive rights, Gov. Sisolak has shown his commitment to fighting for Nevada’s hardworking families.
